- Rekindled Flame ｜ 烈焰复燃
- But I'm afraid I can't accept his kindness. As such, I thank you for stopping him — and me. ｜ 但是，我不能接受。所以，我很感谢你阻止了他、阻止了我。
- You didn't join Estienne's game, did you? You should know when to stop. ｜ 你们该不会是加入了艾蒂安的游戏吧？玩闹也要适可而止哦。

- Ms. Julie is not a sedentary person. Of course she gets hungry fast. ｜ 朱莉阁下这么爱动，自然饿得快了。
- The Serpent's Heart is home to an altar that is considered the heart of the Cosmic Serpent. Before the coming of Watatsumi Omikami, we called this place The Heart of Ouroboros. ｜ 蛇心之地保存了一个祭坛，被认为是宇宙蛇之心。在海祇神来之前我们就叫它奥罗巴洛斯之心了。
- Greetings, gentlemen! Are we being invited for afternoon tea? ｜ 先生们好呀，你们该不会是来邀请我们喝下午茶的吧？
- Lingering Moment ｜ 「萦绊之刻」

- Supply problem? ｜ 货源问题？
- You've been to Inazuma, right? Did you... see lots of youkai like her there? ｜ 你们也去过稻妻吧？那里真的…有很多和那位姐姐一样的妖怪吗？
- Never mind, the main thing is that you and Adelinde are here. Oh, speaking of Adelinde, where is she? ｜ 他不在就算了，你和爱德琳在就行。哦，爱德琳人呢？
- Watanabe! Trust in my judgment! ｜ 渡部！相信我的判断！
- Not at all. Every time a Blazegem Inscription extracts memories, the process is under my precise control. That way, there's no chance of anyone in the tribe getting hurt. ｜ 不会的。为了在提取记忆时不伤害部族里的人。每一枚「燃晶名刻」提取记忆时，都由我精细控制。
- No worries, I have dragon-related weapons too, don't I? ｜ 我也有和龙有关的武器！

- It was a little hard, but I can handle it. ｜ 有点难度，但还能应付。
- ...Cheep. ｜ 啁。
- Yeah, it's not uncommon for deliveries to get intercepted. That's why this job needs guards like us. ｜ 运镖路上遇到劫货的人是家常便饭啦，所以才需要我们镖师嘛。
- #You're right, {NICKNAME}, but... ｜ #唔…{NICKNAME}说得对，但是…
- Standard wishes have no time limit. View Details for more. ｜ 常驻祈愿，永久性祈愿活动。具体内容查看【详情】
- I have to finish my report before my mentor recovers. With any luck, he won't try to test it himself again. I'll stop him from sparring with monsters willy-nilly, even if it costs me my life. ｜ 得在导师康复前，熬夜把报告写完。希望他看后不要再产生试一试的想法…如果他想再和怪物过几招，我豁出性命也要拦下来。

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- After a character uses their <color=#FFCC33FF>Elemental Burst</color>, it grants the party one stack of "Accumulation." Each stack of "Accumulation" increases the CRIT Rate of the Elemental Burst by 7.5% for all party members for 8s. This effect can stack up to 4 times. ｜ 角色施放<color=#FFCC33FF>元素爆发</color>时，将使队伍获得一层「聚合」，每层「聚合」会使队伍中所有角色的元素爆发的暴击率提升7.5%，此效果持续8秒，最多叠加4层。

- Hey, look! The wheel is spinning now. ｜ 啊，快看，那个大轮子转起来了。
- Restores 26% of Max HP to the selected character and regenerates 450 HP every 5s for 30s. ｜ 立即为选中的角色恢复生命值上限的26%，并在之后的30秒内，每5秒恢复450点生命值。

- After Paimon sees Yuandai and Shuyu off, Xiao suddenly appears before you. ｜ 派蒙目送远黛和漱玉走远，魈突然出现在了视野中。
- This strange powder, it is... fine, like sand, but white as the clouds, and cold as ice... ｜ 这些白色的东西，冰冰凉凉的…
- "Friend, are you worried that being unfamiliar with the goings-on of a new country will result in an unhappy accident? The Confrerie of Cabriere is at your service." ｜ 「朋友，担心因为不熟悉相关信息而在异国出现意外？卡布里埃商会竭诚为您服务。」
- Hey cutie, we meet again. ｜ 小可爱，我们果然遇到了呢。

- Do not let excitement and adventure pass you by — not when there are still infinite mysteries in our world to behold! ｜ 大地上还有无限的秘密，可不要轻易沦为废墟中的枯骨。
- That is pretty surprising... ｜ 确实有点意外…
- Don't worry, they'll be quite safe. As long as I remember them... they'll never disappear. ｜ 放心吧，他们不会消失的…只要我不忘记他们。
- Oh! You mean, to wish Mini Durin a safe voyage as he sails into a new chapter of his life beyond this world? ｜ 哦！是寓意小杜林的故事，能够驶向这个世界之外的新篇章吗？
- Is that so... ｜ 是这样吗…
- You and Paimon relax for a while at Spina di Rosula's base in the Court of Fontaine... ｜ 你和派蒙在枫丹廷的刺玫会据点休整了一些时日…
- Well... Technically, there is one more lead we could follow up on. ｜ 非要说线索的话，其实还剩一个。

- I would recommend taking a bodyguard to protect you. If the customer does turn out to be rotten, you can let the bodyguard deal with them. ｜ 我建议还是叫上一名卫兵吧，如果对方真是坏人，就交给卫兵处理。
- This must be the loot that he is after... Let's bring it back to him. ｜ 这就是那家伙要的战利品吧，我们带回去给他吧。
- Some areas in which Secret Troves are buried feature special tiles that will light up when first stepped on, and turn off when stepped on again.\nAfter stepping on one such tile, the next tile stepped on must be connected to the current one on least one side.\nIf you can follow the shape formed by the Puzzle Hints and light the tiles up, perhaps you may obtain the Secret Trove... ｜ 在埋藏着「密藏」的藏宝地中，有些藏宝地的地面上铺有特殊的地砖，当初次踩踏在某块地砖上时，这块地砖会亮起，再次踩踏亮起的地砖时，亮起的地砖则会熄灭。\n当踩踏一块地砖后，踩踏的下一块地砖需与当前地砖至少有一边相接。\n如果能按照「解谜线索」中所示的式样让地砖亮起的话，或许就能获取「密藏」…

- A Bija can be formed by feeding a Vasoma Fruit to the Ashvattha Tree. It's a great tree planted by Greater Lord Rukkhadevata, and it's the origin of Aranara. ｜ 以恒素果的力量供养「觉王之树」，就能结出惟耶之实。那是树王亲自种下的伟大之树，也是兰那罗一族的原点。
- What's the rush, youngster? Would you like to stop and listen to Granny here tell you a story? ｜ 步履匆匆的年轻人，要停下来要听婆婆讲故事吗？
- I guess it's because I can help people this way. Also, the editor said to me, "This is something that only you are capable of." ｜ 大概是因为能帮到别人吧。而且八重堂的编辑也跟我说过，「这是只有你能做到的事情」。
- How dare you humiliate me and ask me to calm down? Am I someone with such bad taste? Do I look like someone who uses "Gerardo"? ｜ 你在羞辱我，还不让我生气！我像是品位那么差的人吗？我像是用「赫拉尔多」的人吗？
- Raef from Aaru Village seems to be troubled by something... ｜ 阿如村的里夫似乎正在烦恼…
- So much for that idea... Let's go tell Quinn the bad news... ｜ 没办法…还是回去告诉昆恩先生吧…
- What happened? ｜ 发生什么了？
- I'd say someone of your caliber would be right at home in The Crux. Right, sailors? ｜ 所以说，这样了不起的人，是不是应该留在南十字呢？大家说对不对？
- ...Ah, I had my ways, haha. You don't have to worry about that. ｜ …啊，我有自己的途径哈哈，这个你就不用管了。
- That is correct, so forgive me, but I will not be able to serve as a subject in your article. However, feel free to write as much as you'd like about our dear magicians — and our upcoming rookie talent. ｜ 是的，所以很遗憾，我无法加入您的报道。至于这几位孩子，还请多多描写他们作为魔术师及未来魔术师新秀的一面。

- What's up? ｜ 有什么事吗？
- Come on in then, and take a look. These are all the finest! ｜ 来，请在这里挑吧，都是上品！
- It's a new story told by Uncle Ramsay. ｜ 是一位叫拉姆齐的叔叔，给我说的新故事啦。
- (Why are you asking about something that doesn't matter...?) ｜ （为什么在说…无关的事？）
- Afterward, Lyney passed the unconscious Halsey to his accomplice through the magic box in the audience stands, before operating the devices such that Cowell's death would be ruled an accident. ｜ 之后林尼把晕厥的海尔希通过观众席的魔术箱交给接应的同伙，再操作机关让考威尔看似死于意外。

- That way, our names will be together forever, hehe. ｜ 这样子，我们的名字就能永远挨在一起了，嘿嘿。
- Thanks to you, the shrine has been greatly improved, and we can expect the humans to return very soon indeed. ｜ 多亏了汝，现在神社也比以前好了。很快很快就会有很多很多人来神社了。
- I heard that there is Vana's river source's source in the north. The water there is clearer than moonlight. A pot filled with that water looks as if is holding nothing but air. ｜ 听说北方有流淌过桓那的河流的源头的源头，那里的水比月光还要透明，盛在锅里也像是什么都没有一样。

- Caron really inspired us back there! We've got a new idea, and we need your help. I'm sure you'll be able to do it! ｜ 受卡隆老板启发，我们最近有了一个新玩具的点子，想请你来帮忙，好兄弟，你肯定能帮上忙。
- *yawn*... Good night! ｜ 呼啊…晚安啦。
- Don't mention it. Oh yes, I heard that Miwa from Sangonomiya Shrine is also in the area. Why don't you ask her for advice, too? ｜ 不客气，另外我听说珊瑚宫的美和也在这附近，你们不如也向她咨询一下？
- Yanfei takes that huge legal codex everywhere, even when she comes to pay Master a visit on her days off. She's incredible! I don't know how she carries that heavy thing around all the time, and I can't imagine how much hard work it must be to read it... ｜ 烟绯姐姐有一本厚厚的法典，就连休假来探望师父的时候，都随身带着呢，真厉害呀~能一直拿着这么重的东西，还要读这么难懂的东西…

- (Uh oh, he's getting suspicious! You must've mixed up the lines that were related to crabs!) ｜ （糟了，他对我们产生怀疑了！你一定是把那几个螃蟹相关的词给记混了。）

- ...But if we miss this chance to get out of the Fatui, I'd rather... ahem, *coughing*!! ｜ …要是错过了这次机会，让我再回去做愚人众，我宁愿…咳…咳咳！

- You see the entire city's annihilation, the buildings collapse, the ash-white monoliths squeezed in midair as they are turned to powder.\nYou see a giant dragon with pupils pierced and a tiny human falling together from a great height, while the world echoes with a sorrowful song, one composed of the agony of dragonkind.\nYou see a man rising from the dead dragon's heart once more, his whole body seemingly wreathed in flame. ｜ 你看到整个城市的毁灭，建筑的倒塌、灰白的巨石在半空中被挤压、化为齑粉。\n你看到瞳孔被刺穿的巨龙与一个小小的人儿一起从高处坠落，而整个世界回荡起悲伤的歌，由诸多龙众痛苦的哀鸣所谱写。\n你看到，全身仿佛被火焰包裹的男人自已死之龙的心脏中重新站起。

Anyway, I got Master to try and talk some sense into her, too. Who knows what dangerous thing she'll be trying to eat next... *sigh* ｜ 师姐她最近…没有去找什么奇怪的食材吧？上次她说要生吃云来大章鱼，可让我担心坏了，要是吃坏了肚子可怎么办呀？她又不喜欢吃白先生的苦药。我求了师父一起劝住了她，可不要又看上另一种危险的食材了…哎…

- Because this is probably going to turn into one of those "very rare cases" I just talked about... ｜ 因为，这次恐怕就是「极少部分情况」…

- If you two have some time, would you lend us your strength? ｜ 两位如果有时间的话，可否助我们一臂之力？
- I got it, thanks... ｜ 嗯，谢谢你们…

- Haha, raring to go! That's what I like to see. Then let's begin our reading of Guizhong's Four Commandments. ｜ 哈哈哈，你可真有干劲，那好吧，我们开始解读一下这个「归终四诫」。
- We could grab someone close to the sages and question them? ｜ 抓一个贤者方的人来问问？
- We've got everything we need. Let's go to Wuwang Hill and find Hu Tao and the others. ｜ 东西都已经拿到，我们去无妄坡找胡桃他们吧。

- A ruin machine that can absorb energy and hurl it back as an attack. This machine has even greater abilities than the Ruin Drake, being able to attack from the air and on the ground. The Aeonblight Drake can periodically release a dangerous torrent of energy and increase its own Elemental RES against the previous main type of Elemental DMG it has suffered. Under various circumstances, the <color=#f39001>cores</color> all over its body will be exposed. Take such opportunities to attack those cores, and you may be able to immobilize this creature and <color=#f39001>remove its Elemental RES boost</color>. Whenever this creature recovers from paralysis, it will switch between aerial and ground-attack forms. ｜ 能够吸收能量、反制攻击的遗迹机关。具有比遗迹龙兽更强的性能，能在地面与升空状态下进行攻击。兆载永劫龙兽在战斗中会周期性释放危险的能量洪流，并根据此前受到伤害的主要元素类型，提高对应的元素抗性。在一些状态下，它身体诸多部位的<color=#f39001>核心</color>会暴露出来。抓住这样的机会攻击核心的话，或许能使其瘫痪，并<color=#f39001>清除已提升的元素抗性</color>。从瘫痪状态恢复后，会切换升空或地面状态。
- Alas what? ｜ 可惜？
- Talk to the fan club members ｜ 与后援会成员对话
- In fact, we can't even start this lift right before us, so how will we get to the steering cabin at the top? ｜ 何况现在连眼前这个升降塔也启动不了，根本就没办法到达顶层的驾驶舱。
- "Jerome" ｜ 「杰罗姆」

- You do know that adding an extra star to the equation increases the computational workload by more than tenfold, right...? ｜ 要知道每多加入一颗星星，推演的工作量都会增加十倍不止…
- You don't have to pay me any Mora. Just help me find a Potato. ｜ 你无需付给我摩拉，只需要为我找到一颗土豆就好。

- The moment that blades are crossed in battle also becomes a kind of Eternity. I shall use this moment to feel your inner being. ｜ 刀剑相交之时，瞬间亦能化作永恒。我能借此感受你的内心。

- Oh, there's no need, but thank you. ｜ 不用哦，谢谢。

- Oh, and your opponent will be... Let's see... Many players enter the contest using nicknames, and some of them are pretty hard to remember... ｜ 喔！还有你的决斗对手，我看看啊…不少牌手都用代名来参加比赛，这些代名都有些不好记…
- We did use some ordinary ones. They didn't work well... Well, they didn't work at all. ｜ 用过一些很普通的，但效果并不好…不如说，是一点效果都没有。
- Perhaps you've grown too used to being a caterpillar? ｜ 你已经习惯了当毛毛虫吗？
- During the Windblume Festival, the area around Mondstadt will play host to all sorts of interesting activities. The Knights of Favonius' Lizzie would like to introduce you to one of the highlights of this event — "Ballads of Breeze." ｜ 风花节期间，蒙德城周围举办了各种各样的趣味活动。西风骑士团的莉兹想要隆重为你介绍其中之一，「风物之歌」。
- Shibasuke find way home, mountain kaboom! ｜ 柴助找回家的路，山哐哐！
- Want to make the big Mora, Shuyu? ｜ 漱玉想赚大钱吗？
- I... am also one of the adepti. You can say that I'm an adeptus in training. ｜ 我…应该也算仙人吧，也可以说是还在修行中的仙人。
- Ah, behold the view from the window, a delight to the senses! Prinzessin, Kaiserin, would you care to join the Kaiser der Verurteilung for a grand royal picnic? We shall enjoy the scenic view and partake of the delicacies granted to us by the heavens. ｜ 噢——！窗外景色如此迷人，皇女，皇后，二位可否赏光与我这「断罪之皇帝」一同外出野餐？看看风景，享受上天恩赐的美味。
- Hey hey! Hahaha, hey hey! Skycleaving White-Iron Lavender Melon destroys Shinobu on the first attempt, haha! ...You really are a natural at this, aren't you? ｜ 哦哟？哦哟哟！「破空白铁小堇瓜」一次就赢了阿忍…难道你真的是斗虫天才？
- A spore organism of some intelligence. It possesses extreme adaptability.\nDue to the abundant amount of Pyro these creatures contain, they have a tendency to cause forest fires during dry seasons, and thus are considered a dangerous invasive species to the forest. ｜ 拥有一定智能的孢子生物。具有强大的环境适应能力。\n因为含有富集的火元素，在干燥的季节容易引发林火，对森林来说是非常危险的入侵物种。
- A Sigil of Permission... Many a season has passed since one was last in the presence of such an item. ｜ 「百无禁忌箓」…多年不见这东西了，原来凡人手中还有残余。
- How do you know that name? ｜ 你为什么会知道这个名字？
- He did not realize that this sound could be heard by everyone in the opera house, which is why he claimed earlier that he could not hear the sound. ｜ 他没有意识到声音会大到整个歌剧院都听到，所以在之前的询问中故意说没有听到声音。
- "She waited, and waited, and waited. O Guardian, where art thou..." ｜ 「她等待良久。守护者啊，你究竟在何处…」
- But... you've been eating a lot lately, so you might've put on weight... ｜ 唔，不过，你最近是不是吃的有点多，有点变重了…
- Mmhmm, bye! Please do let me know if you need anything. ｜ 嗯嗯，再见啦！如果有什么需要，请一定要告诉我喔！
- That timbre sounds pretty good! I'm assuming his turntabling skills have become even better? ｜ 这个音色，听起来真不错。那位老兄搓碟的手法是不是越来越娴熟了？
- You should also put the books you've finished reading back where they belong. ｜ 看过的故事书，也应该放回正确的地方。
- I always used to prefer working alone in my workshop, but I have come to realize that solving problems with others also has its merits. ｜ 之前我总喜欢一个人待在工坊里，但现在觉得，大家聚在一起解决问题的感觉也不错。
- Poem Placed by Unknown Person ｜ 不知何人放于此处的诗
- Anyway, Officer, you've come to the right fella. Lemme tell you, I know all about Benoit, nobody knows him better — there's not much that scoundrel Benoit wouldn't stoop to. ｜ 长官，你们找对了人。我告诉你们，这家人我再熟不过了，伯努瓦这个坏东西烂事没少干。
- Diluc, of Mondstadt. Not interested in idle chit-chat. If you have things you want to get done, let me know. ｜ 蒙德城的迪卢克，应约而来。闲聊恕不奉陪，如果你是想做一番大事，我倒有点兴致。
- But as for the matter of one's present location... One could have sworn that one was dozing off to sleep at Wangshu Inn not a moment ago... ｜ 话说此地是何处，本仙明明刚在望舒客栈安安稳稳地睡下…
- We have heard that aristocrats are most magnanimous. ｜ 听说贵族向来宽宏大量。
- Allow me to explain. Not long ago, we received a commission concerning a theft by Treasure Hoarders at Komore Teahouse. ｜ 是这样的，不久前我们接到委托，木漏茶室遭到了盗宝团的偷窃。
- Well, seeing how interested you are, come see me after the performance, while our troupe is resting. ｜ 既然小可莉这么感兴趣，晚些时候等我们戏班子休息了，可以再来找我。
- And speaking of tea, let's have some! ｜ 我们也去喝杯茶吧。

- It was so grand and awe-inspiring... Pictures of the city simply don't do it any justice. ｜ 它的壮观与宏伟，比画片上展现的要强出千百倍。
- Please get ready again, and we shall give it another go. ｜ 您再准备准备，我们再来一次吧。
- Xudong and I thought she was just saying it. However, she left a note in the camp today and actually went looking for him. ｜ 我和旭东都以为这家伙只是说说，没想到她今天在营地里留了一封信，真的跑去找那个大叔了。
- I'll be frank, It seems to me that the one thing they do do, is do their best not to do anything at all. ｜ 我说实话，他们唯一的工作，就是尽可能不产生任何工作。

- Well, I don't know either! I've just heard that we're a very young race — we've only been around for something over four hundred years. ｜ 我也不知道！以前只听说过我们美露莘是很年轻的种族，诞生至今也只有四百多年的历史。

- When "Cocouik"'s energy is fully charged, a powerful beam can be shot at the Abyss. This beam is highly effective against evil dragons corroded by the Abyss.\nGuide "Cocouik" to attack fell dragons with its beam, and make timely use of Shields to block the fireballs fired by the dragons and accumulate energy. ｜ 当「绿松石」身上的能量完全充盈时，便能发出对深渊特攻的强力光束。这种光束能够对受深渊浸染的恶龙造成有效的打击。\n引导「绿松石」用光束攻击魔龙，并及时利用护盾抵挡恶龙发出的火球，便能积累下方的蓄力值。
- If you follow the route that he took last night, you're sure to find his <color=#00E1FFFF>key</color> eventually. ｜ 只要循着怀尔德先生昨晚上走过的路线，一定能够找到他的<color=#00E1FFFF>钥匙</color>。

- Restores 100 Stamina. ｜ 恢复100点体力。
- About Charlotte ｜ 关于夏洛蒂…
- And if that wasn't enough, here you are purposefully using their awkward way of speaking just to put on an act? Don't you care for the feelings of us ordinary folk? ｜ 不避讳就算了，还故意用家族那别扭的说话方式装模作样。我会觉得，这是不在乎我们普通人的感受。
- We Pari may be regarded as being one in body and mind with the land. Were it not for my presence, you would find moving ahead most treacherous. ｜ 吾辈花灵与这片大地可以说是一体同心，要不是有我在尔等可是寸步难行啊。
- Ah, I see. I'll use the evidence to rescue my daughter! ｜ 对，我可以用那些信物把我的孩子换回来！

- Later, Herblord and I defected together, and she most likely died too. Or perhaps, the one amongst us who fought to the last never submitted, and only heard news of us afterward. ｜ 后来，我与药君一同变节，她大抵也死了。或许当一切结束后，我们中战斗到最后的那位始终没有屈服，而她在那时才得知了我们的消息。

- Wait, why are these Treasure Hoarders and bandits also here? ｜ 怎么盗宝团和强盗也来啦！

- Oh, new faces? Who are these two? Friends, or customers? ｜ 这两个人，没见过呢。是新朋友？还是客人？

- We were actually learning about the Eight Adepts earlier, but we never found out who the Three Beasts of Tao Dou were. ｜ 说起来，八奇里的「桃都三怪」，我都还不知道是谁呢。
- Look, there's a pool just over there. Once we've got you cleaned up, we can come right back and keep playing! ｜ 你瞧，那个水塘离这里不远，洗好了之后，我们能马上回来接着玩。
- Eek! It's the Corps of Thirty!? Why are they here? ｜ 噫！是三十人团！为什么这里会有三十人团！
- So I've got to work hard and play to my strengths, so I can become the fastest warrior in the Stadium one day! ｜ 所以我要学有所长，继续加油，早日成为竞技场里跑得最快的战士！
- At the end of each puzzle, you're rewarded with... ｜ 如今呈现在他们面前的是…
- Huh? What fact? ｜ 欸？什么事实？
- Hey, c'mon you two, loosen up a little. The theft was nothing more than a simple misunderstanding. Besides, everyone has something they do not wish others to see. ｜ 好啦，你们两个就不要板着脸了，失窃这件事说到底只是一场误会，而且，每个人都会有不希望被其他人看到的一面。
- This is... a Rainbow Rose. ｜ …这是…虹彩蔷薇。
- And so the girl continued her journey deeper into the forest. But what she found there was not a lamp, but a mage glowing with fire. ｜ 女孩得以前往密林深处。那里没有所谓的明灯，却等待着一位火红的魔女。
- I need to strengthen this rod further... ｜ 唔，还得再加固一下这根鱼竿…
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- Uh, let's talk over there. ｜ 我们到边上说吧。
- Increases CRIT Rate by <color=#99FFFFFF>16%</color> and increases Normal ATK SPD by <color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color>. Additionally, Normal and Charged Attacks hits on opponents have a <color=#99FFFFFF>50%</color> chance to trigger a vacuum blade that deals <color=#99FFFFFF>100%</color> of ATK as DMG in a small AoE. This effect can occur no more than once every 2s. ｜ 暴击率提升<color=#99FFFFFF>16%</color>，普通攻击速度提升<color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color>。此外，普通攻击与重击命中敌人时，有<color=#99FFFFFF>50%</color>概率触发真空刃，在小范围内造成额外<color=#99FFFFFF>100%</color>攻击力的伤害。该效果每2秒至多触发一次。
- Everything's fine. If I had to complain about anything, it's that no one's got time to play cards with me... But now that I think about it, I'm at work right now myself. ｜ 一切都好，就是没什么人有空和我打牌…哦，不过转念一想，我现在也还在工作中呢。
- When active character's HP is more than 50%, ATK is decreased by 25%. ｜ 当前场上角色的生命值高于50%时，攻击力降低25%。
- On hit, Normal or Charged Attacks increase ATK and DEF by <color=#99FFFFFF>6%</color> for 6s. Max 4 stacks. This effect can only occur once every 0.5s. ｜ 普通攻击和重击命中后，攻击力和防御力提高<color=#99FFFFFF>6%</color>。该效果持续6秒，最多叠加4层，每0.5秒只能触发一次。
- Hmm... Traveler? Paimon? Why am I here? Do either of you know? ｜ 唔…旅行者？派蒙？我为什么会在这里，你们有什么头绪吗？
- Hey, mister dragon! I brought you some food. You must be hungry? ｜ 你好呀，大龙龙。我给你带了些吃的，你应该饿了吧？
- <color=#00E1FFFF>Head east and climb up the hill</color>, and you will find the camp of the Eclipse tribe. According to the records, they are rigid followers of Shamanic traditions. They do not have our adventurous, mold-breaking spirit! ｜ <color=#00E1FFFF>向东顺着谷地上坡</color>能找到「黑日族」的营地。根据记载，是崇尚萨满传统的部落。根本没有冒险家打破循规蹈矩的冒险精神！

- Place in the lower slot ｜ 放置于下方
- A change in hairstyle is a change in mood. Come to me if you need a change! ｜ 换发型就是换心情，记得来找我哦！
- Thank you. I'll finish up my fries while they're gone. ｜ 谢谢你。我都看见了，趁着这群紫金渔鸥不在，我得赶紧把薯条吃完了。
- I'm always telling the cats in the tavern that the chairs get tired from working all the time, so they shouldn't use them to sharpen their claws. ｜ 我经常教育店里的猫猫们，说椅子们干活已经很辛苦了，不要在它们腿上磨爪子。
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。

- Startled Treasure Hoarder ｜ 惊慌的盗宝团
- If you're interested, you can go talk with them. They tend to talk a lot of nonsense, but they aren't exactly bad. ｜ 你要是感兴趣，可以去找他们聊聊天。那两个家伙废话多，人倒是没多坏。
- #Please keep an eye on her in the future, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #到时也请你对她多关照些了，{NICKNAME}。
- ...I suppose it's just the price of becoming a great youkai. ｜ …可能这就是成为大妖怪的代价吧。
- Well! Either way, my dictionary has been further refined, and we've obtained more evidence to support my thesis that harmonious coexistence between human and hilichurl kind is viable. ｜ 哼哼，我的词典工作又前进了一大步！人类能与丘丘人和平共存的论据又增加了！
- With the reputation of the Adventurers' Guild and the performance of the Sumeru branch at stake, it's in our best interest to assign this commission to the adventurer with the highest completion rate over the past few years... ｜ 于是从冒险家协会信誉与须弥分会业绩的角度，我希望可以委托给近些年委托完成率最高的冒险家…
- Hehe, Kshahrewar researchers wouldn't worry about that. How nice... ｜ 呵呵，妙论派的人就不用考虑这些事，真好呢…
- Please reconsider... *gasp* Think about it... Imagine what the Eternal Oasis will bring us... An infinite future, fertile fields, and endless opportunities... ｜ 请你再多想想吧…咳咳…「永恒绿洲」能够为我们带来什么…无穷的未来…肥沃的田野，新兴的机会…
- You just wanted all of Curve's research materials, didn't you! ｜ 不就是关于曲线的研究资料吗！
- After Lord Xbalanque entered the Sacred Flame, Ahpub's misplaced trust in the tyrant Och-Kan led him to accept a request from the latter, and he wound up leading an army to attack the innocent Children of Echoes. ｜ 希巴拉克大人归火后，阿霍布因为太过信任暴君奥奇坎，主动接受了他的请求，率兵前去讨伐无辜的回声之子。
- Another one of the big cages has a problem with the door! So many accidents, one after the other... This is nuts! ｜ 又有个大笼子的门出了问题！事故还能连着来的？真见鬼了！
- Yes. It seems like this wasn't the Treasure Hoarders after all. ｜ 嗯，看来很可能不是盗宝团干的。
- This should be the Mikage Furnace. ｜ 这里就是「御影炉心」了吧。
- Summer Night's Finale ｜ 夏祭终末
- Corner lamp stands reset and activated: #1#/%1% ｜ 复位并激活角落的灯台：#1#/%1%
- "Don't be fooled by their calm nature and their preference for being sedentary in the springs. They can be quite the slow starters when it comes to new friends." ｜ 「别看鳍游龙性格平和，喜欢待在温泉里一动不动，对于新朋友，它们可是相当慢热的。」
- Oh no! Sucrose's lab equipment! I should go help her carry it! ｜ 啊！砂糖小姐的实验器材！我得去帮忙搬运才行！
- Talk to Paimon ｜ 与派蒙对话
- I'll give you more details on the final battle, and then I hope to hear your verdict. ｜ 我会讲解最终决战的事，希望在那时能得到你的答案。
- I see, I see. Well, do you have any thoughts on where he might be right now? ｜ 嗯嗯，那你觉得他现在可能在哪里呢？
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 3 ｜ 好感等级达到3后开启
- But if I don't retrieve my "Active Odor Imitating Bait," all the effort I made will have been in vain! And hiring a professional diver costs far too much. I have to do something... ｜ 可是，如果不取回断线的「气息模拟主动诱饵」，之前的努力就全都白费了！雇佣专业的潜水员又实在太贵了，总得想个办法…
- But Sir, don't you think we should've brought a few more ships if we wanted to haul all this back to Remuria? ｜ 但是，要想把这些宝藏全都运回雷穆利亚的话，无论如何都得让上面再多派几艘船来啊。
- I do not understand. Previous lives do not exist. ｜ 不能理解。前世并不存在。

- When the Jadeplume Terrorshroom is hit by <color=#FFE14BFF>Electro attacks</color> and Catalyze reactions, it will accumulate Activation. When it is hit by Pyro attacks, it will lose Activation progress. When it accumulates sufficient Activation, it will enter an <color=#FFE14BFF>Activated state</color>. An activated Jadeplume Terrorshroom will unleash more fearsome attacks until it becomes exhausted. When it is not Activated, the Jadeplume Terrorshroom can be put into a Burning state via the use of <color=#FFE14BFF>Pyro</color>, which will cause it to become Scorched. It will then spread spores around to create Fungi in an attempt to escape this status. ｜ 翠翎恐蕈承受<color=#FFE14BFF>雷元素攻击</color>与激化反应时，会积累「活性化」状态；受到火元素攻击，「活性化」则会减少。在「活性化」状态积累满后，将进入<color=#FFE14BFF>活化状态</color>。活化状态的翠翎恐蕈会进行更加猛烈的攻击，直到力竭。\n不处于活化状态时，若翠翎恐蕈因为<color=#FFE14BFF>火元素</color>陷入燃烧状态，则变得枯焦，会向四周散播孢子，产生蕈兽以摆脱这种状态。

- If the laws of Fontaine cannot ensure that they receive the punishment they deserve, then I will. Whatever your opinion, I will continue doing what I believe to be the right thing. ｜ 并且枫丹的律法尚未给与他们应得的惩罚，我无法原谅…不管你们怎么说，我会做我认为正确的事。
- All you ever did was love me, same goes for mom and dad. I've always known that, and I feel terrible, because I really did want to get along as a family. ｜ 你对我的爱，爸爸妈妈对我的爱，我都非常理解，我很对不起你们，我真的很想和你们好好相处。

- In your dreams, I won't lose! Let's start! ｜ 小看我！来就来…我才不会输呢！

- "It's a headache to argue with the impulsive. Anyway, where's your own budget? Don't tell me you're spending all your Akademiya subsidies on such nonsense." ｜ 「和血气上脑的人辩论真是头痛…话说回来，你自己的预算哪去了？别告诉我你把教令院的补贴都花在这种无聊的事情上了。」

- A birch bedside table that can commonly be found in Mondstadt. It is quite light and handy, and makes for easy cleaning.\nAlthough the space within its two drawers is not great, it is more than enough to store a few copies of "The Boar Princess" or other children's books, which can then be used as bedtime story material. ｜ 以「桦木」制作，蒙德常见的床头柜，较为轻巧，便于打扫卫生死角。\n虽说两个抽屉的容量不大，但存放几本「野猪公主」这样的童话书，当成孩子们的睡前读物，完全不成问题。

- Let's get out of here, and quick. ｜ 我们赶紧离开这里吧。
- Ah! There are roses growing here! ｜ 啊，这里居然长了蔷薇！
- Yeah... but for now, it's more important for her to rest and recover. ｜ 嗯，不过对她来说，还是养病最要紧。

- Next, when you're inside the dreamscape, you just need to follow the instructions given in the file to find the anomalous aspects related to the patient in question. Correct them, leave the dream, and that's that. ｜ 接下来只需要根据资料中的指示，找到梦中与病人有关的扭曲异常之处，纠正它们，再离开梦境就可以了。
- Hey! Mouthy as always, huh!? ｜ 喂——！你这家伙，会不会说话呀！
- If you need any help, just call my name. If not, I'll... I'll be reading a book — over there. Mm. ｜ 需要我帮忙的话，就叫我的名字，如果不需要，我…我就在那边看书，嗯。

- The records said he was cold and decisive. Like The Captain, he was formidable in battle, but the two upheld very different ideas of justice. ｜ 在故事的记载中，他虽和「队长」一样实力强大，但冷血又果断，践行的完全是另一种形式的正义。
- It looks like it's for opening a cage from a camp below a hot air balloon somewhere... But would someone really be kept in a cage like that? ｜ 看上去是打开某处热气球下营地的笼子所用…真的会有人被关在这样的笼子里吗？
- The grass will sprout from the ground again, and the withered trees will grow new leaves. If you have to know why, it's because life will always overcome death. ｜ 小草会重新从土地中钻出来，那些枯萎的大树会再次长出树叶。要问为何的话，因为「生」一定会战胜「死」。
- Really? You don't think so? Paimon sure does... ｜ 是嘛，你觉得不像啊，我觉得还是挺像的呢…
- A common bird feather. Experts use it to practice strength control, while rookies use it to make fans. ｜ 随处可见的鸟类落毛，高手用来练习力道，新手则用来制成扇子。
- Ah, it's you. Welcome. ｜ 是你呀，欢迎你来。
- It is a kind of crossbow turret, installed on Mt. Tianheng by an adeptus in the distant past. An early mechanical device. ｜ 「归终机」是远古仙人在天衡山上架设的一种弩炮，属于机关术产物的一种。
- A bottle containing Little Meng's various troubles. You wonder what's inside... ｜ 塞着小蒙烦恼的漂流瓶，不知道里面到底写着什么内容…
- They've been outside waiting for you the whole time while you were asleep. Shall we at least go and show our faces? ｜ #你睡觉的时候，{M#他们}{F#她们}一直在外面守着，出去看看{M#他们}{F#她们}吧？
- I don't know what I'd do without you guys... if not for you, I'd probably still be locked up in that cage... ｜ 这次多亏了你们，否则，我可能还在笼子里关着呢…
- Traverse the mountains of Sumeru, overcome danger, and seek inspiration.\nThe mercenaries of the Eremites are deeply ingrained in the memories of many children from Sumeru. ｜ 游历须弥山野，战胜危险，寻找灵感。\n许多须弥小朋友的记忆里，都会有一位镀金旅团佣兵的身影。
- Merieux! Hahaha, get over here and let's have another drink! There's a few things I need you to glance over for me... ｜ 哈哈，梅里埃！来来来，我们再去喝一杯！有些东西还得找你过目呢…

- During the Lantern Rite, the ingenious Yuan Rong invites one and all to try the Shadow Lantern that she has invented. Rotate the Shadow Lantern correctly to view the marvelous image and solve the lantern riddle, and you will obtain the corresponding rewards... ｜ 海灯节期间，别具匠心的元蓉正请街坊邻居们试玩她发明的「藏影灯」。以正确的方式转动「藏影灯」后，方可看到奇妙的影像，解开其中的「灯谜」，并获取相应的奖励…
- I can sympathize with your unhappiness at home, but after you ran away, you ended up at the theater and became one of us. ｜ 我非常能理解家庭给你带来的不幸，但在离开那个环境之后，你来到了剧场，成为了我们的一员。

- "We still have a lot of time with each other. We can explore the vastness of the forest, the world, and the future together." ｜ 「我们还有很长的时间，一起重新认识森林的大、世界的大、未来的无限。」
- Later, I was the one who fused the strongest Khvarena collected there into five Great Songs, which I used to purify the land. ｜ 后来，为了净化地上的污秽，我才将聚集在此的灵光中最强大的那些融为五个「灵光绝唱」。
- The experiences and decisions of the protagonist, Clio, are all modeled after your own. Naturally, this makes you eminently suited to playing the leading role. ｜ 剧中主角柯莉欧的经历与选择，都像以你为模板创作而生，你自然也是最适合的演员之一。
- Then, I won't take up any more of your time. Good luck with your endeavors. ｜ 那我便不多耽误你的时间，预祝一切顺利。
- ...Oh, but perhaps not books. ｜ …哦当然，书本可能不行。
- There's no point butting into someone else's family matters. ｜ 别人的家务事，劝了也没用。

- "Hahaha! I consider cards a form of battle as well, so don't expect me to go easy on you, now!"\nHint: Tartaglia's deck contains a combination of Fatui characters and Event Cards that allows him to unleash a high-intensity offensive during the early stages of the match. ｜ 「哈哈哈，牌局也是一种战斗，我可不会手下留情哦！」\n【提示】达达利亚的牌组由「愚人众」角色牌和大量的「事件」牌构成，能在前期打出强大的进攻节奏。
- *sigh* That's me, Liben, for you! Only the grandest peaks and deepest troughs of life! Anyway, I'm not going back there — not for a while at least. ｜ 唉！大起大落是我立本的人生常态了，反正短时间内，我可不会再去啦。
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- According to Momoyo, you can return to the safehouse now to see how the work is proceeding. ｜ 按照百代的说法，现在应该可以回到安全屋，看看她的工作情况如何了。

- Huh? What happened to them!? ｜ 欸？！怎么会…
- Borenka ｜ 鲍连卡
- But it seems like the path still hasn't been unlocked... Perhaps there are other lights? ｜ 不过看上去道路还是没能解锁…或许还有别的灯？
- Sorry... Sorry, my emotions are all over the place right now. I've been waiting for this day to come for so long. ｜ 对不起…对不起…我的情绪有点激动，我等这一天真的太久了。
- CD|{param7:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param7:F1}秒
- When I was a lad, I too had the sea as my home, and I sailed everywhere on a patrol boat, even up to the border with Natlan. I'd go out there again if I could! ｜ 我年轻的时候也以大海为家，跟着巡视船四处漂，连纳塔边境都去过…真想再出海看看哟！
- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Silent Testimony." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含的旋律为「寂静的证言」。
- I think she's trying to tell you that some idiot stole something from the Institute, and that thing might explode at any moment. ｜ 老大。我想这位小姐想表达的是，有一个混蛋从科学院里偷走了一个东西，而那个东西随时可能爆炸。
- A lovely teacup. Perhaps it was once used by people enjoying a leisurely afternoon together. ｜ 精致的茶杯。或许曾与他人共同度过悠闲的午后时光吧。
- And then this big guy came along. Not that he helped much either... ｜ 后来大家伙也找过来了，虽然也没帮上什么忙…
- Even the scariest Eremites know that work comes before play. If you don't believe me... Perhaps I should ask them to teach you? ｜ 就连最可怕的镀金旅团都知道先苦后甜的道理，不信我叫他们来教教你？
- Oh, most definitely! We'll take any guidance that you can give! ｜ 当然需要！来自芙宁娜女士的指点，求之不得！
- Welcome to the Xinyue Kiosk. May I have the table number of your reservation? ｜ 欢迎来到「新月轩」，客官您预定的是几号桌呢？
- Aeval ｜ 爱贝尔
- Food ｜ 食物
- Due to the war, confusion, the pressure from the Shogunate...it's all too much, and many people have considered giving up. ｜ 因为战争、因为迷惘、因为幕府的压力…压力太多太重，让人不得不考虑放弃。
- You've come to the right person. My family was in the mining business in the past. As a result, I have the ability to discern the quality of ore with a single glance, which earned me the moniker "Pan Guan'er." ｜ 你算是问对人了，我家以前是做矿石生意的，因此我一眼就能分辨出矿石的好坏，所以得了个「判官儿」的外号。
- "The crane once returned, and once, she was spurned, she turned, and left alone; now, she might be found, with friends all around, to whom she is bound — a home." ｜ 「彼时鹤归，茫茫天地无依靠，孤身离去。今日再会，新朋旧友坐满堂，共聚此时。」
- (Test) Have you found the messages in a bottle yet? 3 ｜ (TEST)你找到哪些漂流瓶了嘛3？
- Who are you reporting to right now? ｜ 你现在的上级是谁？
- I was going to suggest that you join forces with the Corps of Thirty in this case, however... as I'm sure you've already heard from Alhaitham and Kaveh, the Temple of Silence is involved. ｜ 我本想建议你们与三十人团一起行动，但…相信你们已经听艾尔海森和卡维说了，事关缄默之殿。
- Let's get down to business! ｜ 该干活啦！
- Just what exactly is being hidden in this saying...? ｜ （Test）在这个「传说」里，究竟隐藏着什么秘密呢…

- Rest assured that I will bring these criminals to justice. ｜ 请放心，我会尽快将犯人抓捕归案。
- *gulp* ...Phwoar, this is the good stuff, it is great... ｜ 咕噜…噗哈，好酒，真是好…
- That makes sense! Esnoir's wish is to see this lamp hung high for all to see, right? ｜ 喔！很有道理，毕竟埃斯诺尔先生的心愿，就是把这盏灯挂得高高的，让所有人都能看见呢。
- Traveler? I've heard stories about you. I didn't think I'd be saved by <color=#00E1FFFF>the one I'm here to meet</color>. ｜ 旅行者？我好像听过你的情报，没想到被<color=#00E1FFFF>接头人</color>救了一命。

- Is that such a bad thing? ｜ 不也挺好嘛。

- See you. May wisdom keep you from the wrong paths. ｜ 再见，愿智慧让你免入歧途。
- #The seed got dug up by {REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}, had its nutrients stolen by flying insects, and was even disturbed by some monsters barging in... ｜ #种子又是被{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}挖出来，又是被飞虫偷取养分，还被怪物「轰隆隆」地打扰了一番…

- ... ｜ ……

- Phew! Wow, that was close... ｜ 哈啊，真是好险…

- You flatter me. ｜ 过奖过奖。

- But Paimon still doesn't get it. How could something unreliable like people's beliefs be turned into a stable power source for these machines? ｜ 可我还是不怎么能理解，信仰这种玄乎的东西，究竟是怎么被转变成这些机器中的能量的啊…
- "Anyway, we're already here, so why worry about all that? Just forget it all and let yourself melt into the hot spring... That's what vacations are all about." ｜ 「不过，来都来了，还在乎那些干什么。把一切事情都忘掉，然后融化在温泉里，这才是度假的意义嘛。」
- So that's called a Fravashi Tree, huh? But where are the residual Pari... Paimon can't see them at all! ｜ 哦哦，原来是叫「灵谷木」吗？不过你说残灵…明明什么都看不到嘛！

- Huh, why isn't he here yet... ｜ 唔，怎么还没有来…

- Thankfully, the bottom was pretty soft, so I lay down and took a nap before getting up to continue on my merry way. ｜ 里面倒是挺软的，我躺着睡了一会儿才起来继续赶路。

- What sort of task? And what kind of test? ｜ 谕示？测试？
- We just have to learn how to beetle fight and help him beat his opponents, right? Sounds simple enough! ｜ 反正学学斗虫，帮他打败对手就行了吧？听起来也不复杂！
- Well, that was quick. ｜ 真是果断。
- Hmm... allow me a moment to reminisce. ｜ 唔…待本皇女思量片刻。
- It's not that simple, y'know! What do you mean "need only penetrate the layers of rock above us"... How do we do that? ｜ 不要说的那么简单啦！「只需要穿过岩层」…要怎么才能做到啦！

- It's... burning a bit. ｜ 像是…在烧。
- Sorry, I don't know who you're talking about. Are you sure they're an inmate here? ｜ 不好意思，你说的这个人我不认识，确定是这里的犯人吗？
- Miss Lisa mentioned in the past that there will be consequences for breaking the library rules... ｜ 丽莎小姐说过，如果有人违反了图书馆的规定，就必须要受到惩罚…
- B—But that's my private life, isn't it? ｜ 可…可这也是我的私生活吧…
- About Faruzan ｜ 关于珐露珊…

- The best way to understand someone is by spending time with them, whether they're an old friend or a new acquaintance... ｜ 无论是相识已久的好友，还是初次邂逅的某人，了解他们的最好方法，或许就是与之共同度过一段时光…

- Argh! YOU again! You've scared all my pigeons off... again! ｜ 哇啊！又是你！鸽子又全都飞走了！

- My dad told me that when I was little, they gathered all of the most learned elders in Natlan and asked them to come up with a plan for managing my Abyss condition. They all disagreed on the best approach, and it turned into a drawn-out debate. At some point, Citlali quietly left the room, but they were all too busy arguing to notice. When she got back, she put some food and wine down in front of her, ignored everyone, and just started eating... the table suddenly went very quiet.\nJust by looking at her, you'd never know how much seniority and experience she has. ｜ 听老爹说，当年他们请教了全纳塔最富学识的长老们，来为我制定控制深渊影响的方案。当时他们各执己见、争论不休，都没人留意到茜特菈莉一声不吭地走出了门。等她回来，只见她把酒和菜往自己面前一放，自顾自地吃了起来…一时间全桌人鸦雀无声。\n光看外表，还真难想象她有这么高的资历跟辈分。

- A simple but very practical tool. A movable light Brightwood arm is fixed on a heavy mount made of Adhigama Wood. By swinging the arm, fishermen can cast their nets into the river to catch fish that are swimming downstream. The design was based on theories devised by Vahumana and Amurta researchers. The mesh size is designed such that only adult fish will be caught. This prevents overfishing and its destructive effects on fishing resources. ｜ 构造简洁但极为实用的机关，由重量较大的「证悟木」底座和相对轻巧的「辉木」摇架组成，通过旋转摇架，即可将渔网置入河中，捕获顺流而下的游鱼。该机关的设计得到了因论派和生论派学者的理论支持，渔网的尺寸恰到好处，确保捕捉的鱼均已成年，从而防止过度捕捞导致渔业资源枯竭的问题。

You'll be well paid. ｜ 求助：\n掌柜的说，客栈里的菜色有点少了，要我再研究研究新菜。\n那么多食材里面，火腿算是我比较熟悉的了，所以我想用火腿来做点新菜试试。\n但试做新菜，我备着的那些火腿只怕是不够用的，如果有人愿意帮忙的话，就再带<color=#3399CC>两份火腿</color>过来吧，报酬少不了。

- I heard that the Teacher was summoned back to Snezhnaya, but that the Watatsumi Island operation is still going ahead. ｜ 我听说老师突然接到命令回至冬国了，但海祇岛的计划还要继续进行。
- Hmph. He's been trapped for so long that it seems he's forgotten how to hold a decent conversation. How ridiculous. Let's go. We'll leave the stage to this person who'd rather save face than save his own life. ｜ …哼，被困这么久，已经不懂得谈吐的礼仪了。真是可笑，各位，我们走，把舞台留给这死要面子的人。

- A unique wooden-framed shed exclusive to the "Children of Echoes." Equipped with a notably sturdy roof, its design is akin to that used in the "Macuahuitl Workshop."\nInitially introduced by Apoxpalon, the proprietor of the "Macuahuitl Workshop," such sheds aimed to address the problem of excessive shop floor expanse. However, just as he often says — "Things in this world are often a mixture of fortune and woes," there are pros and cons to this. The good news is that this shed indeed saves space effectively! The bad news is that its difficulty in disassembly and high manufacturing cost have thus far hindered its widespread application... ｜ 「回声之子」独有的木质框架棚屋，配备了承重能力可观的屋顶，其设计与「战棒工坊」所用的铺面形制相同。\n最初，这类棚屋由「战棒工坊」的老板阿布帕隆引入，旨在解决店铺占地面积过大的问题。只不过，正如他常说的那句话——「世间之事，总是福祸相依」。好消息是，这种棚屋的确有效节省了空间！但坏消息是，棚屋不易拆卸且制造成本太高，因此尚不能被广泛应用…

Additionally, Nightsoul-aligned Elemental attacks seem to be able to destroy Void Wards with greater ease... ｜ 深渊的力量降临此世，所展露的拒绝一切的姿态，受虚界力护罩保护的对象在护罩存在期间无法受到任何伤害。只有<color=#FFE14BFF>利用元素攻击到一定次数</color>以后才可突破其防御。此外，具有夜魂性质的元素攻击似乎可以更有效率地将之击破…

- A small sample that has been sliced off in order to help you select the Noctilucous Jade you will be using to make implements for the Rite of Parting.\nAn ancient Liyue proverb goes: "Noctilucous Jade shines brightest in the flames," meaning that high-quality Noctilucous Jade will shine with a bright and pure azure light when exposed to high temperatures. It has also come to symbolize heroes showing their true mettle in times of crisis. ｜ 切下来的小片样品，用以甄选制作「送仙典仪」所需器物的夜泊石。\n璃月古谚有云，「夜泊烁光须火炼」，意思是优质的夜泊石在高温下会发出明亮清澈的蓝光，用来比喻英杰在逆境中会大放光彩。

Seems like it has been starving for quite some time... ｜ 膨膨兽试探性地嗅了嗅你手中的食物，又警惕地看了你一眼。感受到你并没有什么敌意，它小心翼翼地从上面咬下了一块…\n…一开始显得有些犹豫，但随后便狼吞虎咽地吃下了你递过去的所有食物，看上去似乎真的已经饿了很久…

- Candace, who has heterochromatic eyes, serves as the guardian of Aaru Village.\nCandace always shows the greatest kindness to all travelers visiting the village, and she will not pursue an inadvertent faux pas so long as that person corrects themselves in time. In Candace's view, the village rules are the most important thing. So long as these boundaries are respected, anyone can be allowed to rest in Aaru Village.\nBut woe betide those who regard this tolerance as weakness. Those who try to do anything illegal in Aaru Village will definitely pay the price.\nBy then, they will find that Candace's lance and shield truly are the most frightening of weapons.\nThe scion of Al-Ahmar, a member of desert folk, the Guardian... Candace, burdened as she is with multiple identities, also bears the eternal responsibility of guarding Aaru Village.\n"This village only welcomes those who can follow the rules." ｜ 拥有异色眼瞳的坎蒂丝担任着阿如村「守护者」一职。\n对一切来访阿如村的旅人，坎蒂丝总会展现最大的善意，而对某些人无心的失礼之举，只要对方改正及时，她也不会追究。\n在坎蒂丝眼中，村里的规矩最为重要。只要尊重这些边界，任何人都能被允许在阿如村内休憩。\n可若是将这份宽容视为软弱，那么，妄图到阿如村行不法之事的人都会付出最为沉重的代价。\n到那时，他们就会发现，坎蒂丝的枪与盾是最可怕的武器。\n阿赫玛尔之嗣，沙漠之民，守护者…背负重重身份的坎蒂丝担负着守护阿如村这一永恒职责。\n「这座村子，只欢迎守序之人。」

- That's a fair point. You just need some reassurance, right? In that case... I can let you in on a little secret. ｜ 这句话倒是没错，你们要是心里没底，我可以透露点内幕给你们。
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Arena Effect</color>\nThere will be an Aura within the arena. If any of your own party members spends over <color=#FFCC33>5s</color> in the Aura, the Aura will be consumed and all your own party members have their ATK increased by <color=#FFCC33>100%</color> for the next 10s, and their Normal and Charged Attacks release a shockwave on hit that deals AoE DMG. Shockwaves can be triggered up to once every <color=#FFCC33>15s</color> in this way.\nA new Aura will appear 10s after the previous Aura has been consumed and your party members have gained the aforementioned effects. A total of 3 additional Auras will appear during this challenge.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenged Opponents</color> ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【关卡效果】</color>\n擂台中存在光环。自己队伍中任意角色在光环中连续滞留超过<color=#FFCC33>5</color>秒后，将消耗光环，使接下来10秒内，队伍中所有自己的角色的攻击力提升<color=#FFCC33>100</color>%，并在角色的普通攻击与重击命中时，将释放冲击波，造成范围伤害。每<color=#FFCC33>15</color>秒至多通过这种方式释放一次冲击波。\n消耗光环获得上述效果后，10秒后，将会出现新的光环。在挑战中，至多额外产生3个光环。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【挑战敌人】</color>

- A wooden easel of unknown origin that has a simple, unassuming appearance.\nThanks to its excellent design and workmanship, this easel is extremely stable, making it a perfect fit for both painting and display. When you stop in front of it, marvelous and heretofore unknown inspiration fills your mind, almost as if you had been possessed by some mysterious power... ｜ 来历不明的神秘木质画架，有着朴实无华的外表。\n得益于它优良的设计及考究的做工，这种画架拥有极佳的稳定性，无论用于绘画还是展示，都十分合适。在其面前驻足之时，似乎会被神秘的力量所影响，并迸发出某些前所未有的奇妙灵感…
- She was a hero to the very end. Even though her body was at its breaking point, she showed no pain or sorrow. ｜ 尽管她伤痕累累，也依然像一位英雄一样，到最后都没有露出过痛苦或悲伤的神情。
- The flow of experience within the ley lines has been notably great of late...\nUse the power of Original Resin to cause Blossoms of Revelation to bloom brilliantly, and bring forth the experiences of your forerunners into the world. ｜ 近期在地脉中，翻涌着格外丰厚的经验与记忆…\n注入「原粹树脂」的力量，让启示之花盛放，赢得故人珍贵的经验吧。

- Eric can't hold on any longer... We had no choice but to give up.\nI'll leave this notebook here. Maybe this treasure is destined for someone else.\n\nAs you may have noticed, the mechanism installed by the door needs someone operating it constantly. Otherwise, the other mechanisms cannot be operated.\nBut there's a catch...\n<color=#FFE14BFF>The person operating the mechanism by the door takes on an enormous risk</color>.\nIf the other mechanisms are operated in the wrong sequence, that person will face...\n\nOne other word of advice:\n<color=#FFE14BFF>The number of torches does not indicate the sequence of operation</color>... We made that mistake, and paid a painful price.\nPerhaps... <color=#FFE14BFF>the order has something to do with the position of the torches on the ground</color>?\nWhat is the answer?\nOh, how I wish to know...\nBut Eric physically can't take any more... ｜ 埃里克实在撑不下去了…我们不得不选择放弃。\n这本笔记就留在这儿吧，也许宝藏在等待着更有缘的人。\n\n可能你们也发现了，门口的机关装置需要一直有人在旁边控制，其他的机关才能够操作。\n不过…代价是…\n<color=#FFE14BFF>在门口控制机关装置的人，要背负极大的风险</color>。\n一旦其余机关的操作顺序有误，那个人就会面临着…\n\n我可以给你一个忠告，\n那就是——<color=#FFE14BFF>火把的数量并非在暗示着操作顺序</color>，我们曾为这样的误解付出惨痛的代价。\n或许…<color=#FFE14BFF>顺序应该与火把在地上的位置有关</color>？\n真正的答案究竟是什么呢？\n我想知道，我也想知道啊…\n可埃里克的身体已经…
- In honor of the great heroes who died to protect Liyue, the Mingxiao Lantern's design is always based on the adeptus form of one of the heroes. ｜ 为了纪念守护璃月而死的英雄们，「明霄灯」的造型会按照英雄生前的「仙体」来设计建造。

- I'm the owner of a nearby merchant ship, and I mainly deal with import and export. ｜ 我是附近商船的船主，主要做进出口生意。
- Find the "samachurl herbal soup" ｜ 寻找「丘丘人萨满草药汤」
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- Up above Liyue Harbor, there is a floating palace held up by Plaustrite. It is known as the "Jade Chamber," and it belongs to Ningguang.\nOn a clear day, one can see almost all of Liyue Harbor from the decks outside the palace gates.\nWhenever Ningguang has important business matters to handle, she invariably comes to this floating palace. She strictly forbids anyone from accessing the premises except for her three trusted confidants. Her confidants sort through the relevant information, summarize it and hang the summaries on the wall, while Ningguang rests against the railings, enjoying the view of Liyue and quietly mulling everything over.\nShe is certain to arrive at the perfect solution before her confidants have finished adding everything to the wall. Once she has made her decision she shreds everything and throws it out of the window, creating something of a snowstorm of paper.\nThe handwriting on the shredded pieces of paper stands out like ink in the snow to all of the merchants in Liyue Harbor.\nFor they know that whenever Ningguang's shredded snow falls, a huge change is about to descend on the business community. ｜ 璃月港上空漂浮着一座以浮石驱动的飞行宫殿。那是属于凝光的产业——「群玉阁」。\n天气晴朗时，站在宫门外的甲板上，便能俯瞰璃月港大半风光。\n如要处理重大商业事务，凝光定会来到这座天上宫阁，禁止旁人出入，只允许三名心腹陪侍在旁。心腹们翻阅资料，整合文书，一旦得出成果，便把摘要贴在墙上。凝光自己则一边欣赏璃月风景，一边倚栏静思。\n墙壁被资料盖满前，凝光一定会得到最佳方案。跟着，她碾碎所有资料，将大量碎屑撒向窗外，营造一场突如其来的碎雪。\n那些纸片上的字迹，在璃月港所有商人眼中，就像雪地里的墨渍一样扎眼。\n每当这阵「碎雪」降临，璃月商界必有天翻地覆。

- Hehe, they are actually all here! I really can't thank you enough. ｜ 哇，竟然真的找回来了，谢谢你们！
- Eh? Oh, right. So, Lady Yuheng, might you have any idea why Lady Tianquan invited us to go to the Jade Chamber? ｜ 咦？啊，哦…对了，这位「玉衡」大人，你知道「天权」大人为什么要邀请我们去群玉阁吗？
- It turns out that in order to reach the mysterious island, it is necessary to have a guide, one with whom mutual trust is shared... ｜ 原来前往神秘岛的必要条件是一名可以互相托付的向导…
- Letter for Anna ｜ 给安娜姐姐的信
- Duration|{param5:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param5:F1}秒
- But didn't you say that you don't know where they are? ｜ 可你不是说，不知道它们在哪里吗？
- Before that client had even contacted me, I'd heard rumors of an exciting novel full of undiscovered secrets. Out of curiosity, I asked Cyno to take it out for me. ｜ 早在雇主联系我之前，我就听说有本藏着秘密的精彩小说，出于好奇拜托赛诺帮我借来了。
- Then without further ado, please head over to my experimental studio right away. ｜ 那事不宜迟，就请你们直接前往我的实验映影棚吧？
- Alright, here it is! Please drink it slowly. ｜ 饮料就在这里，请喝吧，喝的时候不要太着急哦。
- Yeah. ｜ 嗯。
- Looks like the marking is right on top of that mountain. Should we go have a look? Who knows, maybe we'll find something. ｜ 看起来标记的所在地就在山上，要不要去找找看？说不定会有什么发现呢。

- ... ｜ ……
- "Do you still remember the Uyuu Restaurant?" ｜ 「还记得『乌有亭』吗？」
- I can't believe "the trapped Aranara" does exist... ｜ 居然真的存在「受困的兰那罗」…
- Alright, go well. Come again soon! ｜ 嗯，慢走，有机会多回来呀。

- Restores 9% of Max HP to the selected character and regenerates 260 HP every 5s for 30s. ｜ 立即为选中的角色恢复生命值上限的9%，并在之后的30秒内，每5秒恢复260点生命值。
- Guyun Stone Forest... That's a long way, I will probably need to hire a boat to get there. ｜ 孤云阁…嘿，这也太远了，估计我得雇艘船过去。
- I want to become a guard like him, but I'm not strong enough yet, so I'm learning in secret here... ｜ 我想成为和他一样的守卫，但是还不够强大，所以想在这里偷偷学习…
- Our work's pretty tough, and risk is a constant companion, too. I haven't had a good night's sleep in several days now on account of that tea. Only now have I been able to heave a sigh of relief. ｜ 干我们这行，辛苦不说，风险也是常有的事，为了茶叶，我是好几天没睡过安稳觉了，直到现在这颗心才放下来。

- Sure! Let's go on an adventure! ｜ 没关系，和我一起冒险吧！

- ...Alright, then in that case, I'll do as you ask... ｜ …好吧，那我遵从你的意愿。

- That said, if you went there now, you'd probably encounter a rather downcast pair of brothers... ｜ 不过…现在您去那边，大概也只能看见灰头土脸的梅康顿与巴比斯兄弟吧…

- Alright, alright! Honestly, the way you're going off on me, it's like you wished you'd been there to lend him a hand... Does it mean nothing to you that I am your colleague and former classmate? ｜ 好了好了，你到底帮他还是帮我啊？我才是你的同学兼同事好不好。

- An agile and wise soul, endowed since birth with a well-maintained elegance and pride.\nThese cats are conscientious and cautious, elite hunters amongst their kind. Due to humans often delegating the vital task of defense against vermin to them, they are sometimes also called "watch-leaders" or "sheriff cats."\nHowever, life in the Realm Within is neat and orderly, with no outbreaks of ravaging pests and vermin. With nothing better to do, these jobless "sheriff cats" find renewed fulfillment in encouraging others of their kin to move and exercise. ｜ 灵巧而富有智慧的生灵，抱持着与生俱来的优雅与骄傲。\n谨慎而机警的猫咪，是猫咪中天生的精湛猎手。由于经常被人类赋予看守仓库防备鼠辈的重任，有着「警长」与「猫咪捕头」的称号。\n不过壶中洞天干净整洁，不会滋生蚊虫与鼠辈，「猫咪捕头」无事可干，清闲下来，转而敦促胖乎乎的同类运动，以转移强烈的责任感。

- The All-Star... something? ｜ 全能…什么来着？

- Such a detailed description, almost like he saw it with his own two eyes... ｜ 这么详细，简直像是他亲眼看到的一样…
- But as soon as I got back, I started hearing about all these unbelievable changes. I had made my mind up, originally, but now I'm not sure anymore... ｜ 可是我一回来，就听说了很多难以置信的变化。本来我下定了决心，但现在又不知道该怎么办了…
- Alright, then! Stop bothering me! ｜ 好了，别打扰我了！
- Well, come on now. Which adventurer in their right mind would let themselves get tied down with such a boring task, am I right? ｜ 哈哈，哪会有冒险家愿意把时间浪费在那种无聊的事情上…
- Tighnari's busy no matter where he is, huh... ｜ 提纳里不管在哪里都很忙呢…

- Everyone enjoys a normal and harmless round of hot pot... ｜ 度过了一段不同寻常的火锅时光…
- Considering the rewards that I could reap from this experience, the risk is negligible. ｜ 若是能有所获，这点风险又算得了什么呢？
- Eh? C'mon, Paimon's not like that... Nor is she some kinda disobedient pet! ｜ 我哪有很任性…不对！我可不是什么不听话的宠物狗啊！

- #So, let's not order anything that will take too long to prepare! Aside from that, and seafood, we'll take whatever other expensive dishes you have. Over to you, {NICKNAME}! ｜ #所以，需要花大把时间来熬的菜也别上了！除此以外，有什么贵就上什么吧。交给你咯，{NICKNAME}！
- Well, keep up the good work! ｜ 是嘛，那就继续加油吧！
- The Faded Castle is just through that great gate. Let us continue onward. ｜ 穿过大门就是褪色城堡了，我们继续前进吧。
- An open-air stall featuring a distinctive sign in the shape of an Iktomisaurus. Brimming with liquid, its unique design makes the store's specialty unmistakable, even from afar. This liquid, the essence of a special beverage, must be exposed to direct sunlight for a prolonged period of time before it can reach its optimal flavor. Due to space constraints within the Stadium of the Sacred Flame, merchants had nowhere else to store these containers, so they placed them on the roofs of their stalls, creating a striking visual amidst the bustling crowds. Over time, this practice became Xocolatl Beverages' defining feature and has since been incorporated into the stall's permanent branding. ｜ 安装有暝视龙造型招牌的露天店面，它的招牌十分独特，招牌内盛放的液体让人从远处就能一眼分辨出店铺的主营业务。据说，招牌上罐内的液体实际上是一种特殊饮料的原液，这种原液需要经过日光的长时间曝晒才能达到最佳风味。但由于圣火竞技场内空间有限，导致这些原液不得不被放在棚顶晾晒。这些棚顶的原液，在人潮涌动的竞技场内格外引人注目，久而久之成为了卡考苦饮店的一大特色，并最终被店主做成了特色招牌的一部分，保留至今。
- I see, that makes sense... ｜ 原来如此，那我就明白了…
- Collect the entire "The Fox in the Dandelion Sea" series. ｜ 集齐全套《蒲公英海的狐狸》。
- Brilliant Blessings ｜ 辉彩祝福
- An elemental life form created as the avatar of incredible indignation. It uses lightning attacks and its Strike Probes to <color=#FFE14BFF>lock on to its foes</color>.\nThe Strike Probes will periodically scan the nearby area and will have a <color=#FFE14BFF>more powerful Electro Ward</color> that can be breached using Elemental Reactions.\nAfter you enter the scan range of a Strike Probe, you will be locked onto. The Crackling Thunder Manifestation will then enter an enraged state in which it will attack you more often.\nYou will also be locked onto if you are hit by one of the Crackling Thunder Manifestation's attacks. ｜ 极度忿恨的雷声具象而成的特殊元素生命体，会运用雷鸣的攻击与探针<color=#FFE14BFF>锁定敌人</color>。\n探针将周期性对附近进行探测，且拥有<color=#FFE14BFF>更强的雷元素护罩</color>，可以通过元素反应将其破坏。\n进入探针的探测范围后，将被锁定，并导致「雷音权现·裂鸣」进入狂怒状态，更加频繁地发起攻击。\n遭到「雷音权现·裂鸣」攻击命中后，也将被立即锁定。
- You kidding me!? You think I'm scared of you? ｜ 一派胡言！我…我还会怕你们？
- Ask Anela some questions ｜ 询问阿妮拉
- I don't know what to tell you! I don't know! ｜ 我不知道！我什么都不知道！

- If we take care of the baddies inside, the Vasara Tree will become healthy again and thank us with a Vasoma Fruit. ｜ 我们去教训里面的坏东西。然后，莎兰树就会变好，用恒素果谢谢我们。

- Huh? You don't remember? ｜ 伊迪娅姐姐不记得吗？

- Hand over whatever you're holding. ｜ 把手里的东西交出来。
- Take your pick! They are all affordable. And rest assured my friend, I have other ways to make a fortune, hehe. ｜ 随便挑吧！价格都很便宜，放心，我赚钱的地方可不在这里，嘻嘻。
- All the Guild wants out of it is experience in solving riddles like this. That is the most important thing for adventurers. ｜ 协会想要的只是解开这些谜题的「经验」。对冒险家来说，这才是最重要的东西。

- They're gone again! What are they this time? Some kind of stone or brick? ｜ 一眨眼就又不见了！这次是变成什么了？总不会是假装成了石头砖瓦啥的吧！
- You explain to Mr. Leroy why you're here. ｜ 你们向勒鲁瓦先生说明了来意。
- Hajanad ｜ 哈贾娜德
- I used my powers to cushion our fall... Is everyone alright? ｜ 我用我的能力缓冲了一下，大家应该都没事吧？

- There's more where that came from! ｜ 夺先声！
- I doubt it. ｜ 我觉得应该不是。
- Once the Rite of Parting, of which Zhongli was both director and star, was over, the Fatui Harbinger named Signora appeared before him.\nBy prior contract, she was here to claim the Geo Archon Morax's Gnosis.\nBefore the Traveler and the two Fatui Harbingers, Zhongli related the truth that he had established a contract with the Cryo Archon.\nIn his own words, this was his final "contract to end all contracts."\nYet no matter how one looks at it, the loss of his divine ability to defend Liyue was too great a price to pay.\nEven amongst mortals, the basis of a contract is "equivalent exchange."\nAnd for the God of Contracts, who must have established countless such agreements in their long years of existence, such an important contract must have come with its benefits.\nNow, the Geo Archon has given away his Gnosis as his part of the deal.\nWhat, then, must the Cryo Archon have wagered to balance the scales? ｜ 璃月港这场由钟离自导自演的「送仙」典仪筹备完毕后，「愚人众」执行官「女士」出现在他面前。\n按照事先签订的「契约」，她前来取走岩神摩拉克斯的「神之心」。\n当着旅行者与两位「愚人众」执行官的面，钟离坦率说出了自己与「冰之神」达成交易一事。\n依他本人所说，这是在最后的时刻，所订立的「终结一切契约的契约」。\n可无论怎么看，岩之神在这场交易中付出的代价实在太多，连守护璃月港的神力都将失去…\n就算是人与人之间，交易的铁则也是「等价交换」。\n对千百年来签下千百「契约」的岩神而言，如此重要的契约，必定是有利可图才会考虑吧。\n现在，岩之神已将自己的「神之心」作为代价送出。\n冰之神究竟是押上何种筹码，才使交易的天平达到了平衡呢？
- Aren't these all super expensive? Ohh, these must be the valuable things that went missing from the island! That's it, the Nobushi must've stolen them all! ｜ 这些东西很贵吧？看来这片岛屿缺少的重要东西，就是这些宝贝！都被野伏众偷光啦！
- That's great! Then let's be off! ｜ 嗯，很好。那我们出发吧！
- Alone? That's pretty impressive! ｜ 负责照看小鳍游龙？真了不起！
- I'm not gonna play house with this petty public servant a second longer. I've got my own job to do. ｜ 不陪你的役人朋友过家家了，我也有自己的职责要做。
- Return to Scent of Spring ｜ 返回春香窑
- Your Rubicon, huh? That's pretty impressive. ｜ 是「露鼻孔盒」呀！真厉害！

- ...Actually, it's not a coincidence at all. ｜ …不，这不是什么刚好。
- Then my duty as her eternal familiar is to drag her back out of her own head and into the real world. ｜ 那把她从自我的世界里揪出来，便是我作为「永恒的眷属」的践行。
- At the end of last night... ｜ 昨晚的最后…
- Huh, what a bunch of... No, sorry. We at the Grand Narukami Shrine are most gentle indeed. Even if you should draw a slip with bad luck, you shall have a chance to turn it around. ｜ 他们还真是…不对，我们「鸣神大社」很温柔的。所以就算抽到了凶签，也会给你们转运的机会。

- Because as far as I'm concerned, the immersion method, drawing on life experiences, and imitating others are all valuable acting methods. ｜ 完全沉浸、代入生活、模仿参考…对我来说，并没有高下之分。
- When I was a child, everybody knew the tale of the Geo Lord suppressing the Chi. ｜ 在我那个年代啊，岩王爷镇压「螭」的故事，可是人尽皆知啊。
- Paimon remembers now! Rana did say you organized the search party, and brought curry along too... ｜ 啊，想起来了！拉娜说过，搜救队是你组织的！而且，还带着咖喱去…
- At the Rite of Descension in Liyue, your decision was very similar to what Dain would do... ｜ 那时在璃月，请仙典仪上，你的选择和戴因很类似…
- Using an Elemental Burst decreases the CRIT Rate of all characters in that player's party by 35% for 4s. ｜ 施放元素爆发后，该玩家队伍中的角色暴击率降低35%，持续4秒。
- Praising yourself? Really? ｜ 团长在夸奖自己耶。
- But the true issue here is my back pain! Walking from the hot springs down at the People thereof was exhausting enough, so I need able help for the next leg of my search! ｜ …不过真相是，其实是我背一直在痛！从「流泉之众」的温泉走过来已经耗尽全力了，得找个可靠的帮手啦！
- Yeah. We found this "lighting expert" called Geisert. ｜ 没错。我们找到了一个名叫热塞尔的「映影专家」。
- It has been some time since the incident. We discovered that Eroch had betrayed us, and he has been punished severely. ｜ 那件事已经过去一段时日了，我们查明是伊洛克从中作梗，他已被严厉惩办。

- Ahem... Mein Fräulein and I sensed a peculiar aura, and came here ahead of time to reunite with everyone. We weren't expecting you... Well, what I mean to say is, you arrived sooner than we expected. ｜ 啊…小姐和我察觉到某种气息，特意提前赶往此处，等待与诸位会合。没想到，诸位…诸位来得比想象中更快。

- "For the Harbingers!" ｜ 「为了执行官大人！」

Additionally, the location of nearby <color=#FFD780FF>resources unique to Natlan</color> will appear on your mini-map. ｜ 在纳塔存在燃素机制的区域时，与部分采集物交互能恢复20点体力。此外，在小地图上显示周围的<color=#FFD780FF>纳塔区域特产</color>的位置。

- If the princess ceases to be happy, then I shall never be happy either. So, please make a display of sufficient strength, dear knights. ｜ 若使得公主不再快活，下人也实在难得欢畅。因此，请骑士们展示足够的力量。

- And... how would I do that if something had already happened to me? ｜ 我都出问题了还怎么找你？
- Monetoo Will Guide You Home (II) ｜ 幻写引路人·其二
- You think we should charge up there? But there isn't even a path! ｜ 你是说冲上去吗？那就得有冲上去的道路才行呢！
- Anyway, no entry without a pass, y'hear? ｜ 总之，如果没有通行证的话，两位还是请回吧！
- My lineage... I no longer recall it, but it could not have come from nowhere. ｜ 师承…我一点印象也没有，总不会是野路子出身吧。
- The fungal beasts proliferated in frightening numbers outside, and even the tranquil ruins would also become fertile soil for them.\nDestroy the monsters within to obtain materials with which to enhance your equipment. ｜ 外界蕈兽大量增殖，原本平静的古遗迹中也成为了孢子的沃土。\n消灭其中的魔物，或许能获得强化装备的物质吧。
- Impressive, is it not? It is our homeland, after all. ｜ 怎么样，很厉害吧！毕竟这里可是我们花灵的家乡呢。
- Hmm... This must be one of the "floating bags" that Futaba mentioned! ｜ 嗯…这就是双叶提到的「漂浮的袋子」对吧！
- Oh no... He got ahead of us. Let's try again! ｜ 啊……被他领先了，再试一次吧！
- Find more clues in the space ｜ 在空间内寻找更多线索
- Which maestro made the Sharky Surfboard? ｜ 鲨鲨冲浪板是哪位高手的作品？

- Cannot use Quick Challenge inside a Domain ｜ 秘境中无法进行快速挑战
- Yeah, but have you heard the tale of the First Sage? To prevent a calamity, he went on a journey to find the Dendro Archon. ｜ 是这样的，你们听过「最初的贤者」的故事吗？为了摆脱灾厄，而踏上寻找草神的旅途的故事。
- There was no third person, and Paimon didn't eat more than three macarons either! ｜ 没有第三个人，派蒙也只吃了三个马卡龙！

- *sigh* Still, just look at him. I'll have Semaine teach him a thing or two once we get back to Fontaine... ｜ 唉，瞧瞧他这模样。等回了枫丹，必须得让瑟米安给他好好上一课才行…
- Knock the Slimes into the <color=#FFCC33FF>Vine Goal</color> by using Shikanoin Heizou's <color=#FFCC33FF>Charged Attack or Elemental Skill</color> to score points.\nDuring the challenge, all party members will be unable to use Elemental Bursts and will receive a cooldown reduction. ｜ 利用鹿野院平藏的<color=#FFCC33FF>重击或元素战技</color>，将史莱姆投入<color=#FFCC33FF>「藤蔓球门」</color>获得积分。\n挑战中，队伍中所有角色无法使用元素爆发。队伍中所有角色获得冷却缩减。
- We probably shouldn't stand around daydreaming! ｜ 我们俩也不要做白日梦了啦。
- "Don't look for shortcuts, after all, the shortcut might already be clogged with hordes of people who've already found it." ｜ 「别寻找什么捷径了，说不定去捷径的路口现在都已站满了人。」

- The key weak spots are where the <color=#FFE14BFF>core</color> is exposed on the head and the back. Try to hit one of them. ｜ 头部与背部裸露的<color=#FFE14BFF>核心</color>是最大的弱点。如果能命中的话…

- Crux: <color=#f39000>Burning Reactions</color>\nAfter a character triggers the Burning reaction, the basic amount of points scored by defeating each opponent will increase by <color=#f39000>2</color> for the duration of this drill. This effect can occur once every <color=#f39000>4</color>s. ｜ 要点：<color=#f39000>燃烧反应</color>\n角色触发燃烧反应后，本次演武中每名敌人被击败时所提供的基础得分将增加<color=#f39000>2</color>，此效果至多每<color=#f39000>4</color>秒触发一次。
- But I never expected to see, muddily reflected in the eyes of my nemesis, a sad, lonely face, gradually made desolate by vengeance... ｜ 但没想到在这仇人的双眼，泥泞的倒影之中，竟映出我因复仇而渐生凄离的面容…

- Huh!? ｜ 哎？！

- I'm looking for a certain female thief. ｜ 我在找一个女贼。
- Why are you hiding again? There's nothing around here! ｜ 你怎么又躲起来了，这周围什么也没有啊？
- I never answer them, but that's still not enough to shut them up! ｜ 虽然我一句话也不回他们，但他们却会自顾自地一直说下去！
- I'm sure someone as erudite as yourself should be able to guess what people do with these unusual avians? ｜ 您也是有见识的人，要不要猜猜，这么珍奇的鸟类一般会拿来做什么？
- You've come at a good time. ｜ 你现在来的话算是赶上好时候了。
- Really? You have a plan? ｜ 真的吗？你有办法了？
- If there is anything you want to ask about the purification, please feel free to ask me. ｜ 无论如何，如果关于净化之事，有任何想问的，还请您随时来问我。
- Come to think of it, perhaps the Akademiya has also never understood the true nature of forbidden knowledge, and thus always approached the issue from the wrong direction... ｜ 想必是因为教令院也并不了解「禁忌知识」的概念，所以一直以来都猜错了方向…

- Wait, no, it's us! Why are you treating us like we're your enemies!? ｜ 等下，是我们啊！为什么又是一副看到敌人的样子！

- *huff* Let me see... Energy system, looks fine; engine, fine; weapons... the long-range sub-weapon is out of order, the main one isn't functioning normally; melee weapons and left arm, working... ｜ 呼…让我看看…能源，正常；引擎，正常；武器…远程副武器失灵，主武器运转异常；近战武器，左臂，正常…

- And until then, we follow their rules and don't go outside the tribe until the Sacred Mountain has calmed down, okay? ｜ 嗯嗯，所以在那之前，我们就遵守大人们的禁足令，在圣山大人活动这么激烈的时期好好待在部族里吧…
- Ah, there is now no poison left in his system. But recovery from the damage already done will not happen overnight. ｜ 余毒已清。不过毒素对身体的侵害，恐怕并非一朝一夕能够恢复。

- Held 400 or more Adventure Coins at the end of the trial ｜ 在试炼结束时持有400枚及以上的冒险币
- "The locals here in Ritou were pretty restrained. I guess it's because not too long ago, we were still at each others' throats..." ｜ 「离岛的本地人非常拘谨，或许因为此前不久我们还是兵刃相交的敌人吧…」
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技

- Oh! Uh... N—Nice to meet you too, Noelle! My name is Collei... but you already knew that. ｜ 啊你、你好！我是柯莱…
- Morning! Y'know, somehow, you make me feel ready to take on the day! For once, I don't feel like going back to sleep! ｜ 早呀！一见到你，我就精神满满，难得不想睡回笼觉了！
- Hmm... I don't know... ｜ 可是…这个请求我觉得我做不到。
- What's wrong, Jeht? ｜ 怎么了，婕德？
- All forces, retreat! ｜ …撤退！
- "Reji" ｜ 「雷吉」
- Indeed, why would the Primordial Sea — which was known to engender and nurture life — suddenly reverse itself and devour life instead? ｜ 本应创造生命，诞生生命的原始胎海…为何又会反过来吞噬生命…
- Is...? ｜ 而是…？
- ...explosion goes off... ｜ …爆炸发生…
- As for his subjects... They are insignificant. They dare not express any complaint. They are forced to submit. ｜ 而他的子民…那些渺小的人，不敢有丝毫怨言，只能顺从地对其表示臣服。
- I'm sorry. ｜ 抱歉。
- Every last item is a keepsake from a voyage across the oceans. Genuine goods at honest prices! ｜ 这些都是以前出海时得到的，货真价实！
- Please, stop! I'm begging you! Stay away! This is our Annapausis. ｜ 求求你们住手，不要再过来了，这里就是我们的安眠处。
- CD|{param2:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param2:F1}秒
- Darn it! We've been tricked, Huni! I should've known that glasses guy was a con artist... ｜ 完蛋，胡妮，我们一定是被骗了，那个眼镜仔果然是个骗子…
- Anyway, you should watch and learn, because I plan on using some more of my "little tricks" to defeat that Divine Priestess from Watatsumi Island. ｜ 你还是乖乖学学我怎么用「小伎俩」，赢下海祇岛那位现人神巫女吧。
- I know you want to communicate with someone beyond the islands, but you can't do that right now. So I cut off your connection. ｜ 我知道你想联络海岛之外的人，但现在还不行哦。所以，我截断了你的通讯。
- I... I'm okay... ｜ 没、没事…
- That's right. If you are ready, reach out your hand and enter his dream... ｜ 没错。如果准备好了，就伸出手，进入他的梦吧…
- Huh, I think I've said too much. Well, I guess that's it for today. I have to go back and see if Ms. Farzah is starving in her lab. ｜ 哦唷，我好像说得太多了。那今天咱们就聊到这里，我得回去看看法尔扎小姐有没有饿昏在研究室里了。

- Character and Weapon Enhancement Material ｜ 角色与武器培养素材
- (The weapon used by the hero Tenoch five hundred years ago. The size is truly impressive...) ｜ （五百年前的英雄特诺切使用的武器，真是个大家伙…）
- Let me try... ｜ 我尝尝…
- Hmm, wait a minute. Wouldn't that make Paran and Carrewoof another "blond youth and white pet" pair? Ah... Oops. Taruka did remind Paimon not to say stuff like that, didn't he? ｜ 哦，这么说来，帕朗和加勒弗大汪不也是金发年轻人和白色宠物的组合吗！啊…坏了，塔卢加明明提醒过我不要说这种话…
- "The prelude to battle looms over the world! Come, Traveler, show me how the threads of fate shall be rearranged in your hands!"\nHint: Fischl's deck has "Energy Recharge" and "Elemental Bursts" as its main themes, and includes a large number of cards that can restore Energy. ｜ 「战场的幽幕已然向此世展开，旅人啊，向我展示你拨动命弦的手腕吧！」\n【提示】菲谢尔的牌组以「充能」和「元素爆发」为主题，包含大量能够补充「充能」的卡牌。
- He's been good to me as long as I can remember. He would always share any tasty food he had, and he even taught me arithmetic. He's like a brother to me! ｜ 他从小就对我可好了，有什么好吃的都愿意分我一半，还会很耐心地教我算术…他就跟我的亲哥哥一样！
- Talk to Hammer Li ｜ 与李锤子对话
- There is a never-ending sandstorm hovering over the hollow mountain of Mt. Damavand, and the wandering tribes in the desert believe that the Eternal Oasis is hiding right within it. ｜ 达马山中空的山体上空盘旋着永不消散的沙暴，沙漠中的流浪氏族相信「永恒绿洲」正隐匿其中。
- First, you'll need to find something known as the "Golden Bridle." According to related literature, it's a device that is less than an armful in size. ｜ 首先你需要找到一个东西，叫做「御辔」。它根据文献描述似乎是不到一抱大小的装置。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making "Legion's Furious Horns."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『军团的怒角』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- A standard floor lamp from the Fortress of Meropide that uses a metal frame and a glass lampshade, with some additional external support structures meant to increase durability.\nThe other major purpose for those support structures is to prevent them from being kicked over by some careless person. With the support structures in place, the only thing that might break is that negligent soul's toes. ｜ 标准制式的梅洛彼得堡地灯，采用了金属框架与玻璃灯罩，并特地在外部增加了数个支撑结构以提高耐用程度。\n这种支撑结构的另外一大作用，则是防止这些地灯被某些不注意的人一脚踢坏，在加装支撑结构后，坏掉的就只可能是那些不留意者的脚趾了。
- The Pyro Archon explained everything when we came back from the Night Kingdom, including the reason behind the appearance of the hero, as well as the current state of the Night Kingdom. ｜ 回去之后，火神大人就为我们在场的所有人解释了一切，无论是夜神之国的现状，还是英雄为何会突然出现。
- Reach the destination within the time limit ｜ 在限时时间内抵达终点
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Those from up there have a tendency to sympathize with others. However, down here, such thoughts will put you at high risk. ｜ 从水上来的人相对来说更容易心生同情，但这种想法在水下的世界里非常危险。
- Well, this was a profitable excursion. ｜ 这次的委托还蛮赚的嘛。
- Now wait a second! Don't tell me that guy was the inspiration for the evil sorcerer in the script! We still haven't found any in-game information on him yet, so why don't you talk about someone else for now? ｜ 欸停停停！这该不会就是故事里的那个邪恶巫师吧？我们还没怎么收集他的情报，你要不换个讲讲？
- Romantic? ｜ 浪漫…？
- If it's okay with you, I think we should check all the pillars in this room, just to make sure they're sturdy. ｜ 如果可以的话，最好抽时间把这个房间的柱子全都检查一遍。

- P·A·I·M·O·N ｜ P·A·I·M·O·N
- Clorinde is one of the most well-known Champion Duelists in Fontaine, but she's also the most mysterious. I have a source who tells me that she uses some sort of mystical ritual to keep her weapon as good as new... Could this be the secret behind her famously undefeated track record in the Duelists' Ring? Ah, I'd love to spring that question on her one day... but I don't think I'll get the chance. She's publicly stated that she doesn't accept interviews. ｜ 克洛琳德小姐可是枫丹廷里最著名，也最神秘的「决斗代理人」，我从私人渠道打听到，她会用一些神秘的仪式维护自己的武器。也许这就是她在决斗中常胜不败的关键？可她曾公开表示过不想接受记者的采访…我应该没法当面问她这个问题了。
- Exactly! ｜ 就是就是！

- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Here's your meds. ｜ 这是药。

- Misled Musician ｜ 误入歧途的「音乐家」
- You two... I see it clearly! You have entered the optimal state to begin the battle dance, and I should not disturb you... I look forward to another graceful performance! ｜ 你们两位…我明白了！你们已经进入了规划战斗之舞的最佳状态，我不该打扰你们…期待你们尽早回来，展示华丽的舞姿！
- When the wielder is healed, restore <color=#99FFFFFF>12</color> Energy. This effect can be triggered once every 10s, and can occur even when the character is not on the field. ｜ 受到治疗时，恢复<color=#99FFFFFF>12</color>点能量，该效果每10秒至多触发一次，角色处于队伍后台时也能触发。

- Dynamic Skin ｜ 影幻牌面
- O—Oh, hello, l—look who it is! ｜ 呀…真、真是凑巧，又遇到你们了。
- Well done, little one. The task is upon us, my master. ｜ 记性不错嘛，小家伙。我们动手吧，我的大人。
- Alright, um... So, how are you holding up? ｜ 那…胡桃身体还好吗？
- I've looked at lots of sources and read a ton of books, but the more I read, the less I understand... ｜ 我查了很多资料，也看了很多书，但越是看书，我想不明白的事反而越多了…
- One, two, three, four. ｜ 一只、两只、三只、四只。
- Hmm... Speaking of which, Varuna Contraption has been much more stable lately, and the weather has become normal again... ｜ 嗯？说来最近「法留纳神机」稳定了很多，天气也正常了…
- King of Constellation Metropole ｜ 星轨王城国王
- Anyway, looks like we're done with business here. Traveler, lend me a hand. Let's tie 'em up and bring 'em to the village. ｜ 好，在这里的事都做完了。旅行者，过来搭把手，我们把这些家伙绑起来带回村里。

- Didn't you see it groveling there? It's begging us to help banish the evil spirits here. ｜ 你没看到么，它正摇尾乞怜呢，请求我们驱散此处的邪魔…
- Hehe, it's no problem. It doesn't feel like work, anyway. You could say it's more of a hobby or a passion... Maybe a bit of both! ｜ 呵呵，没关系哦。我不觉得这是工作，应该说是爱好还是追求好呢？都有吧。
- For every point of the entire party's combined maximum Energy capacity, the Elemental Burst DMG of the character equipping this weapon is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>0.24%</color>. A maximum of <color=#99FFFFFF>80%</color> increased Elemental Burst DMG can be achieved this way. ｜ 队伍中所有角色的元素能量上限的总和，每1点能使装备此武器的角色的元素爆发造成的伤害提高<color=#99FFFFFF>0.24%</color>，通过这种方式，元素爆发造成的伤害至多提高<color=#99FFFFFF>80%</color>。

- And even if the Gardemeks haven't been maintained properly and can't hear your screams, resulting in you being beaten and robbed... you can file a complaint at Maison Gardiennage, or send the scoop to The Steambird. ｜ 就算有的警卫机关缺乏维护，听不见您的呼救，导致您被打劫，丢失了财物…您也可以去执律庭投诉，或者向《蒸汽鸟报》爆料。
- Are you all right? ｜ 你还好吗？
- Making someone as straightforward as him "certain" of an undeniable fact isn't exactly hard. ｜ 那么，让像他那样耿直的人「确信」一件确凿无疑的事实，并不是难事吧。

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙

- Combat Status Generated ｜ 生成出战状态
- About the current situation... ｜ 关于科学院的现状…
- And what do you mean by "something bad will happen"? ｜ 然后你所说的不好的事，指的是什么？
- Gah, you gave Paimon a fright there... A Melusine, huh? What are you doing here? ｜ 吓死我了…原来是一位美露莘…你怎么在这里呀？
- How much will it cost? ｜ 需要收费吗？
- These large residences built from repurposed bows and cabins of multiple abandoned ships can be found in Poisson. It is said that some residents of Fontaine, particularly those who strongly believe in apocalyptic theories, find Poisson's design astonishing. In their eyes, these dwellings, which can serve as regular residences and might transform into boats when the water rises, are incredibly convenient. Unfortunately, these homes made by converting discarded vessels are just a last resort in times of extreme scarcity and do not function as seamlessly as outsiders might imagine. ｜ 可见于白淞镇内的大型民居，由多个废弃的船只的船艏与舱室改造而来。据说部分笃信末日论的枫丹廷人认为白淞镇的这种设计惊为天人。在他们眼中，这种平时可以居住，在涨水来临之际可以直接作为船只的住宅可谓方便至极。只可惜，这种将废旧航船改造而成的住宅只是资源极度匮乏时的无奈之举，并不如想象般滴水不漏。
- The words Sister Sorush said before the Sunyata Flower... "I shall be Simurgh's equal"... They encouraged me more than any teachings might. ｜ 斯露莎姐姐在「净觉花」前，发出「目标是比肩西摩格」的宣言时…比什么心得都能鼓舞我。
- Eat! Eat! If it's not enough, we can always order more. Oh, there's Tong Sui coming as well! I don't usually have that in the morning, but well, since everyone's here, I just had to order it. ｜ 随便吃，不够再点！哦，还有糖水，一般早上我不吃，但难得人齐我都点上啦。
- A Certain Trifle ｜ 一件小事
- Stop all actions immediately after using a <color=#FFCC33>Normal Attack</color>, <color=#FFCC33>Plunging Attack</color>, or an <color=#FFCC33>Elemental Skill</color> ｜ 进行<color=#FFCC33>普通攻击</color>、<color=#FFCC33>下落攻击</color>或施放<color=#FFCC33>元素战技</color>后立刻停止行动
- Pah, what a horrible sight. To be as Mihir is, corroded by filth, falling from a spotless to a sinful state, yet desperate to preserve herself... Had the Elder not bade me come... ｜ 像米希尔那样即便被污秽侵蚀，从无垢堕为有罪却还是贪生的丑态，真是不忍卒睹呀。要不是前辈非让我来…
- Don't tell me everyone's here looking for gossip about the sages? ｜ 难道都是来打听贤者的小道消息吗？！
- Kuli... ｜ 咕噜…
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Go to the records room ｜ 前往档案室
- Traveler, Paimon, good to see you. Unfortunately, both the Commissioner and Miss Kamisato are out on business for the day. They are not here at the estate. ｜ 旅行者，派蒙，好久不见。真不凑巧，今天社奉行大人和神里小姐都有公务在身，目前不在府上。
- Of course, of course! Hehe, I didn't expect you to be interested in weapons development, Honorary Knight! ｜ 好的好的！嘿嘿，没想到您也会对武器开发的事情感兴趣呢，荣誉骑士大人！

- Clear away the rocks the volcanic activity has left strewn on and around the ruins! ｜ 清理掉因为火山「喷吐」而落到遗迹上和遗迹周围的这些岩石吧！

- Her whereabouts afterward are unknown. ｜ 在那之后下落不明。
- Nightsoul Point Limit|{param5:F1} ｜ 夜魂值上限|{param5:F1}点

- Of course Pale Floater can't see them. They are still trapped by obsessions of the past, after all. ｜ 白飘飘当然看不到，毕竟这些残灵还停留在过去的执念当中。
- Fabulous Fungus Frenzy - Act II ｜ 智巧灵蕈大竞逐 第二幕
- Come on, Kururuk, be good now. You haven't recovered fully yet, so don't sneak out to hunt again. You wouldn't want me to worry, would you? ｜ 好孩子要听话哦，咕噜噜。你伤没完全好，不要再偷跑出去打猎了哦，我会担心你的。
- Haha! That's such an interesting story! "'A bitter day this is, that we should be saved by our great foe!' Sergeant Anton exclaimed with a sigh..." ｜ 哈哈，这个故事很有意思呀！「…『日暮途穷的苦涩今日，竟被大敌所搭救！』安东上士如是叹息…」
- Hehe... Then let round one begin. ｜ 呵呵…那就赶快开始第一轮吧。

- Nice to meet you, Sir! ｜ 很高兴见到你！
- Ugh, my head hurts... ｜ 脑壳疼…

- What do you plan to do once you become stronger, Kichiboushi? ｜ 吉法师变强了以后，想干什么？
- A little birdie told me that you'll be staying in Mondstadt for the Weinlesefest? Hope you enjoy yourselves. ｜ 听说你们会留在蒙德跟大家一起过「佳酿节」，那就祝你们玩得开心了。
- Sure. ｜ 没问题。
- Score 2,000 points in the challenge, "A Drifting Leaf" ｜ 在「一叶飘拂」挑战中获得2000分
- Wow! Th—This taste! Why, I've never had anything like it! ｜ 喔！这，这酒的味道，光是闻见就觉得无与伦比！
- ... ｜ ……

- King Deshret has the coolest Scarabs, but those adults who tell me to believe in King Deshret always sound so annoying... I don't like them. ｜ 虽然赤王有着最酷的圣金虫，但是那些叫我信赤王的大人说话都好讨厌…我不喜欢。

### Part 107

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making "Foundations of Stone: Fortunate Times."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「铸石地基-『运开时泰』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Hello... I am Arasata. ｜ 嗯…我是，兰沙陀…
- Oh? Well, let's hope so... ｜ 哦？最好是这样…
- The Mountainator cannot be used ｜ 「开山炮」暂时无法使用
- Understood. ｜ 我知道了。
- I am sure you have what it takes. ｜ 我相信你可以办到。
- Huh? Seems not. Let's look around for any clues we can find! ｜ 咦？好像不是这样…不如看看附近有没有什么线索吧！
- No space left in Material Inventory. Please free up some space and try again. ｜ 材料背包空间不足，请清理出足够的空间再试
- Can the Gnosis do what he said? ｜ 「神之心」有这个作用吗？
- But Mr. Guard keeps following us and we can't get rid of him. I'm a bit scared, he looks like a bad guy. ｜ 可是他一直跟着我们，甩也甩不掉，一副坏人的样子。
- "Pure Gorgeous Summer" ｜ 「斑斓与清冽之夏」
- That does sound quite novel. ｜ 这么一说，确实很新奇。
- Ah, it seems you're quite the same as you used to be. But I've changed. I'm not the man I was before. Let me work in your workshop. ｜ 啊，看来你也还是和以前一样。不过我已经变了，我不会再像过去那样了，让我在你的工坊工作吧。

- Dear guest, although I don't know what Madam Kujou Sara has done to you, you are always welcome here to relax. ｜ 这位客人，虽然不知九条裟罗大人如何亏待了您，还请时常光顾消愁。

- Well, it doesn't matter. Let's just go grab what we need from their camp. ｜ 不管了，我们先去他们的营地，把我们要的东西都拿到手吧。
- Akademiya Emblem-Marked Contract ｜ 印有教令院徽记的约契
- Ah, so it's about Mr. Garcia. I understand, let's head over together. ｜ 原来是那位加尔恰先生的事啊，我明白了，我们一起去他那边吧。
- Any past member of the Lefevere family would probably have a number of connections outside of Fontaine. ｜ 如果犯人过去真是勒菲弗尔家的一员，能有联系到海外的人脉也不奇怪。
- You went missing earlier. I thought that you'd ended up like all the others... ｜ 你们不见了，我还以为你们会和别的人一样…
- Hahaha, but is it really just for the kids? Don't you often follow them in, too? ｜ 哈哈哈，可不只是孩子哦，你不是也经常和他们一起来吗？
- Yeah, because Mom and Dad are amazing. Amazing people are always very, very busy. ｜ 嗯，毕竟爸爸妈妈都很厉害嘛。很厉害的人总是很忙很忙的。
- Candace ｜ 坎蒂丝
- It's a deal, then! ｜ 那就这么说定了！
- At last, the truth comes to light.\nPerhaps I should have expressed more grief at the overall situation as the permanent overseer and defender of the Mystic Onmyou Chamber.\nBut instead, I counseled Harunosuke and helped him resolve the angst within him.\nHis waiting would never bear fruit, but instead had become something he had forced upon himself and a terrible burden to bear.\nNor were we alone in wishing to defend that which that friend of his had held so dear — the deity that eventually brought the situation under control wished so too, as did many nameless people of great skill and will besides.\nSince it was the goal itself that we strove towards, why obsess and give ourselves no relief over the form that the goal's realization took?\nThis ending was perhaps most fitting.\nHarunosuke departed with peace in his heart, drifting afar like the night breeze.\nThe Mystic Onmyou Chamber has also opened its doors once more, awaiting those who would uncover its value.\nAs for me, I will wander no longer.\nThe Traveler, Paimon, Xinyan, and Tartaglia... I will defend the reason for my existence together with them. ｜ 真相总算明朗了。\n照理来说，被嘱咐了毕生镇守「诀箓阴阳寮」职责的寮司，更该在大局既定时悲戚。\n但我却劝说了晴之介，帮他解开了心结。\n晴之介的等待不会有结果，反而成为了一种强撑，为他带来了不必要的重负。\n而且，守护着那位友人珍视之物的势力，远远不止我们，除了平定大局的神明，还有很多隐姓埋名的能人志士。\n既然为那个目标付出过心血，又何必执着于目标实现的形式，何必沉溺在过程之中无法自拔？\n如今的结局，对我们而言，或许最为妥当。\n晴之介释然离去了，如夜风般飘向远方。\n「诀箓阴阳寮」则重新敞开了大门，等待世人发掘它的价值。\n而我也绝不会再彷徨。\n旅行者、派蒙，辛焱和达达利亚…我会与这些挚友一同坚守自己存在的意义。
- Will that do anything? ｜ 这样做有用吗？
- I kid you not, just the other day a big business owner comes in here, opens a stone, and sure, no jade, but there's a good few chunks of ore in there. Not good enough for him of course, he gives them right back to me without a second look. Don't get me wrong, I appreciate the generosity, I've just got nowhere to store them. ｜ 这不，前两天刚有个大老板从里面开出了几块矿石，看都不看就扔给我了，可这些搁我这儿也是占地儿啊…
