- *sigh* Where could the Monetoo for that red stone be... ｜ 哎呀，红色石头的幻写灵不知道下在哪里了吗…
- Energy Cost|{param4:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param4:I}
- Remember, some will try to cheat you with masks, but "he" will help you. "He" will always help you. ｜ 切记，有的人会戴着面具，欺骗你，但「他」会帮助你，「他」永远襄助你。
- Yes, I know. And I've studied Nara. I think this is the perfect time to say "it's like putting fine timber to petty use"! ｜ 嗯。我知道的。我研究过那菈，这时候，应该要说「大材小用」吧！
- Varesa ｜ 瓦雷莎
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- Can we really have them? Won't you run out of ingredients? ｜ 咦？这不太好吧，你自己没东西下锅了怎么办？
- Proposal & Gathering ｜ 开题·筹措
- "The other day, I accidentally lost the only extant copy of the famous 'Toki Alley Tales,' written by Takizawa Kyouden." ｜ 「泷泽京传先生那本著名的《鹮巷物语》孤本最近被我不慎搞丢了。」
- No one asked about your past. ｜ 又没人问你这个。
- I'm fine, but... ｜ 我没事，不过…
- Huh, maybe more people live in this domain than we thought... ｜ 难道这个秘境之中还住着很多居民？
- So, any luck at the International Trade Association? Did they have any silk in stock? ｜ 如何，万国商会那边还有存货吗？
- Mposo ｜ 恩波索
- Editor-in-Chief Euphrasie was right to ask for your help. I should just take off this uniform and leave. ｜ 欧芙主编请你们是对的，我真该把这身衣服脱下来走人了。
- This dark-golden sundial seems to tell the ancient tale of the desert. ｜ 暗金光泽的古老日晷，似乎在诉说着沙漠的旧日。
- I, on the other hand, barely did anything... But I'll need to find a soft bed to lie down on all the same. My back hurts all over from being stuck in this cage for half a day. ｜ 几乎全部都是恩人的功劳，哎呀，被笼子关了小半天，腰也酸背也痛，小女子我要找个柔软的床铺好好躺一躺。
- A large opera house situated in Erinnyes that also serves as the symbol of trials and judgment. The true and the fantastical, the comedic and tragic find a stage here equally. Perhaps it truly is as an ancient Fontainian playwright once said — "All the world's a stage, and all of us merely players." ｜ 位于伊黎耶岛的大歌剧院，同时也是审判与裁决的象征。真实与虚幻，闹剧与悲剧在此处平等上演，或许正如古枫丹的剧作家所言，「世界不过是一幕表演，众生亦不过是舞台上的演员。」
- Support Card ｜ 支援牌
- Hey, how are you feeling? ｜ 喂，你感觉怎么样？
- But, Esnoir, I... ｜ 但是，埃斯诺尔，我…
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param5:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param5:F1}点
- #To clean out all the Abyssal monsters in the Tephric Ruins so quickly... It looks like you're even stronger than I thought, {NICKNAME}... ｜ #居然在这么短时间内就处理掉了「喷发遗迹」中的深渊魔物，看来你比我想象的还要强…{NICKNAME}…
- The crowd suddenly takes on the form of Oceanids. ｜ 众人突然变成了纯水精灵的样子。
- As both a first-rate guide of the People of the Springs and the owner of a famous watersports shop, my business depends on my ability to stand out from the crowd! And people wouldn't be very impressed if my gear just looked the same as everyone else's, would they? ｜ 作为「流泉之众」一流的向导，兼著名水上用品店店长，要是使用的装备太常见，难免会给人一种不够热情的感觉嘛。
- Hold DMG|{param3:P} ｜ 长按伤害|{param3:P}
- Defeat the Fatui ｜ 击败愚人众及党羽
- Silhouette's Intrinsic Nature ｜ 轮廓的本貌
- "Miniaturized Personal Recording Device" experimental results... Not bad. ｜ 「微型化单人留音设备」的实验报告，不错。
- I assumed... I assumed you never wanted to see me again. ｜ 我以为…我以为你不想再看见我这副模样。
- Aren't the Treasure Hoarders scared of the meteorites? ｜ 盗宝团不怕陨石吗？
- There's a big robot component here, too. Paimon reckons that Jazari'll take his Kamera out again if he sees it. ｜ 看来这里也有大机器人的零件，要是让加扎里先生看到的话，估计又要掏出他的那台留影机了。
- Let's start with a classic stockinette stitch. First, wrap the yarn around, pull it through here, then hang it on the needle... ｜ 先从平针开始学吧，首先把线交叉，从这里穿过来，然后套在针上…
- 5-Hit DMG|{param6:F1P}×3 ｜ 五段伤害|{param6:F1P}*3
- Sprint Start: I ｜ 冲刺开始·其一
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Go collect the treasure ｜ 前去取得「宝藏」
- Fisherman's Clemency ｜ 「渔采的择取机网」
- Nothing more than a few hilichurls. ｜ 不过是些杂碎而已。
- Blub... ｜ 呜…
- Association Announcement ｜ 协会公告
- Of course, this event is intended to measure your courage. If you withdraw from the event because you become too frightened, then you might as well forget about seeing any rewards. ｜ 当然，「试胆大会」最考验的还是胆量，如果因为害怕而中途退出，也就注定和奖品无缘了。
- Yep. It belongs to Akim. His father helped Setaria a lot when she first moved to Sumeru City, so she still comes by whenever she has time. ｜ 是的，塞塔蕾刚来到须弥城的时候，受了店主阿金父亲的很多照顾，所以有空就会过来转转。
- Let's play a game of Temari! ｜ 来玩手鞠吧。
- In this story, everyone is a Marechaussee Hunter. To reflect this, the club has prepared a small badge for everyone. ｜ 此次剧本中，各位的职业都是「逐影猎人」，俱乐部为你们准备了一枚表示身份的小徽章。
- Have you ever met someone who looks like me? ｜ 你见过长得和我很像的人吗？
- Of course. I see no need to be humble when it comes to the facts. ｜ 这是当然。不该谦虚的地方我从不谦虚。
- Energy Cost|{param5:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param5:I}
- Enjou ｜ 渊上
- Sudabeh was the first to go missing. She went into the forest to gather herbs for Grandpa Amadhiah. ｜ 首先，最先走失的是素达蓓，她想要去森林里给阿玛兹亚爷爷采药。
- #Huh? {NICKNAME}? When did you get here? ｜ #嗯？{NICKNAME}？你是什么时候来的？
- Sure thing. ｜ 没问题。
- A special type of creature called Sea Ganoderma resides near certain bodies of water. ｜ 在某些特殊的海域附近生长着一种特殊物种，名叫「海灵芝」。
- How do you like it here? ｜ 在这里还习惯吗？
- Uh, are you okay? ｜ 你怎么了？
- Uhh, Paimon thinks it's pretty chill. Weren't you complimenting them the entire time as well? ｜ 唔，要我说的话，挺好的啊，你不也一直在夸他们吗？
- Like several other tedious and complicated traditions, this one has become simplified over time. ｜ 不过这种古早时期的讲究，和一些过于复杂的传统，都已经逐渐被简化了。
- Caterpillar ｜ 卡特皮拉
- This logic seems a tad messy... ｜ 什么乱七八糟的。
- Place Blocks ｜ 放置方块
- Uh... Amber, what are you doing here? ｜ 呃…安柏，你怎么在这里？
- Talk to Layla ｜ 与莱依拉交谈
- See what Childe experienced from his perspective in a dream. ｜ 在梦境中经历「公子」经历过的「视角」。
- So that's what you think, huh... ｜ 你是这么想的啊…
- The box has a lot of things inside, probably goods dropped by the fleeing Sumpter Beast. ｜ 这个箱子里面装着好多东西，也许是那只驮兽奔逃的时候掉下来的货物。
- Daisy, Daisy ｜ 黛西，黛西
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Taller by Half ｜ 「高」人一等
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- Oh? ｜ 哦？
- Sylvan Meditation ｜ 「林中静思」
- Ahem... To be honest, it's been tough living, but we're all looking out for each other and helping each other out, so we can all survive. ｜ 咳咳…说实话，在这里日子过得还是挺艰苦的，但还好大家都在相互照应和帮助，所以都能活得下去。
- Oh, you really seem to know your stuff. My "mom" and I love collecting little ornaments like that. I wonder if Tubby likes shiny things too. ｜ 哦？你挺懂的嘛。我跟「妈妈」都很乐于收集这类装饰，不知道阿圆喜不喜欢。
- Duration|{param3:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param3:F1}秒
- Try to understand what Don Quijano and Nana are saying ｜ 尝试理解唐·西哈诺和娜娜的话
- ...Oh! I made a wish. ｜ 我自己…啊！我许了个愿。
- If it weren't for the fact that he's a candidate for the next Grand Conservator, even fewer young researchers would know about him. ｜ 如果不是因为他是下一任大掌书的人选，恐怕年轻学者里知道他的人会更少。
- Hey, don't catch a cold now! ｜ 嗯，别着凉哦！
- Exactly. Cooking, combat, errands, espionage, we can do it all! This is definitely way easier than extinguishing the Sign of Apaosha — we're not gonna trip up here! ｜ 不管是烧饭跑腿还是战斗潜行通通都不在话下！这肯定比熄灭「焚真之天象」简单多了，我们可不会在这里被难倒，哼哼。
- You can say that. Albeit the suspicious person we were pursuing was actually you. Ahem. ｜ 这么说也没错，但我俩追着的可疑人士其实是你，咳…
- The training's not over yet. The part prepared by Cloud Retainer is only the first trial. ｜ 修行并未结束，留云真君安排的修行只是第一环而已。
- Well, you can find those quite easily, but Xiangjun... I'm fairly sure there's no one by that name in our village. What does her grandfather go by? ｜ 唔…竹筏倒是容易见，但香莙这个名字…老头子我确认，庄子里没有叫这个名字的人。她爷爷叫什么你们知道吗？
- We are exploring the idea of cooperative engagement capability, separating units that receive intelligence from the units that launch the attack, which will give us an advantage... ｜ 甲射乙导。这是千岩军正在探索的一种战法，分离获取信息和发起攻击的单位，以创造优势——
- You're seriously... Jeht, please, help me with Paimon... Jeht? ｜ 你这家伙可真是…婕德，你也来劝劝派蒙啊。婕德？
- Well, I hope I'll get to see your flashy swordplay this time as well! ｜ 嗯，这次也请让我见证你闪耀的剑之舞吧！
- No worries at all. We've always valued the strength of adventurers. Given the current situation, it's vital that we all work together. ｜ 你客气了，冒险家向来都是非常重要的一股力量，就眼下的情况而言，我们需要团结起来。
- A monster once cornered an adventurer, but was then picked off by a hunting eagle... That eagle dropped this feather, which now carries some of the adventurer's good luck. ｜ 挡在面前的魔物却被捕食的鹰隼盯上，偶尔能带来这种程度运气的翎羽。
- Regarding the meaning of that poem... ｜ 这句诗的含义…
- Maiden's Passing Youth ｜ 少女苦短的良辰
- Try out the jar-smashing challenge I've constructed! I set this location up to train myself, but I wouldn't mind letting you have a go. ｜ 来试试看我准备的击罐挑战吧！这片场地原本是我为了锻炼自己准备的，借你用用也没什么问题。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Although I cooked some food, it wasn't because I was hungry, I just wanted to keep our spirits up. I was planning on saving our rations so we could survive a few more days, but I haven't really felt hungry since. ｜ 我虽然烤了食物，也不是因为饥饿才吃，只是转换心情。本来想着要节约口粮多熬几天，可没想到，从那之后就再也没感到过肚子饿。
- Yes, I have. ｜ 嗯，我决定好了。
- Asterism Shard ｜ 星象碎片
- Equipment Card ｜ 装备牌
- "Fellow colleagues who've abandoned their homeland." ｜ 「抛弃故土的同僚」。
- Floral Rapidfighting Fish ｜ 繁花斗士急流鱼
- The following cabinets might be suitable for your Feline Home needs ｜ 下列立柜可能更符合喵屋的需求
- Shh! ｜ 嘘…
- Deals 1 $[K102], attach <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C122052]</color> to opposing active character. ｜ 造成1点$[K102]，敌方出战角色附属<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C122052]</color>。
- Nope, Paimon only does nicknames! If it's a serious name you're after... it's all yours! ｜ 不行，我只会起绰号，不会起正经名字…交给你了！
- Feiyun Slope Bulletin Board ｜ 绯云坡公告板
- Um, I'd say you're the suspicious ones here. After all, I am a certified researcher from the Akademiya, and you are outlanders of unknown origin. ｜ 呃，说到可疑，你们才比较可疑吧。毕竟我是正牌的教令院学者，你们怎么看都是来路不明的外国人。
- Enter the Abyss Order Stronghold ｜ 进入深渊教团据点
- I just thought that you and Noelle would do a better job of expressing things than I could... ｜ 我觉得无论是你还是诺艾尔，都会表达得比我更好…
- I can assure that Mr. Garcia has mentioned it to her before. ｜ 我证明，加尔恰先生一定是提起过的。
- I've decided to let it go. After all, with Idyia's help, I now live in the Veluriyam Mirage and can spend all my time researching cute things, free of worry and care! ｜ 那些事都不重要了，毕竟可爱的伊迪娅姐姐帮助了我，让我住进了可爱的「琉形蜃境」，专心研究可爱的东西，没有任何烦恼！
- Would you like to come with us? ｜ 那你们愿意跟我们走吗？
- Supada no Hiko... Right... Yes, that's correct! I'm the leader of the resistance, Spartacus! ｜ 须婆达之彦...须婆达之彦，没错！我就是反抗军的首领，斯巴达克！
- I'd like to thank you again for that commission last time. ｜ 关于上次的委托，多谢。
- Thank you so much. I'm sorry... I'm just all tuckered out right now. ｜ 谢谢你，旅行者。抱歉，我是真没力气了…
- Emergency Notice ｜ 紧急通知
- And this is...? ｜ 这是…
- Thank you for trying the wine! It was indeed specially prepared by myself. ｜ 感谢您的品鉴，今夜的酒确是老夫为您特意准备。
- It looks like... a Mondstadt-style instrument! Grandpa Amadhiah, can you lend it to us? ｜ 看起来…像是蒙德风格的乐器呢！阿玛兹亚爷爷，能借给我们吗？
- Land with salt is land without life, and Aranara will be forced to shrink into seeds. Yet Nara wish to add salt!? ｜ 有盐的土地上，就没有生命，兰那罗只能退缩成干种子…那菈竟然要放盐！
- Ingenious... Ingenious indeed. ｜ 这玩法…颇有巧思。
- What is this, prison rules? ｜ 可…可以这么玩吗？
- Energy Cost|{param8:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param8:I}
- Forest Ranger ｜ 巡林员
- 藤田茜 ｜ 藤田茜
- It's part of the strategy. Does the Fontaine Research Institute not have similar "games"? ｜ 这也算是策略的一部分吧。枫丹科学院真的没有类似的「游戏」吗？
- Door of Resurrection activated ｜ 与复苏之门已建立联系
- Unlocks at Ascension Phase 2 ｜ 突破等级「2」阶后开启
- My father... has been supplying goods to Dakan Al-Ahmar? ｜ 父亲他把物资送去了「阿赫玛尔之须」？
- Meow meow. ｜ 喵喵。
- You're like his big sister, Paimon. ｜ 派蒙好像姐姐。
- "The Famed Adventurers" Book Cover ｜ 《名冒险家系列》书封
- Collect {param0} Thelxie's Badges(s) ｜ 收集{param0}个「特尔克西徽章」
- Thirsty... Need... water... ｜ 好想喝水，口好渴…
- Talk to Yan'er ｜ 与胭儿对话
- You can read the script first. There's no need to be nervous. I've marked all the important lines, so take your time. ｜ 你可以先看看剧本，不用紧张，重要台词我都做了标注，慢慢来。
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- Why do you think Nacker stole the core? ｜ 你为什么认为是纳克偷走了核心？
- And that's all from me! Here's your Sightseeing Handbook. Have fun! ｜ 那么，我马上把「巡景手册」给您，祝前辈玩得开心！
- Oh, there they are! ｜ 嗯…在那边！
- You encounter an odd person beside an aquabus line near the Court of Fontaine... ｜ 在枫丹廷的水道旁边，你遇见了一位奇怪的人…
- Faded Emerald Tail ｜ 褪光的翠尾
- Now I want to try on your helmet, too. ｜ 说的我都想试试你的头盔了。
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param10:P}/{param11:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param10:P}/{param11:P}
- Upgrades <color=#B09057FF>Crack Shot's</color> <color=#B09057FF>ATK SPD</color>. ｜ 强化<color=#B09057FF>「奇术机关·震弩」</color>的<color=#B09057FF>攻击速度</color>。
- That's why I have high expectations for Iaune. He's not the sharpest tool in the shed, but he's honest and diligent. ｜ 所以，我才对艾尤恩充满期待。这小伙子并不聪明，但却十分诚实勤恳。
- We do have your package. One moment... ｜ 有的，稍等。
- Xiangling ｜ 香菱
- 30,000 points ｜ 30000分
- Very well. It's taking all the energy I have to keep this light shining. I don't have the strength to try and combat the spreading darkness, too. ｜ 那可太好了。我现在维持这里的千灯长明就已经很吃力了。要去解决黑暗蔓延实在是力有不足。
- Ann ｜ 安
- If we're going to go plunging into that whirlpool tomorrow, then wouldn't it be best to try to rest and conserve energy now? ｜ …如果我们明天要一头扎进那个漩涡，好好养精蓄锐才是上策吧？
- Hmph, are you looking for Inayah? ｜ 是来找阿娜耶的吗？
- Hey, you two. ｜ 二位好。
- Defeat the Radicals ｜ 击败激进派人士
- We teleported to a different place from the tower. ｜ 在高塔中，我们传送到了别的地方。
- Of course. Your name will be on the title page for sure! ｜ 那是当然，我会在出版后的扉页上写上你们的名字的。
- Huh? Paimon has a favorite line? ｜ 我？我该说什么话？
- When work's not so busy, I invite Ottnit and Menthe to the infirmary for tea. Sometimes we talk about recent criminal cases, other times we discuss the latest skincare products recommended in the magazines, but most of the time we do painting together. We paint things that we find cute, turn them into stickers, and then give the stickers to people that we also think are cute. ...Oh, wait a moment, I have one here for you. ｜ 工作不忙的时候我会邀请奥蒂涅和梅莘她们来医务室喝茶，我们有时会聊最近的案件，有时聊美容杂志上推荐的护肤品，更多的时候会一起画画，把我们觉得可爱的东西画下来做成贴纸，再找机会送给可爱的人…啊，请稍等一下，我这里有一张要送给你。
- An unusual motif that can be used to decorate a gift envelope. ｜ 奇异的纹样，可用于装饰祝柬。
- Mask of Solitude Basalt ｜ 不动玄石之相
- Photograph "A House on the Southern Shore of Elynas" ｜ 记录「厄里那斯南岸的住宅」
- Does this mean I helped? Meowza! ｜ 我也算帮上忙了？
- Alright, alright. Leave it to me. ｜ 我、我知道了…
- Ahem... This will need a bit more consideration... ｜ 咳咳…这个不着急，我还要从长计议…
- You told us to walk and have a look around. ｜ 是你说让我们四处逛逛。
- Still can't find me... Alright, I guess you're allowed another clue. ｜ 还是找不到吗？嗯…那我再提示一下。
- Thank you again for your most gracious hospitality, today's trip was very fruitful. Now, allow your humble servant to take his leave. ｜ 感谢酒庄的招待，今天也算不虚此行，鄙人就此告辞。
- I think studying hard is easier than practicing how to act... ｜ 可能认真学习比磨练演技更省力吧…
- Sangonomiya Samurai ｜ 珊瑚宫军士
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Some supplies that are only handed out during a boom period. Is this the Guild getting rid of contraband stores, you ask? No, no. Of course not. ｜ 恰逢旺季才提供的一些补给。不要追问是不是协会跑路前的清仓了，不是的。
- Something to go with your noodles. ｜ 就当是素面的配菜了。
- A dangerous liquid that has been modified somehow by the energy flowing from the condensation components.\nIf you remain within such a liquid for too long, you will accumulate Turbulent Energy Flow. If you hit the accumulation limit, all your characters will drown. ｜ 被冷凝部件所释放出的能量流影响，从而产生异变的危险水体。\n若在此类水体中长期逗留，则会不断累积「紊乱能量流」，在「紊乱能量流」积累至上限后，队伍中所有的角色将因溺水而倒下。
- Forsaken Mountains ｜ 兽迹罕至的山麓

- And would a little... extra reward from yours truly sweeten the pot? ｜ 姐姐会额外提供报酬喔。
- The thought of the flames Vanagni spits gives Araprabhu shivers... But there must be a way... ｜ 虽然一想到桓那吉喷出的火焰还是会发抖…但是一定有办法…

- Electro DMG ｜ 雷元素伤害
- I'm fascinated by food from overseas. Though I don't get to try it very often... So, if I had to choose something from Inazuma, then probably... Chazuke. But not when anybody else is watching... So I tell you that in confidence. ｜ 我对异国料理很有兴趣，虽然很少有尝试的机会。嗯…如果是要局限在稻妻料理内的话…应该是「茶泡饭」吧。不过，不能给一般客人看见，我也是偷偷告诉你的。

- No, no, in fact, everything's as peaceful as placid waters! ｜ 都没有，什么也没有发生！每一天都很平静，毫无波澜。

- Then I wouldn't have to be on duty all the time. ｜ 这样我就不用去值班了。
- Mm-hmm. Catching up with an old friend I hadn't seen in years was truly delightful. ｜ 是啊，难得和多年未见的老友叙叙旧，怎么说都是件值得开心的事吧。

- Hmm, that's a tough one. This outlander sure knows how to pick 'em. ｜ 哦，这菜可不容易做啊。这外国人倒会挑。

- A Fiery Flavor From Liyue ｜ 来自璃月的辣味
- *sigh* I wonder how Glory is doing... ｜ 唉，也不知道葛罗丽现在怎么样了…
- Cut him off at both ends. Good idea! ｜ 两头包抄，好办法！
- So, I assume you two are in Liyue for the Lantern Rite? ｜ 对了，你们来璃月，也应该是冲着「海灯节」来的吧？

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙

- Do you know what kind of food the folks like here? ｜ 那你知道，这里的人们一般喜欢吃什么口味的菜吗？

- A mysterious ship has dropped anchor outside Liyue Harbor. The ship appears to be quite luxurious, all the more reason to hop right on board... ｜ 在璃月港的海边停着一艘神秘的船，看起来十分华贵。而你却冒冒失失地直接闯了进去…
- So, where is he now? ｜ 那他现在人在哪里？
- Even if my father opposes us being together and tries to meddle in our affairs, our relationship will survive! ｜ 即便是父亲的阻拦和反对，我们也一定可以挺过去的！
- Uh... ｜ 哦…！
- Oh no! What did I do to deserve this... ｜ 可恶！可恶！我到底是造了什么孽…
- Hmm, not much of a reaction. Seems it isn't interested in talking. ｜ 好像有回应了，不过，它好像没说话的意思。
- "Just now, I saw Master Diluc enter the tavern in a rush." "Oh? Is Master Diluc going to mix drinks personally today? Can't miss out on this one... Come on, help me up." ｜ 「刚才，我看迪卢克老爷行色匆匆地走进了酒馆。」 「哦？今天是老爷亲自调酒吗？那我可得去捧个场…来，扶我一把。」

- It's more or less the same as I remember before. ｜ 和以前差不多。

- Take your time. There's no rush. ｜ 不急，慢慢选。
- Let him go. He'll never amount to much in the Abyss Order anyway. ｜ 放他走吧，他在深渊教团混得挺惨。
- #Lynette's support: Persuasion{SPACE} ｜ 游说·琳妮特的声援
- Now, I was in the ore business for a while myself, but not any longer. If you need some, I'd say... this place is a good shout. ｜ 我以前确实做过一阵矿石生意，但现在已经不干啦。您需要矿石吗？就在这个地方，可以过去看看。
- Hahaha, I don't have an answer to this question at present, so I'll leave it to your future self. ｜ 呵呵呵，这个问题，我现在也没有答案，就把它留给未来的你好了。
- #Hello, {M#sir}{F#ma'am}, and hello to your cute companion! Dirty Face Darcy, at your service! ｜ #{M#先生}{F#女士}，还有可爱的同伴，你们好呀！「脏脸」达希，随时为您效劳！
- I... I immediately saw countless possibilities, all the ways I could be killed on an aquabus! I simply didn't dare to board. ｜ 我、我脑子里一瞬间就浮现了无数种我在巡轨船上被害的样子，根本不敢上船。

- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 2 ｜ 好感等级达到2级后解锁

- Noodles in a meat and vegetable sauce. The sauce has a rustic flavor, and there's a generous amount of it mixed in with the noodles. A humble but enduringly popular dish. ｜ 荤素搭配的卤面。分量十足的配菜拌入卤面之中，酱味敦厚。虽然是普通家常的做法，却能孕育出无比浓郁的回味。

- He was called away earlier by some people from the Tenryou Commission. They said they had something important to discuss with him. ｜ 他早些时候被天领奉行的人叫走了，说是有重要的事情要和他谈。
- "The Sumeru Akademiya has just published a new paper with the latest research. Experiments show that over 80% of those who drink iced Dandelion Wine for long periods will show symptoms of loss of liver function." ｜ 「须弥教令院发布了最新的研究论文。实验显示八成以上的人在长期饮用了冰镇蒲公英酒后出现了肝功能受损的症状。」
- An average person could never understand the scene of a young girl washing Akahito's poetry collection in a stream. ｜ 少女在溪边清洗赤人诗集的情景，对于普通人来说，完全不明所以。
- It's all good, we're not out to target anyone... You didn't hurt yourself, did you? ｜ 我们才不会觉得别人好欺负呢…你没摔疼吧？
- Ororon ｜ 欧洛伦
- Viridescent Arrow Feather ｜ 猎人青翠的箭羽
- I share everyone's desire to commemorate all our years as a troupe with a proper farewell show. So the last thing I want is to be left out. ｜ 我也想好好地和这么多年的剧团生涯说声再见，我不愿意在最后关头被排除在外。
- Outlander, what are you doing in the camp? This is a key military location. ｜ 外国人，你来军营干什么？这里可是军事重地。
- (Connor almost exposed the Darknight Hero...) ｜ （康纳差点说漏暗夜英雄的事…）
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Ah, right! We're here to request permission to head out. Would that be... okay? ｜ 啊对，我们是来申请外出的，应该…可以吧？
- Oh, right, your old man's craft... How could I forget? ｜ 哦，对的，子承父业嘛，我居然把这个忘了。
- Ororon seemed pretty confident that Citlali's traps won't harm us, but still, it can't hurt to be careful. ｜ 虽然欧洛伦那么说了，但我们还是小心一点比较好。
- CD|{param5:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param5:F1}秒
- Spike 2 has finished recharging ｜ 针对光钉Ⅱ的充能工作已完成
- You mean, the swarms of fast-swimming blue fish are the "children" we need to bring back? ｜ 你们的意思是说，这些游得飞快的蓝色鱼群就是我们要带回去的孩子吗？

- As long as I'm watching, he's not getting away with the treasure! ｜ 有我盯着呢，可别想着拿了宝贝就跑！
- It may sell well. ｜ 说不定能卖得很好。
- Keep your eyes peeled on the road. ｜ 路上要小心啊。

- Hmph, those uncultured curs, have they no taste at all!? ｜ 哼，那些俗人，真是毫无品味！
- Talk to the Calm Paper Frog ｜ 与沉稳的纸蛙对话
- This place is close to the desert and packed with merchants, so it's convenient to buy just about anything here. ｜ 这边离沙漠近，往来的商贩又多，想买什么都很方便。
- You tell them about your adventures in Mondstadt. ｜ 对众人讲述了在蒙德的冒险经历。
- Doushin ｜ 同心
- Found in the wild ｜ 野外采集
- Something related to what we saw in the ruins? ｜ 会与遗迹里的事物有关吗…
- Of course not, I'm just a merchant. I was lucky enough to secure exclusive sales rights for some new first aid supplies from Bubu Pharmacy recently. ｜ 几位说笑了，我只是一介商人而已，碰巧拿到了不卜庐一款跌打损伤药的代理权。

- Wait... ｜ 等等——
- Talk to Xu ｜ 与阿旭对话
- ... ｜ ……
- And you couldn't predict what they might possibly find, if given enough time. This, of course, was the main weakness of your plan. ｜ 你无法保证时间一长，他们能查出什么。这就是整个计划的「纰漏」。
- Sure. Safe travels, then, outlander. ｜ 好吧，那就祝你旅途顺利了，异邦人。
- I'm sure you're an inspiration to all your warriors. ｜ 如果我是战士，会很受鼓舞。
- You're not wrong, Paimon! Haha. Sometimes father will have a few glasses as well, but I've never seen him get drunk before. ｜ 说得也是，哈哈，派蒙说得对！老爹有时也会喝上几杯，不过我可从来没见他醉过。
- If you want to believe in them, Armin, that's fine! After all, you're still young. ｜ 阿尔明愿意相信兰那罗也没关系哦，反正你还小嘛。
- Aranimba has sent back a new picture. Seems to be a village in the desert? ｜ 嗯！兰宁巴又发了新的画回来，看起来像是沙漠里的村落…？
- Jiehu ｜ 接笏
- The name given to me at birth is buried in freezing snow. The name granted me by the House of the Hearth is Trofin Snezhevich. ｜ 我的血亲为我起的名字，已经失落在冰雪之中。「壁炉之家」赋予我的名字是特洛芬·雪奈茨维奇。
- Chassanion ｜ 「夏萨尼翁」
- You awarded both of them medals of honor, but did that save their lives? Can medals heal Tokuda and Masashi's wounds? ｜ 你们是给他俩颁了功勋，可这能救人吗？德田、将司的伤病，是靠功勋治的吗？
- But personality-wise, she's nothing like the real Dunyarzad... ｜ 可她和原本的迪娜泽黛的性格完全不像呀…
- About the Windmills ｜ 关于风车…
- Sort by Minor Affix ｜ 追加属性排序
- Recommended Elements (No <color=#FF5E41FF>{0}, {1}, {2}, or {3}</color> in current party) ｜ 推荐元素（当前队伍缺少<color=#FF5E41FF>{0}、{1}、{2}、{3}</color>）
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:P}
- Is this place related to the contents of the letter? ｜ 这里与信的内容有关吗？
- This Windward Art will replace your Elemental Skill ｜ 此秘技将取代「元素战技」
- Oh — and would you two care to join me? ｜ 对了，你们愿意跟我同去吗？
- Exquisite Chest ｜ 精致的宝箱
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- So, I've... uh, run out of paint. However, I cannot simply move my easel away at the moment. That would surely affect my creative work... ｜ 于是…我的颜料…现在已经全用光了。但我现在又绝不能搬着画架离开，这样一定会影响我的创作…
- I have no home or family to go to in Inazuma. Since I had nowhere to go, I just wandered. ｜ 我在稻妻也没什么居所，也没有亲眷可投奔，除了在外游荡，我也没有地方可去了。
- Most importantly, don't forget to enjoy yourself! We need this event to be as "joyful" as possible if we want the plan to work. ｜ 代表，记得多到处玩玩。毕竟这里的「喜乐」越盛，计划就能进行得越顺利。
- Hello! Ah, you look like you're from outside the village. Excuse me, but would you accept my request for an interview? ｜ 你好，啊，一看你就是从村子外面来的，稍微打扰一下，能接受我的采访吗！
- #Haha, come on, no need for that! It's not serious, and if anything, I'd say you've done us a favor! So, you're {NICKNAME}, then? Who's your friend over there? ｜ #哈哈，别说那么恐怖的话啦，情况没那么严重，不如说你们做了好事？这位{M#兄弟}{F#小姐}是{NICKNAME}，你呢？
- A present from a hilichurl. Bet you never thought you'd see the day! ｜ 一份来自于丘丘人的礼物，还是很新奇的吧？
- Art of Transport ｜ 「输运的要诀」
- A soup that consists of a mixture of meat and vegetables. The finished product is ashen-grey, a far cry from the bright green you had hoped for... Might this be saved by adding some more vegetables? ｜ 荤素搭配的汤品。成品颜色看起来灰扑扑的，与原本想要的鲜艳绿色相差甚远…再加多点绿色蔬菜能拯救回来吗？
- So it seems that the Ley Line effluence was man-made all along. You have to turn the Ley Line Extractor off. ｜ 原来地脉能量泄漏是人为造成的，必须尽快关停地脉抽取装置。

- Hey, hey, what gives? I told you not to touch, and you took it anyway? A warrior should be able to accommodate both other humans and Saurians alike. ｜ 作为勇士，要有容纳别人和别龙的气度，说了别动你这人怎么还要拿？
- This blade has committed unforgivable atrocities, but only because it lost its original master. No one was there to correct its errors when it was losing its way. ｜ 这把刀已然罪无可恕，但也只是因为他失去了持刀者，没有人能在他走向歧途的时候指明他的错误。
- Let Paimon take a look. Hmm... The Mint is intact. Let's go back! ｜ 让我瞧瞧…嗯，薄荷还很完整！我们回去吧！
- Crunchy Carrots ｜ 新鲜的胡萝卜
- Thanks! I'm gonna try it myself now. ｜ 谢谢你，我自己去再试试看！
- Can Be Offered ｜ 可致献
- Because the more I think about it... the more I'm inclined to think that... you're a contestant in tomorrow night's Onikabuto Battle Royale!!! ｜ 让我想想…有没有可能…你也是明晚要参加鬼兜虫大乱斗的选手？！
- Don't play dice at Yanshang Teahouse.\nIf you can't help yourself, play with someone you know.\nIf a lady whom you've never seen before invites you to a game, just ignore her.\nHeed this earnest advice from veteran gamblers.\nDo not try your luck with that terrifying woman unless you want to have a gloomy day.\nThe invincible lady of Yanshang Teahouse is none other than Yelan herself, and one of her guises is that of the owner of this teahouse.\nA while ago when she came back from abroad, Liyue had just weathered the Osial crisis, and the Fatui who had occupied Yanshang Teahouse were now largely out of the game.\nYelan seized the opportunity to take it over, turning the teahouse into a secret base.\nOn the one hand, with people from all walks of life to be found here, the teahouse serves as an ideal source of intel. On the other hand, as Yelan has no issue with occasionally giving herself a break, she will pretend to be a regular customer, drinking some tea and playing a few rounds of some game.\nEvery round of finger-guessing is a tiny adventure, and every roll of dice sends sporadic thrills down her spine. Even the smallest challenge is something she can never get enough of.\nAs an intelligence operative, Yelan takes pride in her skills — she is confident that she can read her opponents' eyes and roll the dice such that they fall outside the rules but well within her designs.\nIf there is a draw, that could only mean one thing: Her opponents are cheating too.\nDon't try to reason with her. The very concept of "reasoning" is simply foreign to the Yanshang Teahouse, nor does it exist in Yelan's vocabulary.\nBe good and choose between the pain of losing and the disgrace of cheating.\nYou want to have neither, huh? Then why don't you turn the clock back to the very beginning? \nDon't play dice at Yanshang Teahouse! ｜ 别在岩上茶室玩骰子。\n如果你实在想玩，请和熟悉的人一起。\n如果有陌生女人向你发出邀请，请无视她。\n这是来自行家的忠告。\n除非想跟一天的好心情说再见，否则，你不应和那个可怕女人过招。\n这位茶室常胜将军正是夜兰。岩上茶室之主——她的另一重身份。\n那时她刚从异国回来，恰逢璃月度过漩涡之魔神带来的危机。此事过后，原本占据岩上茶室的愚人众均遭清洗出局。\n借此机会，夜兰入主岩上茶室，将这里改造为隐秘办事处。\n一方面，茶室来客鱼龙混杂，是极好的情报来源；另一方面，她不介意偶尔放松一下，扮作熟客，喝两口茶，玩两把骰子。\n危险的本质是不定数。在夜兰眼中，玩骰子亦是如此。\n每次猜三划五都是一场微型的冒险，每次呼幺喝六都能收获一些零星的刺激。哪怕只是极轻微的挑战，她也乐此不疲。\n作为一名情报工作者，她更自信于手腕，相信自己能从对方眼神中读取信息，或是轻振手腕，掷出不合规则却合心意的点数。\n假如胜负仍是五五之数，那便只有一种可能——是对手在出千。\n不要试图讲道理。岩上茶室里没有道理可讲，那个女人更没有。\n还是乖乖地在「输家」和「该死的老千」中选一个吧。\n都不想选？那何不让一切回到最初呢？\n——别在岩上茶室玩骰子。
- "Sorry, we are currently out of stock. We can reserve a pair for you that we will make once our ore and gem inventory is replenished." ｜ 「实在抱歉，暂时无货。但敝店可为您预订一双，待矿石到齐即刻开工。」

- The name "Sacred Mountain" comes from woven scrolls from a long, long time ago... As far as we're concerned, it's nowhere near as sacred as the Stadium of the Sacred Flame. ｜ 「圣山」的称呼是很久很久以前的织卷留下来的…对我们来说，还是「圣火竞技场」要更「圣」一筹呢。

- Whoa... There are heaps of withered flowers. Quickly, let's clear these piles. ｜ 哇…真的堆积了不少呢，快把这些枯花堆清理干净吧。

- Are you still worried about Inayah? ｜ 你也有点放心不下阿娜耶吧？

- A fruity drink with a pleasantly sour taste. The redolence of tea carries your thoughts away. With one sip of this tea, you feel as if you are lazing in a flourishing orchard, tipsy in the gentle breeze that carries a fruity scent. ｜ 酸甜怡人的果饮。绵长空幽的茶香带着思绪走远，仿佛置身于枝叶繁茂的果园之中，一阵风拂过，送来甘甜沁爽的果香，引人沉醉。
- I've visited him before. He's a slightly eccentric old man. ｜ 我去看望过他，是个有点奇怪的老人。
- ...I'm from Haravatat. ｜ …我是知论派的。

- The cream of Liyue's mercantile crop all see "ascending to the Jade Chamber" as the greatest honor. Each brings rich gifts as they visit, all to curry a little favor with Ningguang. ｜ 璃月的顶级富商们，都把「登上群玉阁」当作从商生涯的无上荣耀。人人都带着豪礼，只为从凝光手中换取些许好处。

- I guess this is a sort of culinary clash of the titans. ｜ 这就是所谓的棋逢对手吧。
- Weapon forging material. Can be used to forge 4-star bows.\nPhilosophers believe that there are four purposes behind earthly things. The purpose of these billets is to become a weapon worthy of accompanying a hero. ｜ 生产武器的原材料。通过锻造，可以生产出4星的弓。\n哲学中认为尘世间事物，皆具备四种成因。这些原胚的「目的」，正是成为陪伴英雄的武器。

- Actually, I was thinking about lending her a professions guide. ｜ 倒是有一本就业指南。

- How may I be of service to you? ｜ 请问有什么可以效劳的吗？
- But I see no good in divulging the offender's name. Perhaps he himself was well aware that what he did was no good thing. See — he didn't even leave his name at the end of this letter. ｜ 不过，罪人的名字这里就不作赘述了。可能他也觉得不是什么好事吧，你看，他自己也未在这样的信件后留下名字。
- ...Hey, you know where we haven't been in the longest time? Wanmin Restaurant. ｜ 唔…说起来，最近这段时间，好像没怎么去过万民堂呢…
- I now formally cede the position of captain to you. Swordfish II awaits your orders. ｜ 现在，我正式把「队长」一职交给你。剑鱼二番队，随时待命。
- Did it fall into the sea? Paimon is pretty sure we saw some similar buildings in the ocean outside of the dream... ｜ 不会落到海里去了吧…总觉得好像在梦境外的海面上看到过类似的建筑什么的…
- Don't act like you're in the know when you obviously don't have a clue! ｜ 明明不知道，就不要装出很了解的样子啦！
- Hehe, we think so too! ｜ 嘿嘿，我们也都这么想。
- ...I'm truly sorry. ｜ …真的对不起。
- According to the marks on the map from Yuften, this must be the right place! ｜ 按照尤夫腾在地图上标的记号，应该就是这里没错啦！
- Cunning Plan: Cash Advance ｜ 巧计·速进斗金
- Clues to the Court of Desolation and a suspicious list were found from Taj's home. Although you don't know why Taj keeps such important information at home, you decide to go back and meet Cyno first. ｜ 从塔杰家中找到了关于归寂之庭的线索，以及一份可疑的名单。虽然不知道塔杰为什么会把这么重要的情报放在家中，但还是先回去和赛诺会合吧。

- That should do it! The light should shine far and wide now. ｜ 这样就好了！嗯，光肯定能照到很远的地方。
- Let's play Genius Invokation TCG. ｜ 进行「七圣召唤」的对局吧。
- "Tales of Humanity":\nRaising dogs is hard work. My Baguette never seems to run out of energy.\nEvery day I'm completely shattered after finishing work, but Baguette somehow still wants to go out for a walk!\nI don't even have the strength to go out and buy more dog food for the following day...\nIf someone could bring over some fresh <color=#3399CC>Raw Meat</color> to my place, that would be much appreciated. I'd even be willing to pay extra! ｜ 「人间百态」：\n养狗太累了，贝格艾蒂的精力好像永远也消耗不完。\n每天我和贝格艾蒂的工作结束之后，我已经累得不行了，它竟然还能神采奕奕地要求出门散步。\n我的天，我连给它采购第二天的食物的力气都没了。\n希望有人能帮忙送新鲜<color=#3399CC>兽肉</color>上门，我愿意付额外的费用。
- All joking aside, I'm glad you're here. Let's get moving and take care of this as soon as possible. ｜ 嗯~等得我胳膊都僵了！走吧，动起来，尽快把事情办妥。
- Talent Level-Up material.\nResistance is the backbone of the city of Wind.\nThe history of Mondstadt is one of resistances. People rose up to grant the citizens of Mondstadt the freedom they now enjoy, like the Anemo Archon blowing away the snow, or like Vennessa rising up to fight. ｜ 天赋培养素材。\n风之国土的脊梁是抗争。\n蒙德的历史即是抗争的历史。抗争是为了蒙德现在的人们能够拥有自由，正如风之神吹散冰雪，正如温妮莎奋起抗争。
- Was hit by a Surge of Vengeance three times during this challenge. ｜ 此次挑战中，被杀生潮涌击中三次。
- When Ayaka crafts Weapon Ascension Materials, she has a 10% chance to receive double the product. ｜ 合成武器突破素材时，有10%概率获得2倍产出。
- Ah... Look at the horizon! There's a storm brewing in the distance... ｜ 啊——是预兆！远方好像有风暴潮来临的预兆…

- A Fontainian perfumer, one who bottles secrets. ｜ 枫丹香水设计师，将秘密藏于瓶中之人。
- Oh, I would be happy to try some. ｜ 哎呀，那我就不客气了。
- There was no need to, really... because my divinations are never wrong. ｜ 毫无必要。因为，我的占卜结果不会出错。
- Ema ｜ 绘真
- The Outlander Affairs Agency. ｜ 「远国监司」。
- Still, I'm glad to have heard this once more. Thank you so much. ｜ 但是仍然很高兴能再听到这首曲子，谢谢。
- Teyvat Travel Guide ｜ 提瓦特游览指南
- One has also sampled the delicacies of Mondstadt City. ｜ 浅尝了蒙德城本地美食。
- A precise instrument used for keeping time. For a doctor, every second counts. ｜ 用来精确计时的道具。对医者而言，即使是一秒的时间也不能浪费。
- The team obtained 35 Reminiscence Tokens in total ｜ 队伍总计获取35枚追想币
- Oh, ah, yes... YES! ｜ 唔，好、好的！
- "Provide some comments"? I was bestowing instruction! ｜ 指指点点？我是在教你！
- Uh... you weren't peeking on us from the skies the whole time... were you!? ｜ 你该不会一直在天上偷看吧？
- You have no food with which to satiate your hunger, no means with which to counter the hoards of monsters. And the gods loom overhead, capable of reducing you to ashes with a simple snap of their fingers. ｜ 你们终日食不果腹，随时都要戒备魔物的侵扰，其他魔神只要动动手指，你们就会化为灰烬。
- A pizza covered in cheese and mushrooms. If you can bite through the brick-like texture... At least it can ease your hunger. ｜ 铺满蘑菇和奶酪的薄饼。只要能忍耐像砖头一样的口感，它作为主食提供的能量还是实打实的。

- Well, if it's what fate has decreed... ｜ 罢了，罢了，也算是缘分到了吧…

- Yes. Any information about The Balladeer or the kabukimono in other records will have been changed. But I wrote this story in a way that means, it was left intact. ｜ 对。尽管其他记录中有关「散兵」、「倾奇者」的内容都已被修改掉，这份经过我转写的故事也不受影响。
- Oh wait, that's right! We can <color=#00E1FFFF>find a way to pass through gaseous phlogiston</color>, just like the Qucusaurus from back there! ｜ 对哦！<color=#00E1FFFF>穿越气态燃素的办法</color>，就像…刚才的绒翼龙那样！
- *cough* It's rare for people to venture out this way. What can I help you with? *cough* ... Is that a little Tepetlisaurus? ｜ 咳咳…真是很少见到的面孔啊，怎么了，咳咳…怎么还有只小嵴锋龙…
- Everyone has their own imagination. After some chance coincidence, she met an "Aranara." ｜ 每个人都有独属于他的幻想，在过去的某种机缘巧合下，她见到了「兰那罗」。
- "In the name of Narukami's envoy." ｜ 「鸣神敕使」。
- Ah, is that how it is... Agh, to think that I did not factor the ground into my calculations. Ah, what an error. ｜ 我想想，原来是这样…居然没有考虑到地面系数的变更，真是意料之外的失误。
- Shut it, Paimon! ｜ 派蒙！
- You know, Fungi don't exactly "eat" anything. Instead, they "absorb" nutrients from a specific environment through a unique process. So, as you can see, it would be pretty troublesome to have the Fungi consume something solid... ｜ 要知道，蕈兽是不会「吃」东西的，只会用一种特殊的方式，从特定环境中「汲取」养分。所以要让蕈兽摄入物质，就比较麻烦…
- I don't know very many people, so I can't help you out much, but Miss Ganyu and the Qixing know just about everything. ｜ 我认识的人不够多，帮不上什么忙，但是甘雨姐姐，还有她一直辅佐的七星，他们什么都知道。
- #{NICKNAME}, see who the sender is. Maybe we can sort this out. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，快点看看是谁寄的，说不定我们能帮帮忙呢。
- I can't believe that I was so careless when I was damaging the cart... ｜ 居然疏忽了，破坏货车的时候…
- Is this hinting at the next treasure location? ｜ 难道，这是在暗示下一个藏宝地吗？
- Complete Time Trial Challenge ｜ 完成限时挑战
- *sigh* Well, I'm just staying here for the time being. My elder brother is a guard here — yes, he's the one guarding the cellar door. ｜ 唉，是这样的，我只是在这里借住一段时间…我的哥哥是这儿的守卫，对就是地窖门口那位…
- When the heat is on, you'll rise to the challenge! ｜ 香菱，燃起斗志了！
- Ah, greetings, Honorary Knight! ｜ 你好呀，荣誉骑士前辈。
- Do you have some tea? The more bitter, the better. It leaves the most fascinating aftertaste. ｜ 有茶吗？越苦越好，回味无穷。
- Legendary High Roller ｜ 高倍率牌手传说
- (...But, what if someone follows us? If we go straight there, and someone is on our tail, aren't we just exposing the eye's location?) ｜ （…可是，如果我们就这样过去的话，万一被跟踪，岂不是反而暴露了隐藏位置？）
- I'm sorry... I was hoping to put up some decorations but ran out of time to do it by myself. ｜ 抱歉…其实我有想过做一些装饰，但是因为人力和时间关系…
- My buyers are all long-time clients, and our cooperation has always gone smoothly. It's just that I have to dig in my heels whenever it comes to the price of replenishing their stock... ｜ 客户都是些老主顾了，合作一直很稳定，就是每次进货时都要和我在价格上掰扯一番…
- Earn {param2} Artificer Points in Preset Domain Imaginarium: Trove Sweeper ｜ 在预拟秘境「拟想·凌风寻宝记」中，获得{param2}神工点
- I should be more conscientious with my measurements next time. ｜ 下次测量，一定要考虑得更谨慎些…

- Whatever the case, since you need Mora, allow me to recommend a certain long-term gig to you. ｜ 总之，既然你需要摩拉，那我给你推荐一个长期的工作吧。
- Of course! But just you wait — we're quick learners and then some! ｜ 那是当然！你就等着好啦，我们学东西向来很快的！
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Paimon will never forget the first saurians we saw in Natlan. They're just fascinating creatures.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> There was the Tepetlisaurs with their bouncy heads, the Koholasaurs with their smooth backs, and then the Yumkasaurs with their fluffy ears and heads.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> I bet a baby Yumkasaur would make the best teddy bear...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Yeah... Hey, their fur probably keeps growing out as they get older, right? Do you think it starts getting in the way eventually?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Like, imagine if a Yumkasaur had really long fur around the ears and head... they'd barely be able to see where they're going. And that could be kinda dangerous...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> You seem to have thought a lot about this. Are you planning on becoming a saurian hairstylist?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Uh... Are you serious?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Just think about it. Once you get famous, you'll be rolling in Mora!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Oh... You're right! This is it, this is how Paimon makes her fortune!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Paimon's gonna become the hairstylist for every Yumkasaur in Natlan! Hehehe, so much Mora...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> No, wait, the Mora's secondary! The best part of this plan is making friends with all the Yumkasaurs! Life will be sooo happy!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> But they're big, you know. It's gotta take a long time to style all that fur with just an ordinary pair of scissors. You might find you can only take one customer per day...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> If you're serious about this stylist business, you'd better start building some strength! At the very least, aim to lift a pair of scissors as big as the Dull Blade!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> The Dull Blade? But isn't that your weapon?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Yeah, but I can let you borrow it for training. Come on! Let's get practicing!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Hey... This isn't "training," this is "give Paimon the sword and let her fight the monsters instead"! Paimon did not sign up for this! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我们刚到纳塔遇见的三种龙伙伴都很特别呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>小嵴锋龙的脑袋弹弹的，小鳍游龙的背滑滑的，小匿叶龙的耳朵和脑袋毛茸茸。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>毛茸茸的小匿叶龙，抱着睡觉一定很香…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不过，我记得很多动物的毛发会长得很长，也不知道会不会影响它们的行动？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>就比如说，如果匿叶龙耳朵和头上的绒毛太长，说不定会挡住眼睛，看不清前面的路，还有一点危险…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>既然派蒙想到了这一点，就由你来帮匿叶龙修理发型吧！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸，我吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>等你成为了纳塔有名的龙之发型师，还能赚大钱！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>说得对喔，没想到还能用这种方式发财！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>整个纳塔的匿叶龙都由我来理发，嘿嘿，摩拉…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不对不对，摩拉是次要的，能和一整个纳塔的匿叶龙做朋友，肯定超开心！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>但是匿叶龙那么——那么大，用普通的小剪刀，不知道要修剪多久，也许每天只能给一只龙做发型。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>要想成为厉害的龙之发型师，派蒙就得好好锻炼锻炼了，至少要拿得起…无锋剑这么大的剪刀！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>无锋剑…那不是你的武器吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我们可是好伙伴。走吧走吧，现在就去野外为你上第一堂课。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不要以训练的名义把魔物推给我处理啊！

- A strange, alien machine.\nThey say that it is a war machine left behind by a nation that has already been destroyed. Composed of several different parts, it can adapt to its combat environment and employ a variety of attacks.\nThis machine, comprised of cubic shapes, is on some level very much like the elemental hypostases. ｜ 诡谲的异形战斗机械。\n传说是已经覆灭的国度留下的战争机械。由若干部件构成，能够适应战斗的环境变换成不同形态，施展各种攻击手段。\n由立方体构成的形态在某个层面而言，与所谓的「无相元素」有着不少相似之处。
- A bow rack with two commonly used medium-sized bows that have a balanced size, draw weight, and combat utility. The arrows of recommended weight have a straighter trajectory, allowing even beginning bow learners to quickly adapt to its various characteristics. For experienced bow users, the bowstrings can be adjusted to adapt to heavier arrowheads for higher accuracy at longer ranges and greater impact. ｜ 装有两具通用中型弓的弓架，平衡了尺寸、弦的拉力和进攻性，使用建议重量的箭头时，箭的轨迹平直，刚刚上手弓箭的新人也能快速适应它的各项特性。对于弓箭老手而言，则能适当微调弓弦，配以更重的箭头，以求远距离的命中率和打击力。
- Oh? Sorry, which publication are you from? How come I haven't met you before? ｜ 哦？你们是哪家报社的？为什么之前都没见过？

- A massive amount of Pyro energy is coursing through this scorching ancient sacrificial altar.\nYou will get scorched by merely being here.\nYou shall earn Talent level-up materials, if — and only if — you can pass the trial. ｜ 这座炽热的古代祭祀场中，聚积了大量的火元素之力。\n置身其中会受到持续的高热灼烧。\n若能通过其中的试炼，或许能获得令人天赋成长的物质。
- Use your refutations to convince the audience and obtain more support from the people. The Oratrice will display such shifts clearly. ｜ 以驳斥的方式说服在场观众，可使我方的观点得到更多人的支持。「谕示机」会清晰展示此种变化。
- So you were the "King," huh? Hmm... Somehow, that part doesn't sound so far-fetched. I actually think you'd fill those boots quite easily. ｜ 国王啊…哈，不知怎么我还挺相信你能胜任。
- I was planning on badmouthing him a little more, but from the looks of things, there's no need to torment myself over it anymore. I should be celebrating! ｜ 本来我还想再数落那家伙一番的，现在看来，也不必再折磨自己的心神了，我确实应该好好庆祝一番！
- I'd love to give the festival another shot, but wouldn't you know it — the plans fell through again... How can they mess up this bad twice in a row? ｜ 我是很想再见见那位负责人，可没想到，盛典又没了下文…该不会，他们又把事情搅黄了吧？
- Now, now, little girl, are you sulking again? ｜ 哦？小姑娘又不高兴了？
- What about Loillier and Concini? ｜ 关于卢瓦利耶和孔锡尼…
- I don't want to go right now, and I should respect how I feel in the moment, right? Now, all you need to do is follow my example. ｜ 因为我现在不想去，我要尊重自己「现在」的想法，给你做个好榜样。

- Well that's gotta be an understatement — I doubt you carried me all the way to Bubu Pharmacy by one finger! Honorary Knight, I can't thank you enough. Please, let us give you something for your efforts. ｜ 举着我去不卜庐的吗？荣誉骑士阁下，你太辛苦了，我们的心意一定要收下才行。
- Alright, I know my brother's looking for me. I'll head back soon, so he doesn't worry. ｜ 好啦，我知道哥哥在找我，等会我就会回去啦。不会让哥哥担心的。
- You're safe now. Just follow the guards and leave this place. ｜ 已经安全了，跟着看守们离开这个地方吧。

- You mean... Layla? ｜ 难道你说的是…莱依拉？
- But Miss Victoria never listens to me, she just says she wants me gone. ｜ 但每次维多利亚修女都不听我解释，直接把我赶走了…
- I'll go ahead later and show you how to navigate the reefs on the way correctly! ｜ 待会儿我会先行一步，在途径的礁石上告诉你们如何进行正确的航行！
- There's a box over here. Why don't we open it? Uh, and by "we," Paimon means you... Paimon's just scared that... whatever's inside might bite her fingertips off... ｜ #这边有个盒子，打开看看吧？{NICKNAME}你来动手…我、我怕里面的东西会咬我的手指头…
- Tiny Miracle's Feather ｜ 奇迹之羽
- Open ｜ 开启
- In the past, I've lost a carved wooden perch and some boneware, but as soon as I reported them missing to the Knights, they were recovered right away. ｜ 以前也丢过鲈鱼木雕、骨制装饰之类的东西，不过报告给骑士团之后，很快就找回来了。
- Level Up! ｜ 升级成功
- "The culprit is where he should be." This is an undeniable fact. ｜ 「负罪之人在他应在的地方。」这事实确凿无疑。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- *cough*... When did this person get so strong? Looks like the men following The Captain failed to update us on the latest intelligence... ｜ #咳咳…这个{NICKNAME}的战力怎么突然提高了这么多？看来跟随「队长」的那批人没有及时向我们更新情报。
- The standard ceiling of the Illusory Annex resembles traditional architecture domes, with a circular central space that greatly enhances the sense of space within the building and improves overall lighting effects. They say that the dome's unique configuration also has the marvelous effect of contributing to indoor circulation, keeping the air inside relatively fresh.\nHowever, by contrast, the flowing air, while swirling about carefully groomed hair and skirts, also stirs up dust.\nThis means dust cannot accumulate in specific corners for an extended period, but also evenly distributes it throughout the entire room. If one deceived by the brief cleanliness of the room should neglect to clean it, dust will soon become the master of this room.\nBut then again, what room is not ultimately subject to the mastery of dust? ｜ 「幻景别宫」的标准天花板，圆形的中央空间如同传统建筑的穹顶，极大提升了建筑内部的空间感，改善了整体光照效果，据说还有着奇妙的功效——穹顶的特殊构型有助于室内空气的流通，让屋内的空气保持着相对的清新感。\n但与之相对的，流动的空气在卷起精心打理的秀发与裙裾的同时，也将灰尘扬在空中。\n虽然灰尘无法长期堆积在特定角落，但换句话说，它们也均匀地分布在了整个房间里。如果被房间内短暂的洁净骗过，疏忽了打扫的话，那么很快灰尘就会成为这件房间的主人。\n——但再换句话说，每一间房间最终的主人都是灰尘。
- A dragon, bigger than those from the rhymes! But I won't be scared! ｜ 那就是歌谣中的恶龙，比想象中的更大…但我不会害怕！
- Let's pass our map to Neko to mark out, shall we? ｜ 接下来就把地图给寝子吧。
- Go to the Kingdom of Water Imps ｜ 前往水妖王国
- *sob* Aranakula and Arakunti can't beat Arabalika even if they team up. ｜ …呜…兰那库拉和兰贡迪一起也比不过兰百梨迦…
- A Note Someone Stuffed You ｜ 被人塞在身上的纸片
- ...Despite my initial reluctance to sponsor a Knights of Favonius event in any way... ｜ …虽然根本不想参与你们骑士团的活动。
- Chaussivert takes the helm, and you rush to the pick-up point that Covault mentioned. ｜ 肖西韦尔掌起了舵，你们迅速赶去了科沃所说的「接货点」。
- Ugh, why do you guys have to be so creepy about it? ｜ 唔，你们在说什么恐怖的话呢。
- But I'm sure it will turn out okay. We put in the legwork, after all. ｜ 不过我相信没问题的，毕竟我们一起努力过了。
- It's time to show off the results of our cooking training! ｜ 是时候展示「烹饪修行」的成果了。
- Sigewinne ｜ 希格雯
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- Enable ｜ 开启
- They were going to bring her back in a cage... But she woke up and tore the cage apart, and then, the guy standing closest to her... Oh my, poor Jophery... ｜ 他们原本想用笼子把她运回去…但是她醒了过来，扯碎了笼子，然后，离她最近的那个兄弟…可怜的乔佛里…
- Finally... ｜ 想当初…
- That won't be necessary, I'm willing to accept the past. Our little hero Ann's adventure is hers alone. ｜ 不必了，我愿意接受这个过去。小小勇者安的冒险是属于她自己的。
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Hmm. Your thought process is rather chaotic, as is the way in which you articulate it. ｜ 嗯，思维和语言表达都相当混乱。
- Prized Isshin Blade ｜ 「一心传」名刀
- Safe Destruction ｜ 安全击破
- Uh... Ahem, hello one and all. I couldn't help but overhear your conversation just now... ｜ 啊…咳，那个，你们好，不小心听到了你们的谈话…
- Hmph, lousy older brothers! All they care about is taking the best finds for themselves. ｜ 什么兄弟，大哥们只会把好东西自己先拿到手！
- Current Motive Force has reached maximum, unable to obtain more ｜ 当前驱动力已达上限，无法继续获取

- "Why not just have them ask the omnipotent 'Oratrice Mecanique d'Analyse Cardinale'? After all, it decides all matters of right and wrong here in Fontaine." ｜ 「不如让他们问问万能的『谕示裁定枢机』吧，反正在枫丹所有的对错都是由它来决定的。」
- Tell me about the Special Security and Surveillance Patrol... ｜ 关于特巡队…
- Wait, where is the score? Do you not have it, Lutong!? ｜ 等等，我的那份乐谱在哪？你没有收着吗？路通！

- Played by Clorinde ｜ 克洛琳德饰
- Hey! Look, the cart's right there! ｜ 欸！你看，马车不就在那边吗！
- A door made of fragrant cedar.\nThis door has a window and it bears a simple yet lovely pattern.\nShowing yourself to your visitor through the windowpane is one aspect of Liyue's tradition of receiving guests. ｜ 以「垂香木」制成的房门。\n门上设有窗格，花纹古朴美观。\n透过窗格，向造访的对象展示自己的身影，是璃月人作客的礼节之一。
- I used to think that the golden sun and dark shadows of the night could never understand one another. But in you, I see a kind of strange complexity that has needlessly piqued my curiosity... I'll have to keep a close eye on you. ｜ 我曾经以为，金色的「太阳」和夜色的「暗影」，是无法互相理解的，可你身上有着奇特的复杂性，让我产生了不必要的好奇心…今后也让我继续观察你吧。
- After the wielder is healed, ATK will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>42%</color> for 8s. This can be triggered even when the character is not on the field. ｜ 受到治疗后，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>42%</color>，持续8秒。角色处于队伍后台也能触发。
- There you go. *sob*... Why would anyone invent papers? *sob*... ｜ 给你…呜呜呜…呜呜…为什么世界上有论文这种东西…呜呜…
- Hello! Unfortunately, such an item is not available. I'm afraid what has been lost will never grow back. Sorry for the inconvenience. ｜ 您好，这个没有呢。失去了的东西是不会回来的。不好意思。
- Noodles with Mountain Delicacies ｜ 山珍热卤面
- What exactly is it you need to finish doing first? ｜ 说起来，是什么任务来着？
- I'll give it to you straight. I want to make ships carry more things without raising their cost. ｜ 简单来说，就是我想在不提高造价的情况下，让船能装更多的东西。
- Hehe, I will be your rival. For the record, I'm a really good runner! ｜ 嘿嘿，这次就由我来和你对决。先说好，我可是很擅长跑步的喔。
- Ooh, that's a huge treasure chest! ｜ 哇！好大的宝箱！
- I must say, this is most intriguing... ｜ 不过，这就有意思了。
- Mm! Smart Yellow Fur! Mamesuke grateful! ｜ 呶！黄毛聪明！豆助谢谢！

- Honestly, even just watching that was exhausting... ｜ 真是的，就算是在边上看着，也觉得跑得好累…

- They wandered aimlessly over the centuries, gradually spreading to every corner of Teyvat. ｜ 在漫长的时光中不断游荡，逐渐散落在了提瓦特大陆的各个角落。
- We haven't seen our Sumeru friends for a while now. Paimon wonders how they're doing... ｜ 好久没跟须弥的朋友们见面了，不知道大家最近怎么样？
- We are members of an evil organization... *sob* ｜ 呜呜，是邪恶组织的成员。
- Woohoo! ｜ 好耶！
- Now, remember not to <color=#00E1FFFF>run or put yourself in harm's way</color>. Otherwise, you'll spill the soup, and the customer will refuse to take it. ｜ 对了，你送的时候<color=#00E1FFFF>别乱跑，见到危险情况也绕着走别被撞了</color>。要是汤弄洒了的话，客人肯定是不会收的。

- Well met, youngster. ｜ 年轻人，你好。
- Hey, Tighnari! We came here to check out this Extravaganza event... and then they invited us to be guest commentators! ｜ 嘿嘿，我们也来学院庆典玩啦！而且我们现在还是特邀评论员呢！
- I can't help it! I'm not ready. I can't even get the words out! ｜ 没办法！我还没做好准备，根本开不了口嘛！

- A dried flower stained black with blood and now as hard as steel. Probably some sort of a memento for its former master. ｜ 被血染黑，变得如钢铁一般坚硬的干花。对故主而言，是某种纪念品吧。
- This building is found at the highest point of the Court of Fontaine, and is the site where all administrative affairs in the land are handled. The office of Iudex Neuvillette is here, and as far as Fontainians are concerned, the Palais Mermonia is essentially the highest authority in the land. ｜ 坐落于枫丹廷最高处的建筑，也是处理枫丹一切行政事务的公共场所。最高审判官那维莱特的办公室也位于此处，在枫丹民众眼中，「沫芒宫」在某种程度上便也等同于至高的权威。
- It's definitely that one. ｜ 就是那个。
- 'Cause Paimon's curious, that's why! It's like when you have a tune stuck in your head, but you don't even know what it is. It's driving Paimon crazy! ｜ 光凭大脑想象不出来是怎样的音乐，有好奇心也很正常吧！

- Kumi would like you to go the hilichurl camp in the west to check on Anisa's safety. ｜ 久美需要你前去西边的丘丘人营地确认阿妮萨的安危。

- Before we discuss this further, I believe Nacker or Ms. Chronie must have mentioned something to you already. ｜ 在谈这件事之前，我想您应该听纳克，或者克洛妮艾小姐提到过。
- "Card games are a chance to hone your skills and practice your strategy... Let's do this!"\nHint: Gorou's deck specializes in playing large numbers of Location Cards to gain survival and resource advantages, allowing him to withstand his opponent's attacks before launching a counterattack. ｜ 「牌桌上的较量，也能锻炼策略，磨砺真功夫，令人期待！」\n【提示】五郎的牌组擅长通过大量打出「场地」牌来获取生存和资源优势，顶住对方的攻势后进行防守反击。
- Let's play Genius Invokation TCG. ｜ 进行「七圣召唤」的对局吧。
- Adonis ｜ 阿多尼斯
- Tell me a little about yourself... ｜ 关于你自己…
- #What do you think, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #{NICKNAME}是怎么想的呢？
- Now, now, what evil are you two scheming this time? ｜ 你们又在商量什么坏事？
- You got it! We'll be back in no time. ｜ 放心吧！我们去去就来。
- I lost fair and square, but I tried my best! You're still way ahead of me though. ｜ 输了就是输了，我已经用尽全力啦，还是你比较厉害。
- I'm no storyteller after all — I already found my calling in life. I don't plan on spinning yarns for a living any time soon. ｜ 我又不是说书人。我已经选到了我最喜欢的工作，这辈子也不会成为说书人了。
- The point of friends gathering is to have a good time. Worrying will only dampen the mood. ｜ 朋友聚在一起是为了开心，想得太多反而是一种束缚。
- There's also "A Guide to Tavern Chat," and "Shortcuts to Love"... ｜ 还有这些！《酒馆聊天指南》、《爱情也有捷径》…
- The Electro Archon once used her Musou no Hitotachi to leave a deep scar upon this island. ｜ 神曾以「无想的一刀」，在这座岛屿留下深刻的伤痕。
- Talk to Salsa ｜ 与萨莎对话
- Well, it's getting late. Why don't we call it a day for now. ｜ 今天也不早了，不如将故事暂时结束在这里吧。
- I knew it. Pattyn, how much did Loillier promise you? ｜ 我就知道。帕坦，卢瓦利耶给你开了多少钱？

- So if that's all, I'm rather sleepy right now, so... *yawn* Don't mind me for a bit... ｜ 那么，就拜托你们啦，我现在好困，所以…哈啊，请先让我睡一会儿.…
- Champion Duelist Evaluation Column ｜ 决斗代理人评价栏目
- Wait, where is this conversation going? ｜ 不不不，你们怎么突然开始聊这种莫名其妙的话题啦！

- Awanyu ｜ 「阿万尤」

- In order to pursue the great dream in the morning mist and sea of clouds, the warriors who soared the skies never rested for a moment.\nIn the depths of the distant sea of fog, the story of the ruined city occupied by the devilish dragon guarding that which is forbidden, and above the clouds, the empty ark forgotten in legend awaits the arrival of new guests... ｜ 为了追逐晨雾与云海中的伟大梦想，翱翔天际的战士们从未止歇。\n远方雾海的深处，盘踞废都的魔龙守护着禁忌的故事；而在层云之上，被遗忘在传说中的虚舟也将迎来新的访客…

- A furnishing that can be found in Merusea Village. It combines a small workbench and a drying rack upon which various items have been hung. A simple stone windchime, shells, and several small dried fish wave in the wind.\nFor some reason, when the windchime hits the shells, the gentle sound of rippling water may be heard — a music Melusines consider "the sound of home." ｜ 可见于海沫村内的陈设，结合了小巧的工作台和悬挂各式物件的晾晒架，石制的简易风铃、贝壳和小鱼干随着微风摇摆。\n不知为何，这种风铃与贝壳碰撞时，能够发出水波般的柔和韵律，对于美露莘们而言，正是「家的声音」。
- Idyia! Didn't you promise the adventurer? You need to be more reliable! ｜ 伊迪娅小姐！你不是答应了那位冒险家吗？你要负责啊！
- Hmph, then... I can guess Neuvillette and Clorinde's parts. ｜ 哼，那么…那维莱特和克洛琳德的任务就不用他们自己说了。
- Now, I have more power. But... what does that mean? Please explain. Thank you. ｜ 啊，变强了吗…变强，是什么呢？
- I have already deployed the recon equipment's active unit underwater. It utilizes a special wave... Anyway, it surveys the nearby area with the help of Hydro. ｜ 侦察设备的主动单元已经被我布置到水下了，会利用一种特殊波动…总之是水元素的力量，对附近进行探测。
- My clan's claim to fame is that we outwitted the dragon of old and stole its treasure. Ergo, all articles of value that we own — including the pedestal for the clockwork key — lie behind that door. ｜ 我家族的功绩是智取了旧日恶龙的宝库，偷走了它的财宝。所以包括底座在内的贵重文物全部放在门后了。

- Talk to Saigou ｜ 与西乡对话
- As an assistant, Sucrose does everything she can to support Albedo, and even though his alchemical inquiries tend more towards the abstruse, she finds herself learning a lot every time.\nAfter an experiment lasting five straight days and nights came to its end, Albedo noticed that Sucrose was on the brink of collapsing from exhaustion, and organized a mandatory seven-day vacation for her.\nSucrose began her holiday determined to take a proper rest and regain her energy, but from the moment that she woke up on day one she struggled to adjust to the vacation lifestyle.\nFirst things first, let's get some breakfast: fried eggs, sausages, and a cup of coffee. Nothing new to report there. All of these were foods and beverages that she had previously researched, after all.\nNext, she thought, how about a little rest and relaxation in the sun with a good book? Again, nothing new to report: plenty of research shows this to be one of the most effective means of relaxation. There wasn't a book that she hadn't already read, and there wasn't a query that she hadn't already highlighted, looked into, and later annotated for clarification.\nSo then she did some household chores: laundry, dusting, tidying. Check. Once again — nothing new to report. There was nothing to dispute about the fact that a clean and tidy environment is conducive to mental well-being.\nHalf a day in, and Sucrose had not had the occasion to ask "why" or "how" even once.\nShe was bored, restless, and angsty, and she could not calm herself down.\nShe was desperate to throw herself at a research problem. It didn't matter what it was: She would have happily researched the potted plants on the terrace, even if nothing came of it. Anything just to pass the time.\nBut wherever she looked — the Lamp Grass to her left, the Sweet Flower in front of her, or the Cecilia to her right — all she found were things that she had previously researched in exhaustive detail.\nFinally, she gave up and forced herself to go to sleep. The next day, she reported to the laboratory first thing in the morning.\n"All day long, you have nothing to research, and nothing to question. That's not rest, it's torture!" ｜ 作为助手，砂糖一直尽心尽力地协助阿贝多，虽然课题内容往往都很艰深，但每次也能让砂糖受益匪浅。\n持续五天五夜的实验结束后，阿贝多注意到砂糖体力濒临极限，便为她强行安排了七天假期。\n砂糖本想借着假期好好调整状态，一觉醒来却觉得非常不适应。\n早餐：煎蛋，香肠，一小杯咖啡。没什么好说的，全都是研究过的食物和饮品。\n晒着太阳看书。也没什么好说的，这是研究得出的最好的休息方式之一。书则是早就看过的，有疑问的地方都有批注解答。\n洗衣服，打扫卫生，整理物品，依然没什么好说的。整洁的环境能带来好心情，这是不争的事实。\n——明明半天时间就这么过去了，砂糖却连问出一个问题的机会都没有。\n无聊，烦闷，些许焦躁，让她完全静不下心。\n砂糖实在太想投入随便什么研究了。哪怕是研究阳台上那几盆花也好，她不求成果，只求打发时间。\n可无论是左边的小灯草、中间的甜甜花还是右边的塞西莉亚花，都已被她研究得无比透彻。\n最终，自暴自弃的砂糖强迫自己睡了过去，第二天一早就赶去实验室报道。\n「不能做实验、一点问题都没有的日子，根本不是休息，是折磨！」
- I'm telling you, this dish plus a nice wine would increase the chances of mediation success by thirty percent. Heh, there's nothing quite like some good food and wine to put people in a good mood. ｜ 要是能拿这道菜下酒，调停的成功率应该能上升个三成吧？哼，美食和美酒总是让人心情愉悦。

- Sorush was born after the dust of the previous catastrophe settled, and hasn't witnessed the war of old. Hence, she holds many fantasies as to how things were. ｜ 斯露莎诞生于上次灾厄平息之后，并未亲见古时的争战，因此才会对其有着诸多幻想。

- She gave me a ride, and we traveled all around Natlan together. We were both so happy. ｜ 我又骑上了它，跟它跑遍了纳塔的许多地方，它很开心，我也很开心。
- It wasn't until I crouched down next to them that they suddenly realized that I could see them. ｜ 直到我蹲下来看他，他才猛然意识到我其实是能看见他的。

- ...And so, since then, I've lived my life in human form. Most people who know me just think I was born this way. ｜ 就是这样，从那时起，我一直以人类的样貌生活，很多认识我的人都以为我天生如此呢。

- I brought what you asked for. ｜ 我带来了你要的东西。
- Either way, I will admit that the actions of the adepti this time were quite restrained. ｜ 总之，我也承认，这一次仙人们的行事，已经足够克制。
- Problem solved! ｜ 问题解决了！
- Back when traveling bard Venti had only been in Mondstadt for a few months, his income was far less than the other more established bards in town. But once he had a few Mora in the pot from his performance, you could be sure he would hurry off to spend it at the same place every time — one of the city's taverns.\nUnfortunately for Venti, his childlike appearance meant that his attempts to acquire alcohol failed at every turn.\nThe first time he was refused service, he was heard grumbling: "I'm sure there were no such preposterous regulations last time I was here..." Once he realized that the same rule applied to all taverns in town, he decided he would have to change his approach...\nThe strategy he developed was drinking on the job — that is to say, playing the lyre while holding a wine cup in his mouth, urging his audience to buy him a drink from the bar if they liked his performances instead of giving him Mora.\nThe novelty of this made him quite popular in Mondstadt.\nThere was just one snag — he couldn't help but sneeze if a cat came close...\nAnd if he happened to be holding a wine cup in his mouth when it happened... needless to say, it would spell disaster.\nVenti, therefore, has one golden rule when selecting a spot to perform, and that is that there must be no cats in the vicinity.\nEasier said than done — the stray cats of Mondstadt seem to be quite drawn to him. ｜ 刚来蒙德没几个月，吟游诗人温迪的收入水平还比不上驻唱已久的同行。但每当「工作」后放在地上的帽子里堆积了足够多摩拉，他匆匆而去的目的地，永远都是城里某一家酒馆。\n但以温迪的外貌，他总被当作未成年人，基本没法买到酒。\n第一次碰壁，还能嘟囔几句「上回来蒙德可没有这种规矩」。等发现全城酒馆都只对自己提供无酒精饮品时，就该考虑别的办法了…\n很快，温迪就开发出了一边弹琴一边用嘴咬着酒杯喝酒的绝技。在做吟游诗人的「工作」时，他会呼吁观众把投钱改为投喂，如果喜欢他的曲子，就去酒馆里买些好酒来请他一杯。\n凭借一手绝技，温迪终于又在蒙德如鱼得水起来。\n只是一旦有猫咪靠近，他无论如何都忍不住喷嚏。如果此时正咬着酒杯，便会制造出极其惨烈的现场效果。\n所以温迪选「工作」地点的原则是：躲着猫。\n可一般来说，路过的猫都挺喜欢他。
- Gentleman Poodles, Lady Poodles, and Guard Poodles... How are the canines of Fontaine special? It makes one quite curious... ｜ 绅士犬、淑女犬和卫兵犬…枫丹的犬类究竟有何特别之处呢？真让人在意…
- Come, have a try... ｜ 来试试吧…
- (I could make a delicious Moon Pie and give it to Diluc...) ｜ （要是我做了好吃的月亮派，送给迪卢克大人的话…）
- No wonder. I mean, I got taken out with great ease when I tried to stop you earlier, but this... exceeded my expectations a little. ｜ 怪不得，虽然之前想要阻止你们的时候也被你们轻松撂倒，但是这…可有点超出我的想象了。
- Wait till the next day and talk to Babel again ｜ 等待至次日再向芭别尔询问

- A hat once worn by the witch who dreamt of burning away all of the demons in the world. The large brim blocked her sight. ｜ 曾经梦想烧尽世间魔物的炎之魔女曾经戴过的帽子。宽大的帽檐能遮挡她的视线。

- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 5 rapid strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina to unleash 2 rapid sword strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多五段的连续剑击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，瞬间向前方挥出两剑。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。
- As we discussed, I don't like causing harm to living beings, and you said you need protection. So, why not join forces with us? ｜ 就像我们先前讨论的那样，我不喜欢伤害生命，你也说你需要庇护，那为什么不投靠其他势力呢？
- It appears to be a small fissure... ｜ 是…很小的裂缝？

- This is a test text for cipher letters.\n\nI haven't thought of any suitable scenarios where this tech can be applied.\nConsidering that the energy transfer terminals and their receiving terminals aren't widespread in Fontaine, the use of encrypted images will be limited to within the Fontaine Research Institute.\nTeilhard just loves coming up with such useless inventions. I've already warned him not to vandalize the place.\nThe encrypted images use a special paint that requires an equally special solvent to remove. The formula for the solvent needed to remove the encrypted messages is recorded below.\n(The text below has been removed.) ｜ 这是密图函的测试文本。\n\n目前没有想到合适的应用场景。\n考虑到迁能终端与端末也没能在枫丹大规模推广运用，密图函的使用也会被限制在科学院以内。\n蒂亚尔最喜欢这种没用的发明，姑且已经警告过他不要到处乱涂。\n密图函使用了特殊的涂料，清除也需要特殊的溶剂，现将清除密图函的溶剂配方记录在此。\n【以下的文字被抹去了。】

- Everyone says I have weird taste... Call me crazy, but all I want is for my fowl to taste like fowl, and my fish to taste like fish. ｜ 他们总说我口味刁钻，我的要求很简单啊——禽肉有禽肉味，鱼肉有鱼肉味，很过分吗？
- To be honest, these words are praises that the Divine Priestess used to bestow upon skilled youths. They eventually came to be written on pennants at the Jibashiri headquarters. ｜ 这其实是以前历史里现人神巫女夸青年才俊的话，后来变成了地走官部门里每年流动的小锦旗。
- When all's said and done, all you really want is to protect your beloved Inazuma, forever and ever. Isn't that right? ｜ 总而言之，你只是想永远地守护你心爱的稻妻，是么？

- Eh? But... ｜ 欸？可是…
- No, surely not... a Golden Entreaty!? G—Golden Entreaties actually exist? Incredible! I must include this in my research. ｜ 啊…「通牒金盘」，传说中的「通牒金盘」居然是真的，太好了，我一定要将它记录在我研究的成果里。
- I'm Tlamot. Remember me? I'm the one who gave you those delicious treats before. ｜ 我是特阿墨，记得吗？之前给你吃过好吃的。
- This sharp polearm can seemingly pierce through anything. When swung, one can almost see the rift it tears in the air. ｜ 或许能贯穿一切的锋利长枪。挥舞当中，仿佛能见到空气被枪尖划破的裂痕。

- Sigewinne ｜ 希格雯
- And look, I've even written a p—poem on it... ｜ 你看，我在上面还写了…写了一首诗…
- Goodbye! Come to me if you need any woodworking done! ｜ 再见，有木工活记得来找我啊！
- I hope it's useful to you! ｜ 能帮上忙就好。
- *sniff* I—I know! Because an adventurer's proudest achievement is to die in the course of their final adventure. ｜ 先生…我知道！我们最大的成就，就是死在最后一场冒险的路上。
- Nah, it's fine, I've seen the Phlogiston Engraving on this Spiritdoor enough times to sear it into my memory... ｜ 不用啦，我以前看到过这道「灵道刻印门」上拓印下来的「燃素刻录」，看到过很多次，都可以背下来了…

- Even though he said you can see the Mingxiao Lantern from Wangshu Inn... We should get up close if we wanna get that festival atmosphere. ｜ 虽然他说，望舒客栈也能看见明霄灯…但还是靠近点看，才有节日的氛围呀。
- I've got other things to do right now... ｜ 暂时有别的事…
- You can't ask her those questions and expect her to answer, my dear. The decision is hers to make, and she deserves our support. ｜ 你这么问她也没法回答啊，既然已经决定了，我们就全力支持她吧。
- Other than the two aquabus lines currently running, and a line that ceased operations due to an accident, there were originally two more planned aquabus lines. ｜ 除了正在运行的两条水道，和因事故中止的一条之外，本来还有两条规划中的水道。

- Good, good. You have my thanks. Without your aid, those children would have played and played... and then they would have gone hungry outside. ｜ 这样就好了，谢谢汝等了，要不然这群小家伙肯定又会一直疯玩，然后在野外挨饿了，谢谢汝等帮忙。

- One has, indeed. One's previous stays were all brief. Now that one has made up one's mind to move and settle, one has gained a much better appreciation of the hubbub and commotion of the city, as well as the people's hard work and ardor. ｜ 是啊。以前来璃月港都只是稍作停留，并未真正见识到此处繁华。如今决心要定居了，方觉街巷间人声鼎沸，红尘万分喧嚣啊。
- I do not understand their national administration's mindset. Far too isolationist in my opinion... ｜ 真是不懂他们国家管事的人在想些什么，画地为牢么…
- Seriously...? Even the boss there couldn't differentiate between Smaragdus Jadeite and Smaragdus Nephrite. How does this prove anything? ｜ 这…那个老板自己都分不出哪是「翠珏岩」，哪是「翠含岩」，拿什么证明我那块矿石的真假？

- Motosuke ｜ 元助
- But if you're more of a Wolfhook advocate, bring some of those instead. Personally, I recommend we try the new remedy — it sounds promising! ｜ 如果你觉得「钩钩果」比较好，就麻烦你带一份回来了。我其实很推荐这个偏方的，说不定会有奇效呢！
- What... What is going on...? ｜ 这…这到底是怎么一回事…
- Who is that guy, anyway? A foreign exchange student, or something? He has a pretty incredible hat, never seen anything like it. I tried to get a closer look once, but then I blinked and he was gone. Shame. I won't let him get away next time, though. I also hear he has some pretty interesting ideas... Gotta have a chat with him sometime! ｜ 这位小哥，是不是外国来的留学生啊？帽子挺别致的。有次我想凑近了仔细看看，但眨眼的功夫他就咻地一下消失了。可惜，下次不会再让他跑了。而且听人说那哥们很有想法，我要和他多聊聊！
- Unlocks at Ascension Phase 6 ｜ 突破等级「6」阶后开启
- Huh? ｜ 啊？

- Uhh, are you sure you don't want to hear the rest? ｜ 呃，你确定不继续听吗？
- Elemental Burst: III ｜ 元素爆发·其三
- The night flies by amidst the card games and chats.\nAs the next morning comes, you are buried in each others' pillows, asleep by the extinguished flame. ｜ 很快一夜便在牌戏与闲聊中过去了。\n当第二天朝阳初起时，你们正互相枕藉，倒睡在熄灭的火堆旁。

- But I think I could use a few more pictures. ｜ 可是只有一张的话可不够。

- Oh? What's the matter? ｜ 嗯？你找我有什么事吗？
- About Edwin... ｜ 关于艾德温…
- Those Gardemeks came outta nowhere while you were unconscious, and Navia and her gang saved us. ｜ 那些埋伏的警卫机关趁你昏睡过去的时候忽然冒出来，然后就是娜维娅带着她的手下赶了过来，把我们救下了。
- In any case, I wish you a pleasant stay in Lumidouce Harbor. Goodbye. ｜ 再见。无论如何…祝您在柔灯港过得愉快。
- Sunset Reflection ｜ 「夕阳的投影」
- But it totally glowed when you touched it! ｜ 明明摸上去的时候有好好发光。
- You are the ideal witness to the death of two Fatui. ｜ 让你见证两个「愚人众」的死亡，实在是再适合不过了。
- Complete "Song of the Dragon and Freedom" ｜ 完成「巨龙与自由之歌」剧情
- A Doctor's Odyssey ｜ 游医的奥德赛
- Thank you... That makes me so happy! ｜ 谢谢你们，我好开心。
- I took you to the "border" and let you have a look around, didn't I? But based on your reaction, it seems like you didn't find what you're looking for. It's a pity, indeed. ｜ 嗯？带你们去了「边界」，也是想让你们找找看啊。不过，看你们的反应，应该是没找到，可惜可惜。
- The Shimmering Tree-Shadows ｜ 闪烁蔓延的树影
- Moon Carver ｜ 削月筑阳真君
- *sigh* I'll have to find a place to take a nice shower to get this smell off me. ｜ 哎，这浑身的味儿，得找个地方好好洗个澡才行。

- "Cassiodor" ｜ 「卡西奥多」
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- You know, just some dreams that I have for the future and things I'd like to accomplish one day. ｜ 哎呀，其实就是一些对于未来的期许，还有一些想要在未来完成的事情。
- Talk to Jiayi at the Ministry of Civil Affairs ｜ 前往总务司，与嘉义对话$UNRELEASED
- "You seldom see such vigorous, resolute demeanor in young people these days." ｜ 「年纪轻轻竟如此雷厉风行，在如今的年轻人中间实属罕见。」
- That day, the giant dragon brought us here... ｜ 那天，巨龙将我们带到了这里…
- "I only sold those meals to you 10 days ago, which means you must have eaten 10 a day! I clearly said two servings provide enough nutrients for a full day. It's a wonder you're not wider than a Tatankasaurus!" ｜ 「我这才卖给你不到十天，你居然全吃完了？别人一天两份，你一顿都不止两份，你能瘦才怪呢！」

- Give me a moment. ｜ 再等我一下。
- Obtained from the Imaginarium Theater ｜ 于「幻想真境剧诗」中获取
- Haha, I was merely saying what was on the front of my mind. I hadn't thought you would genuinely go and gather some. ｜ 哈哈，我只是随口一说，没想到你们真去挖了。
- If you are still unwilling to fill in the form, feel free to take a look around. ｜ 如果你还是拒绝填写表格的话，就四处走走吧。
- Thanks to the family business, I've got tons of connections. Haha! ｜ 这也多亏家里的生意积累了人脉，哈哈。
- Oh, wow, look at all the popsicles! Thanks! ｜ 呜哇，又有这么多，谢谢你们！
- Great, I'm glad you like it. ｜ 太好了，宵宫很喜欢呢。
- I was only willing to share this information with you because you are friends of Childe, and it is my duty to see justice done. ｜ 考虑到你们也是「公子」的熟人，出于司法义务，我才愿意将这个信息分享给你们。
- Also, it'll ruin the mood if the reek of alcohol is too strong. ｜ 另一方面嘛，太过浓重的酒气，应该也有些破坏氛围。
- But... it's lucky for Kaeya, isn't it? He's supposed to pay for the intel... ｜ 可是…怎么感觉便宜了凯亚那家伙，说好情报费由他来出的…
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nEnter the Domain and complete the challenges. Assist Researcher Gafoor in recording data from the Ley Lines and earn ample rewards.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20. Complete Archon Quest "Song of the Dragon and Freedom" and the Story Quest "Troublesome Work" to participate in the "Second Blooming" event.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nDuring the "Second Blooming" challenge, you can use characters provided by the event or your own to complete 3 consecutive combat rounds. Characters who are set as "Linked" can appear during multiple rounds for their party.\n\nYou must defeat all opponents within the time limit during the challenge. Complete the challenge with more time left on the counter to earn bonus points and receive medals based on your final score.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenge Limits</color>\nYou will not be able to use food items for the "Second Blooming" event. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动说明】</color>\n深入秘境，完成挑战，协助学者加福尔记录地脉数据，可以获得丰厚的奖励。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20级，完成魔神任务「巨龙与自由之歌」和传说任务「麻烦的工作」后，才能参与「蔷薇再开时」活动。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n「蔷薇再开时」活动挑战中，需要使用活动提供的试用角色或自己拥有的角色，连续进行3轮战斗，配置在「连锁位置」的角色，将会在多个轮次的队伍中登场。\n\n在限制时间内击败全部敌人，即可依据通关时的剩余时间获得额外积分，并根据所得积分获取不同等级的纹章。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【挑战限制】</color>\n在「蔷薇再开时」活动挑战中，无法使用食物等道具。
- Domain of Forgery: Thundering Ruins ｜ 炼武秘境：鸣雷城墟
- Madam Kujou Sara saw he was very serious about the revenge, and that his fighting spirit was commendable. So they picked a day for another duel. ｜ 一开始九条裟罗大人见他十分认真，还算认可他的斗志，约定择日再战。
- *sigh* Now I'll have to get someone to retrieve those packages. Let me think, who's free right now... ｜ 唉，我还得托人去把那些快件找回来。谁有空呢？我想想…
- Well, for one thing, if you want to commemorate something, naturally you're gonna want something loud, bright, and beautiful. ｜ 想要纪念什么的时候，自然需要一些又热闹又漂亮的东西。
- Oh, Mr. Zhu... Yes, I know the place. ｜ 哦…朱老板啊，我知道他那个店。
- Looks like I got carried away... ｜ 看来我大意了呢…
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Huh? Looks like someone calling for help! Let's go have a look! ｜ 咦？好像有人在求救！我们去看看…
- She's the bane of my existence, that's for sure. ｜ 但她一定是早柚的敌人，这是不会错的。
- You're injured... get to safety! ｜ 你受伤了…请暂时退后吧！
- The Jade Chamber is only second? What's the most important thing to her then? ｜ 群玉阁是第二位？那排第一位的呢？
- Ah! Sucrose! I, uh... I was preparing some... stuff... ｜ 啊！砂糖，我、我在准备东西…
- I know it's strange, but someone got to it before me. So I just stuck the knife there as a warning. ｜ 老子去之前，不知道谁先把它弄走了，莫名其妙。老子只好插了一把刀，勉强算是警告一下吧。
- Kirya ｜ 基里亚
- So, that's how you relax... Well, it definitely seems like your style. ｜ 这种休息方式…唔，该说真有你的风格吗？
- "Chasing and playing Dev. They seem quite unconcerned with their surroundings..." ｜ 「追逐打闹的迪弗，不太关心周围的情况…」
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- That way, you'll discover the exaggerated line-work you need for graffiti. ｜ 如此一来，就能构思涂鸦所需要的夸张线条。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- A metal vessel that can be filled with a drink to dispel the loneliness of the long watch. ｜ 金属的容器。可以用来装某种能排遣漫长守望带来的孤独的液体。
- Be brave and give it a try. ｜ 勇敢地去尝试吧。
- If you're willing to help out, could you make me one... No, two — two lanterns? ｜ 你愿意帮忙的话，能不能帮我也编一盏…啊不，两盏，两盏霄灯。
- Very strange indeed... Still no guests. ｜ 奇了怪了，怎么没客人呢…
- Well... Is this what the bad omen that I read today meant? ｜ 唔…今天解读出的不吉之兆，原来是指这个吗…
- If one takes to having a drink to go with any given complaint, one will be liable to drink too much and lose one's wits. ｜ 如果一个人放怀畅饮，每抱怨一件糟糕事就喝下一杯的话，那他一定会喝太多，最后丢掉自个的理智。
- Quaker Pots are special Holding Pots created by the organizer that will award <color=#f39000>20 points</color> when hit. These pots will explode when hit, destroying all Holding Pots in a fixed area. Pots shattered by this will also count towards your score. ｜ 「震壶」是主办方设置的特殊容壶，击中后可获得<color=#f39000>20分</color>。「震壶」被击中后会爆开，震碎一定范围内的容壶，以此种方式击碎的容壶同样计入积分中。
- Hehe, I want the deity's blessings so that after I grow up, I can go to the outside world and see what it's like. ｜ 嘿嘿，我想让神明大人保佑我，长大之后能去外面的世界看看。
- Paimon agrees that you don't need to worry. Otherwise, Heizou definitely would've arrested Itto by now! ｜ 我也觉得肯定没问题啦，不然平藏现在就该把一斗抓起来了！
- Aralila, let's have another match after the moon sinks and the sun rises again! ｜ 兰梨娄！等到月亮下去，太阳上来，再来比试！
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param7:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param7:F1}点
