- Kujou Sara ｜ 九条裟罗
- Hmm, this chest has a bunch of random junk in it... and a battered stone slate? ｜ 唔，这个箱子里是乱七八糟的杂物和…一块破破烂烂的石板？
- Ryuuji's Testimony and Conviction of Shiroyama ｜ 「龙二的口供」与「嫌疑人城山的定罪书」
- No, it's most likely a self-published title. It just appeared out of nowhere and took Inazuma by storm. ｜ 不，这本书应该是自费刊印的，可以说是突然出现并风靡稻妻。
- What? I need to restore the work, so if you want to say thank you, do it quickly. ｜ 怎么？如果有什么感谢的话要说就趁现在，我还得把作品复原。
- Is this the Maushiro? ｜ 这就是…木簧笛吗？
- Haha, and by "this guy over here," you mean me? ｜ 哈哈，我吗？
- Magnifico ｜ 马尼菲科
- Well, then you'll just have to go back and face your master. ｜ 那也没办法，不然你就只能回去见你的师父。
- Ah, it's you. Have you finished taking those pictures? ｜ 是你们啊，画片已经拍好了吗？
- Obtain a stage score of {param2} ｜ 本关积分达到{param2}
- Yun Jin: Friendly ｜ 云堇·友好
- Well, my primary work is forging Ancient Names, which is much trickier than making swords and tools. Aside from the necessary craftsmanship, I also need to consult many ancient texts. ｜ 毕竟，我的主职是打造「古名」嘛。做这个东西，可比锻造刀剑和锄头麻烦多了。除了必要的工艺参考之外，还得参阅许多典籍。
- Don't say that. You still have happy times yet to come. ｜ 别这么说，你会有更多快乐时光的。
- A straight boardwalk. If utilized wisely, it could save a lot of energy and time. ｜ 平直的栈道。如果能在建造工作中巧妙运用的话，或许能省下很多功夫。
- Thoma knits sweaters for the stray cats and dogs, but it seems that one doesn't quite fit. ｜ 托马为流浪猫狗织的毛衣，不过有一件似乎不太合适？
- All I said was that I've never heard of him, and he's treating that like the biggest mistake. ｜ 我说不曾听过他的名号他就不依不饶，好像我犯了什么大错要把我声讨。
- That's right. The items in my collection actually serve a similar purpose to the Ancient Names passed down among the tribes. ｜ 嗯，是这样没错，纪念品的作用，其实和流传于各个部族的「古名」很相似。
- A pizza covered in cheese and mushrooms. It's a party in your mouth and the cheese and mushrooms invited all their delicious friends. ｜ 铺满蘑菇和奶酪的薄饼。嫩菇和脆蔬像是牵起了手，踩着绵软的奶酪地毯在舌尖起舞。
- So, would you like to take it for a keepsake, or would you prefer to sell it to me? I'll pay you a pretty sum. ｜ 怎么样，您是想要留个纪念，还是把这份「宝藏」出给我，卖个好价钱？
- It's just that... ｜ 只是…只是…
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P}×2 ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}*2
- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "A Day in Mondstadt." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含的旋律为「蒙德的一日」。
- Well, no. Caron is a really nice guy, and he didn't mind even though he knew about us. He even told us that we could try the toy out anytime. ｜ 没有没有，卡隆老板是个很温柔的人，即使知道了也不介意，还欢迎我们随时去试玩呢。
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- The number of Artificer Points set in clearance requirements cannot be 0 ｜ 通过条件中所配置的神工点不能为0
- Shadowhunt Shell DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 追影弹伤害|{param3:F1P}
- Amazolli ｜ 阿马佐利
- Groooah! ｜ 唔嗯！
- Ugh! Huh... ｜ ——！！
- Pyro Hypostasis ｜ 「无相之火」
- He's a great friend we met during our travels! ｜ 我们是在路上遇到的！
- Take your time, Paimon. ｜ 慢慢想吧。
- Uh... Benben is right? ｜ 呃…奔奔说得对？
- Some Dodofortresses may generate a shield to defend themselves. Dodofortresses protected by a shield cannot be damaged by Normal Returns. The shield can only be destroyed by Perfect Returns. ｜ 部分「魔球嘟嘟堡」可能生成护盾进行防御。「魔球嘟嘟堡」处于护盾庇护下时，回击「砰砰魔球」无法对其造成伤害，护盾只能通过「完美回击」破坏。
- Calla Lilies are a medicinal flower with antidotal properties. With them in hand, there's no need to worry about the side effects of any potions... Hehe. ｜ 嘟嘟莲是有着解毒功效的药草。有了它，就不用再担心魔药的副作用了…哼哼。
- Opening Treasure Chest: I ｜ 打开宝箱·其一
- I know, right? Makes me feel relaxed just sitting here. ｜ 对吧？光是坐在这里，我就能感觉到身心都在放松。
- By the way, do you know someone named Xavier? ｜ 对了，你认识一个叫泽维尔的人吗？
- Skeptical Hilichurl ｜ 疑惑的丘丘人
- Should Paimon be saying that Natlan truly is a nation of heroes, or that its people are just overly hot-blooded? Even the kids are so fired up! ｜ 该说纳塔不愧是英雄的国度，还是说纳塔人均热血含量超标呢，连小朋友都这么积极。
- Reward for accepting the Tavern Challenge at The Cat's Tail and claiming victory in a Friendly Fracas with the Consecrated Scorpion ｜ 在猫尾酒馆中小王子处进行酒馆挑战，在友好对局难度圣骸毒蝎中获得胜利后获取
- A cup commonly used for fortune-telling. It can also hold water, of course. ｜ 民间流传的算命仪式使用的杯子，也可以装水。
- "Tomorrow morning you are to report for patrol, recruit. Remember there's punishment for failed inspection." ｜ 「这位新兵，明早请来巡逻站报到，自领检查记过处分。」
- I scraped together some intel this time. Only a little, but... better than nothing. ｜ 这次…勉强算是搜集到了一点情报。
- ...Yes! Okay, it's a promise! It WILL be a smashing success! ｜ …嗯！好啊好啊，那我们就说定了！一定会圆满的！
- Heavy-Duty Restaurant Stove ｜ 重型餐馆专用炉灶
- Ei ｜ 影
- Ugh. What's with all this talk about "sacrifice"? Is that really necessary to solve this problem? ｜ 唔，一直在说牺牲牺牲的，难道这个天象必须要牺牲什么才能解决吗？
- And, if I may ask... Nabiya, is there a specific god who's speaking to you right now? ｜ 不知能否问一下…娜比雅，在你耳边说话的是哪位神明呢？
- This is a made-to-order automated feeding machine that Freminet helped construct, intended to deal with the ever-increasing number of small animals at home.\nAfter a certain performance ended, Lynette discovered an abandoned box at the theater's back door.\nAs she opened it, a few kittens, barely a month old, raised their heads in alarm. Yet they had not the strength to flee, and thus could only stare into her eyes anxiously.\nLynette said nothing, nor did she reach out to further startle them. Instead, she simply looked back at them in silence.\nSlowly they seemed to come to the understanding that she meant them no harm, and eventually dipped their straining necks.\nOnly then did Lynette pick the box of cats up, and they laid down in silence, allowing this young lady to take them back to their new "home."\nThere was some small debate amongst family members as to whether the animals should be taken in, but the usually reticent Lynette put her foot down, insisting that they stay.\nThe argument somehow managed to reach the ears of none other than "Father," and she had the final word — which was that her children should cease the silly squabbling.\n"Those who wish to raise them, do so yourselves — but do it well. Don't make trouble for others."\nAfter a short silence, she then added, "And if you have not taught them how to follow the rules by the end of winter, get rid of them yourselves."\nThat statement put paid to the rest of the argument. As for the task of teaching the cats, it fell to Lynette.\nConsidering that Lynette was usually averse to busywork, Freminet had the automated feeding machine custom made.\nThe machine came with an internal clock and a weighing machine that could allow it to feed the kittens various foods at precise times and in fixed amounts.\nThis machine, in turn, became one of the few machines to survive Lynette's tender mercies, never breaking down across many years of service. Indeed, its inner components have remained spanking new, with only the plate beneath the food outlet showing much sign of use.\nAnd this... is because Lynette has never used it properly.\nThe sort of food to add into each box, how to input feeding times and amounts... Rather than memorize that, she found it more convenient to personally prepare the cat food in a plate.\nMoreover, if she had to leave even feeding to a machine...\nLynette squatted next to the Non-Automated Feeding Machine, stroking the satisfied cats' fur in silent thought.\n...How would she be able to teach these children? ｜ 菲米尼帮忙订做的自动给食机关，用以应付家里越来越多的小动物。\n某场演出结束后，琳妮特在剧院后门发现了一口被遗弃的箱子。\n打开箱盖，几只不足月的幼猫惊惶地抬头，却饿得没有力气逃窜，只能紧张地盯着她的眼睛。\n琳妮特没说话，也没伸手惊扰，只是默默与它们对视。\n慢慢地，幼猫们似乎明白了琳妮特并无恶意，终于垂下了仰得酸痛的小脑袋。\n琳妮特这才抱起箱子，一箱小猫不吵不闹，安静地趴在箱底，等待面前的少女将它们带去新的「家庭」。\n关于是否收留这些小动物，家人们进行过一番小小的争论，一向寡言少语的琳妮特这时却一反常态，执意要留下它们。\n事情最后竟传到了「父亲」耳朵里，她一锤定音，要孩子们停止这番无聊的吵闹。\n「要养的自己去养就好了，记得自己管教好，别给其他人添麻烦。」\n沉默片刻，又补上一句：「如果在今年的冬天结束之前，还没教会它们怎么守规矩，就自己处理掉它们吧。」\n「父亲」如此表态，正反双方也都不好再说什么。至于教养它们的任务，则落到了琳妮特身上。\n鉴于琳妮特平日里总是一副怕麻烦的样子，菲米尼特意订做了一台自动喂食机。\n这台机器内置计时与称重机关，还有可以防潮的轮盘式粮箱，可以定时定量为小猫们提供各种食粮。\n这也成了少数在琳妮特手下幸存的机械之一，服役多年都没出过故障，内部结构更是焕然如新，只有出粮口下方的盘子有经常使用的痕迹。\n——因为琳妮特就没正经用过它。\n每个箱格里要加什么类型的食粮、如何设置供餐时间和供餐量…比起牢记这些，还是每天亲手准备猫食装进盘里比较方便。\n更何况，如果连喂食都交给机械的话…\n琳妮特蹲在「非自动」喂食机旁，一边帮吃饱喝足的猫顺毛，一边默默地想着。\n…又怎么能教好这些孩子呢？
- A special training route specially selected by the Adventurers' Guild. It was designed to test an adventurer's all-around athletic ability... ｜ 冒险家协会精心挑选的特训路线。据说能全面考察冒险家的运动能力…
- My flowers... ｜ 呜…我的花…
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: You know who we haven't seen in a while? Xilonen. Last time we saw her, she was lying down in a tree fast asleep.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}</color>: And the time before that, she was sunbathing on the roof wearing sunglasses.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: And the time before that, she was chilling in her home-made rocking chair, sipping fruit juice...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: That's weird, how come our only memories of Xilonen are of her taking a break?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}</color>: Hmm... It could be that those memories only stand out because they're so unusual. Maybe she's such a hard worker that she doesn't take breaks very often.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: You think? Huh. Well, speaking of hard workers, Paimon's been finding herself in that category quite a lot recently.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Like when we were chasing down that baby Tepetlisaur. Paimon had to fly up pretty darn high to show you the way.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: And also the time when we went Cacahuatl-picking, and helped that messenger from the Scions of the Canopy look for their package... Whew, if anything, Paimon's been working TOO hard.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Hmph, Paimon's gonna be doing a lot more slacking off during our commissions from now on. But secretly, so you won't notice!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}</color>: You slack off all you need, Paimon. I'll make sure I don't notice.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Aww, that's so nice of you! In that case... whenever you're slacking off, Paimon will make sure not to notice you, either!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Although actually... It might be easier if we just slacked off together...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Alright, new plan! We'll slack off at the same time, but without watching each other. C'mon, let's go, it's sunbathing time! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>说起来，有一段时间没见过希诺宁了，上次见到她的时候，她还趴在一棵树上睡觉。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>上上次，应该是躺在屋顶，戴着墨镜晒太阳。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>上上上次，好像是坐在自己做的摇摇椅上喝果汁…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>呜哇，为什么我们对希诺宁的印象，都是她在休息啊！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>平时工作很勤奋的人，一旦停下来休息，就会给人留下很深的印象。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>真的？这么一想，我工作的时候也很努力啊。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>上次追那只小嵴锋龙的时候，我为了给你指路，飞得很高很高。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>还有那次帮「悬木人」的讯使找邮包，帮人去采苦种，哇…说起来都好累好累。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哼，以后我们去做委托的时候，我要多多偷懒，而且不让你发现！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我尽量不发现，派蒙就好好偷懒吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>你那么好呀？那你偷懒的时候，我也尽量不发现…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哎呀，这么一想，我们干脆一起去偷懒吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>好，决定了！现在就是我们互相不发现的偷懒时间，快快快，一起躺下晒太阳吧。
- Guardian's Vessel ｜ 守护之皿
- You meet a very strange old man while in Mingyun Village... ｜ 在「明蕴镇」里，突然遇见了一位奇怪的老爷爷…
- Oh boy, here she goes again! ｜ 哦哦哦哦菲谢尔又开始发力了！
- External Audience Support received ｜ 获得来自场外观众的声援
- I tried to ask him about it on the way here, but he didn't answer. Just like always, he never talks about himself... ｜ 在来的路上，我数次追问，他也不肯告诉我是为什么…还是老样子，涉及个人的事，他都一概不提。
- "End"... ｜ 「结局」…
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- *sighs* ｜ 唉…
- CD|{param4:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param4:F1}秒
- That was delicious. Inazuman cuisine largely consists of fresh seafood, which is certainly to my liking. ｜ 真是美味。稻妻的菜肴以新鲜海味为主，很合我的口味。
- Mmmph... ｜ 呜呶呶。
- Hahahaha! I'll be awaiting with bated breath! ｜ 哈哈哈哈！我拭目以待！
- How's that sound, compadre? Get that rock 'n' roll spirit ready, 'cause next time, it'll be your turn to rock our collective socks off! ｜ 怎么样？挚友，下次也让我们看看你的摇滚精神吧！
- Um... are we gonna let this happen? ｜ 欸…这样真的好吗？
- You're tourists, right? Chenyu Vale is a very scenic area. You've come to the right place. ｜ 你们应该是旅客吧？沉玉谷风光很不错，你们来了个好地方。
- Talk to Ann ｜ 与安对话
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- #Well, {NICKNAME}, sounds like someone's life is at stake so we should probably head in and check things out. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，既然事关人命，我们还是先进去看看吧！
- As a result, he developed a rare pathological change. The initial symptoms might not have been obvious, but he's gone untreated for so long that his condition is now very serious. ｜ 它的体内出现了某种罕见的「病变」。最初的症状或许并不明显，拖到现在其实已经很严重了。
- There must be another way! ｜ 一定还有办法的！
- So, what are your thoughts now that you've read it? ｜ 那你看完之后是什么感觉？
- If he's willing to come, we'll be able to bring more gear, go further, and find some better fishing spots... ｜ 要是他愿意来，我们俩就可以带上更多的渔具，也能走得更远，找到更好的渔窝了…
- Kokuchuu ｜ 谷中
- Of course I'm real... And so what if I'm not real? It's the same for me too, I don't know if you're real either! But aren't we still talking to each other? ｜ 我当然是真人…而且，就算不是真人又有什么关系？就像我也不知道你们是不是真实存在的，我们不也一样交流。
- You won't necessarily lose your research opportunities by facing the truth. Besides, did you really want to conduct your research while carrying such heavy feelings of guilt? ｜ 直面问题不一定会让你失去现在的研究环境，而且在痛苦中进行研究应该也不是你想要的吧？
- Is it that you don't remember, or that you need to think about it some more? ｜ 是记不清，还是要再想想？
- If you needed Dandelion Seeds that much, you could just have gathered some out in the wild. I was caring for these ones! ｜ 要是你需要蒲公英籽，那就野外采不就好了，这可是我专门照顾了好久的花！$UNRELEASED
- But sometimes in life, things spiral in a good direction instead. ｜ 但有些时候，情况也会反过来呢。
- Hardly, I would never dare! Please, great and eminent Envoy, guide us. ｜ 岂敢，那么就拜托尊使大人为我们引路了。
- "As I expected!" ｜ 「正如我所料！」
- So I asked myself, what have I done my entire life? ｜ 我总会想，我这一生究竟都做了些什么？
- 5-Hit DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 五段伤害|{param6:F1P}
- I always convince myself it's just bad luck, but if I have nothing but bad luck, does that mean that I'm just... not cut out for this...? ｜ 每次我都相信只是运气不好，但是如果一直运气不好，是不是说明，我就不适合经商呢…
- So, at one point in time, the abandoned Eleazar hospital served as the Akademiya's site for extracting Divine Canned Knowledge. ｜ 也就是说，那座废弃的魔鳞病医院曾经是教令院用于提取神明罐装知识的据点。
- I personally prefer some Tianheng Bohea or some Qiaoying floral tea. Give them a try if you've got the time. ｜ 我个人比较喜欢天衡的岩骨和翘英庄的花乳。小友有空可以试试啊。
- Complete {param0} Open World mechanism-activated Time Trial Challenges in Chenyu Vale. ｜ 在沉玉谷完成{param0}个大世界限时挑战。
- A Favor Repaid ｜ 报恩之守
- Patrolling Mercenary ｜ 巡逻的佣兵
- It's not as if I'm short on Mora or anything... ｜ 我又不缺摩拉。
- Mechanical Crab ｜ 机械螃蟹
- You agreed to Ioroi's request to "bring Kichiboushi out to train."\nTime to head to Guyun Stone Forest this time. ｜ 之前答应了五百藏「带吉法师去外面修行」的请求。\n这回就去孤云阁那边看看吧。
- 4-Hit DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param6:F1P}
- Are you two leaving now? ｜ #{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}，你们要走了吗？
- Iotham is a good boy who's sensible and holds respect for the elders. Now my biggest wish is that he can grow up happy and healthy. ｜ …优丹也是个懂事的孩子，可听我的话啦，现在，他能好好长大，就是我最大的心愿啦。
- Lightfall Sword Base DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 光降之剑基础伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Well, I used to have my own surname, which was, well, some other thing... Either way, the old hag told me when she took me as her disciple that the first step to being a Great Astrologist's pupil was to change that name. ｜ 这个啊，我以前也有自己的姓，不对，是句废话…总之被老太婆收为徒弟后，她就说成为伟大占星术士的第一步是改用这个姓氏。
- The tail feather of a large bird. Perfect for discretely concealing a trump card. ｜ 大型鸟的尾羽，其中能藏得下能改天逆命的牌。
- Once she too gets bored, I shan't have to continue. ｜ 等她也感到无聊的时候，我就不用继续维持这个谎言了。
- How could I just hand her a birthday present that you specially brought for her? ｜ 你特地给妮赫佳拿来的生日礼物，哪能这么直接给出去。
- These stones seem to have... Ishine Script written on them or something. They said it was the priestly language of Tsurumi Island, right? ｜ 这种石头之前好像说是什么「石根文字」来着…是鹤观的祭司的语言？
- When he does things like this, he doesn't really think he's sacrificing himself, because he genuinely believes that he's strong enough to defeat any obstacle he's facing. ｜ 他做这些事，不是要放弃自己，而是相信自己能够克服所有困难。
- Kimosi ｜ 基莫西
- Sometimes, you don't need a plan. ｜ 不需要很明确的目的。
- *sigh* I'd better put up a request at the Adventurers' Guild and see if any adventurer with a Kamera can help out. ｜ 唉，我还是去冒险家协会挂一个委托，拜托哪位手里有「留影机」的冒险家帮忙吧。
- Rhythm of the Sprout ｜ 新芽的曲调
- The Drago{RUBY#[S]Nibelung}n King acquired the power of darkness from outside of this world and led us in a fight against the order established by the outsiders. ｜ 「龙{RUBY#[D]尼伯龙根}王」自世界之外取得漆黑之力，带领我们反抗外来者定义的秩序。
- Deals $[D__KEY__DAMAGE] $[D__KEY__ELEMENT], creates 1 <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C111021]</color>. ｜ 造成$[D__KEY__DAMAGE]点$[D__KEY__ELEMENT]，生成<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C111021]</color>。
- Also, if our clapper loader could avoid shouting at the start of the scene next time... ｜ 另外，场记下次打板时不要喊出声音。

- #Go now, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #快去吧，{NICKNAME}。
- All waited patiently outside the palace, eager to step into the throne room. ｜ 三名勇者在殿外等候，随时准备依次登上殿堂。
- Hm, when the time comes, we will dispose of that batch of old goods. ｜ 哼，等到了那个时候，就把那批老货物给丢了吧。
- And while this wasn't our original intention, all's well that ends well, don't you think? ｜ 虽然和初衷不太一样，但效果好就是好活动，你说对吧。
- Burgundy Umbrellafinch ｜ 赤棕伞雀
- There is no other establishment in Sumeru City with such a luxurious setup. ｜ 全须弥城，没有第二家店有这样的豪华配置了。
- Honestly, I haven't given it any thought. I feel like I have nowhere to go. ｜ 说实话，没有想那么多。感觉我已经无处可去了。
- Titu ｜ 蒂图
- #{NICKNAME}, it's almost time! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，快到我们了！
- The duration of the Frozen status effect is greatly increased. ｜ 冰冻反应的持续时间大幅提升。
- That's a conversation for another time! Miko, please ask Souka to go easy on us when she writes us into the novel! ｜ 蹭饭的事先别计较了啦！神子你千万要让左右加小姐笔下留情啊！
- Once you've gathered everything, try and create some Flaming Essential Oil. No half measures now, give it all you've got! I'll be watching from here. ｜ 找齐材料之后，你就开始尝试炼制「烈火精油」吧。大胆地尝试，我会在旁边看着你的。
- But as time flowed, the mortal could not break the chains of power and ambition that clung to him, betraying the love of the Jinni...\nHence, on the path of revenge, she twisted the fates of her children, wreathing them in a plot to unmake their father and kingdom... ｜ 但后来，凡人终于没能逃脱追逐权力与虚荣，背叛了镇灵的爱意…\n于是…出于复仇的执念，她便扭曲了子女的命运，令他们同陷奸谋，毁却了父亲和王国的命运…
- Tag me in! I got this! ｜ 我不允许你倒下！
- We will do everything in our power to find them. ｜ 我们会尽力。
- Wanderer ｜ 流浪者
- Eek! Someone get the Gardes... ｜ 哇啊啊啊！快去找警备队员…
- Anyway, let's move on! ｜ 我们继续前进吧！
- Saimon Jirou ｜ 柴门二郎
- A tabletop made of light-colored stone. The cross-section is trapezoidal and stable, and therefore the objects stacked on its surface will not wobble. Such tables are said to have been trampled by Sumpter Beasts with full loads without so much as a hint of structural damage, and that this is due to them having been used as defenses by the desert folk. Against a calamity that swept in from the depths of the desert, soldiers once used these structures to build a sturdy defensive position, where they held for a long while until they ran out of supplies and were at last forced to retreat. Nonetheless, the fortifications built purely on rock and sand have survived, and the design of those parapets is the inspiration for this table. ｜ 以浅色石材砌成的桌台，截面呈梯形，相当稳固，摆放的器物堆叠到天花板都不会摇晃。据说这种桌台曾被满载货物的驮兽踩踏，竟然也未曾出现结构损伤，原因是它的构造起源于沙漠子民们使用过的防御工事——在抵御来自沙漠深处的危险时，曾有兵士构筑牢固的阵地，长期坚守，直到粮草耗尽才被迫转移，但纯粹依靠岩石和沙粒搭建的工事却长期保留下来，其中胸墙的设计正是这种桌台的灵感来源。
- Okay, okay... Aaand poof, there goes my inspiration all of a sudden. ｜ 行吧…唉，灵感一下就没了。
- I asked someone to buy most of the ingredients for me, but as for Mint... I grew them myself. ｜ 有些是我托人买回来的，但是薄荷嘛…是我自己种的。
- Played by Clorinde ｜ 克洛琳德饰
- Verify Truth ｜ 佐证真相
- Of course, seeing that we don't have much Mora at the moment, all the things the Boss wants to do are stuck in the planning stages. ｜ 当然，鉴于我们目前没多少钱，老大想做的那些事，也只能停留在计划阶段了。
- We have holidays, but we usually use them to go home and spend time with our nearest and dearest. Besides, everyone's vacations come at different times. Our schedules rarely overlap. ｜ 虽说也有假期，但放了假，我们也要回家陪亲戚。再说大家放假时间也不同嘛，基本凑不到一起。
- "Radiant and Rejuvenated: A New Discovery in Cleansing" ｜ 「焕颜一莘：洁面新发现」
- Looks like Colonel Kate's got problems, too... ｜ 看来凯特上校有自己的苦衷呢…
- When Ayaka hurriedly arrives, you apprise her and Thoma of the current situation... ｜ 在绫华赶来之后，你将现状告诉了绫华与托马…
- Haha, the look on your face tells me it's either you dislike fishing, or you're too good at it. ｜ 哈哈，看你这表情，要么是不喜欢钓鱼，要么就是太擅长钓鱼了。
- #I will find mushrooms with richer flavors! Nara {NICKNAME} must come and enjoy the food together by then! ｜ #一定会找到更醇厚的蘑菇的！到那个时候，那菈{NICKNAME}要来一起享用！
- Whoa, sounds pretty complicated... but having Cyno around will definitely make things easier. ｜ 听上去好复杂…不过有赛诺在，压力好像小了很多。
- A snack fried in oil. The fruit-shaped pieces of batter were not rescued from the oil-filled pot in time, and when you bite into it, your mouth practically overflows with grease, a predicament from which only a speedy chug of coffee can save you. ｜ 油炸而成的甜点。没有及时将炸好的泡果从油锅中捞出，导致成品一口下去，满嘴油腻，猛灌下一杯咖啡才勉强从甜腻中抽身。
- If you've any equipment or tools that need repairing, I can help you with that. ...What's my job? Well, I'm an unemployed vagrant, obviously. I wouldn't have the time to be such a handyman otherwise, would I? ｜ 你要是有什么装备或者工具坏掉了，可以叫我来修。你问我是做什么工作的？哎呀，当然是无业游民了，不然哪有这么多闲工夫做手工呢。
- But don't the Melusine live in Merusea Village? ｜ 可是美露莘的家乡是海沫村吧？
- Surely a few... swings woven from the vines of purple agate grapes might be built! Pure silver lamps mounted with candles made of abyssal sea salt, all the better to light the cat-feeding platters with the motifs of nightborne stars! ｜ 至少得装设几座…紫玛瑙葡萄藤编织而成的秋千！纯净白银的灯盏上，应当是渊水海盐制成的蜡烛，点亮晚星纹样的猫餐盘！
- So that's it. Well, I must admit that it certainly fits Alice's style. My apologies, I misunderstood. ｜ 原来如此…确实是艾莉丝女士的风格，抱歉，是我误会了。
- Matsutake Meat Rolls ｜ 松茸酿肉卷
- But me? I have no such thoughts, and I have no regrets. ｜ 而老夫，只是恰好没有这种想法，也没有留下任何遗憾罢了。
- Please keep everything I'm about to say to yourselves. No one else can know. Otherwise... ｜ 接下去的每一句话，你们只能记在心底，绝不能说给任何外人知道。否则…
- Kusayla's Letter ｜ 库塞拉的信件
- That way, when the effect wears off, he can make his escape. ｜ 是想等元素的痕迹自然消失吧。
- The powerful opponent(s) will summon Attendants at intervals ｜ 营地中的强敌会周期性召唤扈从
- Now you see her, now you don't... Paimon's slowly getting used to her style. ｜ 哇，就这样走掉了…我似乎也快习惯她来去如风的做派了呢。
- #Not that Paimon's going to do that! What do you think, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #我才不会做到这一步啦！{NICKNAME}，你觉得呢？
- After the active character's Normal, Charged, or Plunging Attack deals DMG to an opponent, the character will gain a <color=#F39000FF>10% corresponding Elemental or Physical DMG Bonus of that attack</color> for 4s. This effect can be triggered once every 1s. Max 6 stacks. It will be removed when the character leaves the field or deals a different type of Elemental or Physical DMG. ｜ 当前场上角色的普通攻击、重击与下落攻击对敌人造成伤害后，获得<color=#F39000FF>10%该伤害对应的元素伤害或物理伤害加成</color>。该效果持续4秒，至多叠加6次，每1秒至多触发1次，并将在角色退场或造成不同元素或物理类型的伤害后清除。
- Restores <color=#3399CCFF>20-24%</color> of Max HP to the selected character and an additional <color=#3399CCFF>900-1,500</color> HP. ｜ 为选中的角色恢复生命值上限的<color=#3399CCFF>20%-24%</color>，并额外恢复<color=#3399CCFF>900-1500</color>点生命值。

- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- #Ohhh, {NICKNAME}, Paimon, it's you... Nearly scared the life out of me! ｜ #吓我一跳，原来是{NICKNAME}和派蒙呀。
- But if nothing good comes of it, don't say I didn't warn you. ｜ 但是，别怪我没提醒过你。
- (How I wish to see the animals they spoke of...) ｜ （真想看看那些传闻里的动物…）
- Huh, Paimon never thought there'd be Saurians trapped in this cart... Those Fatui... ｜ 唔，没想到还有被关在车子里的龙啊…这群愚人众…
- In our time here, we've seen conjuring tricks incorporated into a Liyue Opera show and even a Wushou Dance... It was amazing. ｜ 还有人把「戏法」跟「璃月戏」、「舞兽戏」结合在一起…真的很精彩。
- No Stage Effects during this Act ｜ 本幕演出中不存在任何舞台效果
- Throughout this process, one thing has changed: the scholars' identity. ｜ 在这个过程中，有一样东西改变了，那就是学者的「身份」。
- Yup, that definitely makes Paimon feel better! ｜ 嗯！这下我好多了！

- You want to enter the Sacred Mountain!? That's not going to be easy... The grown-ups keep telling us it's a dangerous place, so we're not allowed to go in there... ｜ 想要「进入圣山」啊，那可不是容易的事呢…大人们还告诫我们，圣山是危险的地方，所以不能轻易进入…

- I understand. ｜ 我明白了。

- A rough-and-ready laurel wreath that seems as precious as a king's golden crown. ｜ 粗略编成的草环。对一些人而言，就像王者的金冠一样贵重吧。
- Sure, take your time. It's not like these dummies are going anywhere. ｜ 没关系，好好想喔，木桩不会自己跑掉。
- The end result is the same! I will end this wretch's life before you can lift a finger. ｜ 结果是一样的，在你行动之前，我就能送这个被我控制的倒霉蛋先上路。
- Hey, why don't we discuss this a little first? Listen, I made quite a bit of Mora from my last run. Just give me a number and I'm sure we can... ｜ 就没有其他的解决办法吗？我这次赚了不少摩拉，要不然你开个数…

- Nope, I just don't think the ending is convincing, at least to me. You're going to catch flak if the script stays as-is. ｜ 不行，我总觉得这样的结局说服不了我。你这样写剧情走向，一定会被人指着鼻子骂的…

- A gem on golden satin... ｜ 金色绸缎上的一枚宝石…
- I'm sorry... ｜ 对不起…
- "After the results of the preliminary rounds are finalized, audience members can leave a comment on this competition billboard to show their support for the competitors or to share their thoughts about Fungi!" ｜ 「预赛结果揭晓后，观众们可以在这块赛事公告板上留言，尽情声援自己支持的选手，或是发表对于蕈兽的见解！」

- and return it to its original position ｜ 放回原位
- Heated Battle Mode: Tactical Formation ｜ 热斗模式：列阵斗巧
- This is the Treasure Hoarders' camp. C'mon. Time to teach them a lesson! ｜ 这里就是那群盗宝团的营地了，我们上吧，给他们点颜色瞧瞧！
- Well, this is going well. Two feathers down, one to go! ｜ 还挺顺利的嘛。只剩下一片羽毛要找了！
- Tree of Dreams, Vanarana ｜ 桓那兰那的梦之树
- Well, I'm good at reading the sea, but I'm not as good as the captain when it comes to reading people. ｜ 嗨，要说观察大海的眼力，我还行吧。但要说看人的眼力，我比大姐头差远了。
- Break bricks within the time limit to score points ｜ 请在限定时间内击碎游艺方块以获取积分
- And Natlan was the worst affected of all. It took the combined efforts of the then-Pyro Archon and heroes from every tribe to finally repel the Abyss. ｜ 纳塔是受灾最严重的地方，在当年的火神以及众部族英雄的齐心协力下，我们终于击退了深渊。
- Scores made by other performers completed ｜ 完成其他演奏者创作的曲谱
- Exactly. So this vendor keeps pushing the price up, and we have no choice but to buy from them because the Tax Decree forces us to... ｜ 你很懂嘛。于是那个商人就不断抬高价格，但碍于法令的压力，我们又不得不去买…
- This is the mausoleum of the Goddess of Flowers. This is the long and dreamless slumber of a god... ｜ 此处是花神的陵寝，是神明无梦的长眠…
- Let's go find out what's going on. ｜ 走，我们过去看看。
- The Initium Iani...? Hmph, though feeble tricks and smokescreens have been set to dismay us, but at the end of the day, it's nothing more than a glorified stone door. ｜ 雅努斯之门吗…哼，虽然施了些障眼法，不过到底就是个故弄玄虚的石头门而已。
- Here, how about this? You could give everyone a copy of the newspaper. Perhaps on the day when the cover story happens to, oh, I dunno, expose a certain someone's misdeeds from 20 years ago. ｜ 我有个好主意，给他们每人发一份报纸吧，比如，一份头版印着一段二十年前往事的报纸。
- What's so strange about becoming a believer of the wise King Deshret? In fact, aren't you the strange one — the one who still can't pick a side? ｜ 信仰贤明的赤王大人，有什么奇怪的吗？倒不如说，奇怪的是立场不坚定的你自己吧？
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Here is a new members' gift for you. You will need to return here to claim rewards in the future. ｜ 这就当做协会的新人礼了，请你亲自确认一下吧。
- How did I know there would be a but... ｜ 我就知道会有个「不过」…
- #Haha... Thank you Paimon, {NICKNAME}... and last but not least, {REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}. ｜ #哈哈，谢谢小派蒙，{NICKNAME}…还有{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Of course I'd get you what you need! ｜ 我当然会为你安排妥当！
- Discarded or not, what's so bad about being a weapon? All those who stalk the battlefield yearn for meaning and value. ｜ 做一把兵器也没啥不好的吧？每个在战斗中沉沦的人，都渴求着自身的意义与价值。
- It's a deal alright. ｜ 约定好了。
- While <color=#f39001>Pyro Crystal's Boon</color> is active, periodically unleash <color=#ef5534>Ignition Waves</color> that deal AoE Pyro DMG ｜ <color=#f39001>火晶庇佑</color>效果持续期间，将间歇性释放<color=#ef5534>迸火冲击</color>，造成火元素范围伤害
- Purchase 10 cards at the Card Shop ｜ 在卡牌商店购买10张卡牌
- Special supply boxes aimed at reducing the complexity of logistics during the Trials to facilitate smoother operations. ｜ 具有特殊功能的补给箱，其目的是减少演武期间的后勤物资复杂度，方便演武能更顺利地运行。
- Clear Spiral Abyss challenge 8-3 ｜ 通关深境螺旋8-3挑战
- #Welcome to The Cat's Tail. Ah, it's {NICKNAME} and Paimon, what a nice surprise! ｜ #欢迎光临猫尾酒馆…哎呀，{NICKNAME}和派蒙，真是稀客啊。
- It's just a small family dispute. It's not something our guests should trouble themselves with. In fact, it might be better if your stay ended here. ｜ 家里的一点小矛盾而已。有我在，两位「客人」就放心离开吧。
- This is the place. There should not be any other hidden spaces in the vicinity. ｜ 就到这里，附近应该没有其他隐藏空间了。
- #An exhausted Caribert sits beneath the tree, his eyes closed peacefully.\nYou watch as his figure gradually dissipates in the wind, even as the sound of your sibling's voice suddenly comes from behind you.\nYou turn around in disbelief. {M#She}{F#He} really is standing there... but you cannot touch one another. ｜ #卡利贝尔坐在树下，平静而疲惫地闭上眼睛。\n你看着他的身形逐渐消散于风中，而此时，你的背后却忽然传来了血亲的声音。\n你难以置信地回头，{M#她}{F#他}真的站在那里…只是你们无法触碰到彼此。
- And you are... ｜ 你是…
- It's good we caught it in time. A few days later, and the toxin would've built up in the internal organs. At that point, things would've been much more serious. ｜ 幸亏发现得早。要是再晚几天，毒素侵入脏腑，可就真的危险了。

- Skill DMG|{param1:P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:P}
- Wait, wait! I see it now! You're from the Lan lineage of Chenyu Vale, aren't you? ｜ 哎呀，哎呀，我看出来了，姑娘家门在沉玉谷蓝氏！
- Lab Scene ｜ 实验室中的景象
- She still needs to help us draw some maps. The pathways of The Chasm's underground mines are intricate and complex, and we won't get very far at all without those maps. ｜ 她还要为我们绘制地图，层岩巨渊的地下结构错综复杂，没有地图可不行。
- A dried flower stained black with blood and now as hard as steel. Probably some sort of a memento for its former master. ｜ 被血染黑，变得如钢铁一般坚硬的干花。对故主而言，是某种纪念品吧。
- Archaic Stone... *sigh* In all the years I've worked in The Chasm, I've barely seen even one. What are the big shots at Huishan Hall thinking... ｜ 「老石」…唉，「老石」，我在层岩巨渊这么多年都没怎么见到过，辉山厅的那些大人们啊…
- But stay sharp, okay! She is a force to be reckoned with... you must be sure to tread carefully. ｜ 不过，你也要注意安全！那个女人很可怕，你千万要小心。
- Ancient psychics believed that the Wayob, as formless entities of consciousness, were beings stripped of externality and thus the closest thing to the essence of the spirit.\nThe process of polishing rough stones until all texture had been removed, turning them into mirrors of pure light, was also seen as a ritual for removing the surface representations of worldly phenomena. Perhaps the reflections that these psychics saw upon the smooth surface of the mirrors were projections of their own spirits... ｜ 尚古的通灵者认为，没有形象而只有意识的「大灵」是去除了外在，更接近精神本质的存在。\n将粗糙的石料打磨，直至去除所有纹理，成为反射光亮的镜子的过程，也是一种除去世界原有表征的仪式。或许光滑的镜面亦是通灵者自身精神的投射也说不定。
- Hehe! Gotcha! But It's not nice to use Paimon as an excuse! ｜ 嘿嘿，原来是这样啊。不过拿派蒙当借口可不是好孩子！
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}

- Yellow Supervisor ｜ 黄色的监督人
- After your lover, Vigneire, was dissolved, you kept abducting young women to experiment on in hopes of bringing her back to you! ｜ 你为了让被溶解的恋人薇涅尔重新回到你身边，不断地寻找少女进行人体实验。
- I felt a little like a fish out of water when I first arrived. ｜ 刚开始的时候，会有一点点不习惯。

- As well you should. ｜ 明智之举。
- Um, excuse me! We're the ones asking the questions here! First off, who are you? ｜ 喂！现在应该我们问你吧，你到底是谁？
- They cannot afford to let this opportunity pass them by. They have to act now, while the Hiiragi Clan is at its weakest. ｜ 对这些人来说，柊家最虚弱的时刻是他们不容错过的机会。
- Echoing Sound From Days Past ｜ 昔时回映之音
- What punishments? ｜ 课堂上的「处罚」？

- I'll mark the location on your map and you can check it out if you're interested. As far as you're concerned, I imagine digging up minerals counts as a productive training session. ｜ 我把位置在地图上给你标出来吧，要是感兴趣的话可以去看看。对你来说，采掘矿石应该能算是不错的锻炼。
- How did it go? Did you find my "Active Odor Imitating Bait"? ｜ 怎么样怎么样！你们找到「气息模拟主动诱饵」了吗？
- Scare the fish away when casting your rod. ｜ 抛竿时吓跑了鱼儿。
- Legends hold that this ornate hand guard was once fitted upon a sword gifted to the oni who betrayed the Shogun. ｜ 传说中背叛了将军的鬼人，曾经获赐的刀上的华美宝镡。
- Guillotin ｜ 吉约丹
- Hehe, I guess if they're our kid, then there's no doubt they'll turn out smart. ｜ 呵呵，不过如果是我们两个的孩子的话，应该不可能不聪明的…

- I have to say, I'm even more envious of you, Sucrose... ｜ 比起他，倒是砂糖的心态更让我羡慕…
- Your battle against Dvalin in Mondstadt made headlines in The Steambird for three whole weeks! ｜ 您之前在蒙德和风龙战斗的那段事迹，可是在《蒸汽鸟日报》的头条上占了足足三周啊。
- We agreed, didn't we? There are four levels of danger. If it's not something urgent, you can only engage in level 2 danger and below. You can only go up to level 3 if a situation is so dire, there's absolutely no alternative. ｜ 首先的首先，我们约定过吧？危险的事情分为四个等级，非必要时刻最多参与到二级，再怎么迫不得已也只能到第三级。

- Yes, yes... ｜ 妙啊，妙啊…

- Hmph, if you keep coming back here without bringing me any news... Who knows, you might just find me resting till I rest in peace. ｜ 哼，你们再没什么新发现的话，我可要在这里悠闲到老咯。

- How often do you come here? ｜ 你经常来这里？

- An ancient Sumeru dish. The baked bread is crumbled and mixed with boiled Glabrous Beans and preprepared yogurt sauce, and then it is ready to be served. - At this rate, my ingredients won't be fresh any longer. Could you help me go to Brightcrown Canyon to see what the situation's like? ｜ 再拖下去，说不定那些食材都要不新鲜了，旅行者，能拜托你去明冠峡那边看看吗？
- I feel like I haven't really contributed that much... ｜ 感觉我也没帮上什么太大的忙…
- Good thing all the money I've saved in my earlier years is more than enough for me to wine and dine myself to death here at the Pearl Galley. ｜ 幸好我前半辈子攒下的钱够多，够我在这「珠钿舫」逍遥到死了。
- I'm sorry. ｜ 对不起喔。
- As for your reward, worry not — As long as you can help me recover my research, I'll do everything in my power to ensure you're adequately compensated! ｜ 至于报酬的事情，也请您不必担心。只要您能帮助我恢复水文研究，在我力所能及的范围内，您要多少报酬都没问题！
- Door? Where? And what's behind the door? ｜ 门？哪儿呢？门后面有什么？
- Woof woof! Good person. Pet? ｜ 汪汪，是好人。摸摸？
- I'll start you guys off with a pot of Yunlai White Tea. If that's not to your liking, you can come back later. I should be able to get someone to pick up a batch of specialty drinks from Mondstadt's Weinlesefest... ｜ 我先给你们泡一壶云来白毫吧，如果你们不习惯，可以过段时间再来，到时我应该能托人在蒙德的佳酿节上采购一批特色饮品…
- Itinerant Hero ｜ 街巷游侠
- I believe she will do that. I hope the people of Fontaine will like the truth she publicizes. ｜ 我相信她确实会这么做。希望枫丹的人们会喜欢她所公示的真相。
- You don't think you will be popular among the sisters? ｜ 你觉得你会不受欢迎？
- Before I knew it, I was breathing like normal down there! It was an amazing feeling! Ayaka said I was too nervous and needed to loosen my grip. She got used to everything way faster than I did! ｜ 但回过神来，我居然已经在正常呼吸了！好奇妙的感觉！听绫华说我太过紧张，都把她手给捏疼了。她倒是适应得很快。
- Client version error ｜ 客户端版本号错误
- Ah yes, my nephew... *sigh* I reported the case to the Tenryou Commission, but I haven't heard anything back so far. ｜ 你说这个啊…唉，我已经向天领奉行报案了，只不过直到现在都没有什么消息。
- So please, please pass on my apologies to her. ｜ 还请你代我，向她说声抱歉吧。
- "Sparks fly where shovel and meteorite meet." ｜ 「铁锹陨星一相逢，便撞出火花无数」…
- I'm really sorry, I just wanted to take you to see what the excitement was all about... I wasn't planning on getting into an argument with him again. ｜ 真是抱歉，本来只是想带你们来看看热闹，没想到又跟他吵起来了。
- A Plasma Field will be generated at the edge of the challenge area once the challenge begins. While within the field, characters will be hit by a lightning strike once every 2s and take Electro DMG. The area covered by the field will gradually expand as the challenge proceeds. ｜ 挑战开始后，场地外围会产生等离子场。角色在等离子场中时，每2秒会受到一次落雷打击，遭受雷元素伤害。等离子场的范围会随着挑战进程推进而向场地中心扩张。
- Hey, I'm Chevreuse. You probably already heard me introduce myself, so I won't bother repeating it. ｜ 你们好，我是夏沃蕾。身份想必不用再介绍一遍了。
- Oh! So you're the one who made those delicious steaks... Amazing! You could be a professional chef! ｜ 噢噢！也就是说那些好吃的肉排是你做的吗？你太厉害啦，该不会是专业的厨师吧？
- I didn't expect you to become my bodyguard. ｜ 没想到迪希雅也成了我的保镖。
- Time to sort through the photos... Oh, and to get some more film. ｜ 该整理画片了…对了，还得再买些底片。
- #Next, there's another Withering Zone over there that I'll need your help to clean up, {NICKNAME}. If that's okay, let's get going! ｜ #接下来，在那边还有一处需要麻烦{NICKNAME}帮忙清理的死域。如果没问题的话，我们就出发吧！

- Wow, that really is the case! ｜ 哇，竟然是这样！

- Why don't you take another nap? It looks like you can barely walk straight. ｜ 不然，你还是睡一会吧？感觉你走路都要走不稳了。

- I heard a voice... ｜ 刚才，有什么声音…
- Place a Concealing Beacon. While close to this Beacon, the Rebels will be invisible and cannot be discovered by the Hunter until the Beacon is destroyed or until the Rebel gets close enough to a Signaling Device to repair it.\nIf the Hunter uses "Capture!" on the Concealing Beacon, they will have their vision obscured for a short time. 45s CD. ｜ 布置一个「匿踪信标」，在此信标身边，「游侠」将一直处于隐形状态，不会被「猎手」发现，直至匿踪信标被破坏或「游侠」进入「发信机」的可维修范围附近为止。\n如果猎手对「匿踪信标」使用「捕获！」，在短时间内视野将受到阻碍。技能冷却时间45秒。
- Yes, I've heard about that! The announcement made big waves in the astrology enthusiast community. So, you were the one who came up with that...? ｜ 我知道这个！当时在占星术爱好者的圈子里也引起了很大的反响，原来是你提出来的…
- Go ahead, struggle in vain. Once the last of you croaks, no one will ever find me again. So long! ｜ 哼，挣扎吧，等你们都咽了气，就不会有人知道我的下落了，永别了！
- He sounds like a great brother! ｜ 听起来像是个好哥哥呢。
- Ancient Names allow us to preserve the stories of the past. But, they're also much more than that. Think of an Ancient Name almost like an heirloom passed down from generation to generation. ｜ 「古名」记载了故事，但它不只是故事，你们还可以将它理解成一种代代相传的物品。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Haha, you sure are knowledgeable, aren't you? Thanks for keeping my father company — he's gone indoors. ｜ 哈哈，你懂的真多。我父亲先回家了，谢谢你陪他。
- We just have to get out of this place... and neither Samail nor Al-Ahmar will be able to harm us anymore! ｜ 只要离开这里…不管是萨梅尔还是阿赫玛尔，都伤不到我们了！
- Paimon neither! It's not much of an escape plan if we've gotta leave someone behind! ｜ 我也不同意！留一个人才能出去，这叫什么好办法！
- *sigh* Speaking of him, I bet he must be burning midnight oil right now. I should bring him some food and coffee on my way back. ｜ 哎，说起来这家伙肯定又在熬夜读书了。我回去时给他带点吃的和咖啡吧。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Of course, we also have Master Diluc to thank for the venue. Otherwise, we would be looking at quite an alarming bill right about now. ｜ 当然，还有迪卢克老爷的功劳，不然包场的费用可就要我们大出血了。
- Skill DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Hmph! And you'd still lose! You think that's something to be proud of? ｜ 一样是输！那有什么好骄傲的！
- Liliane, according to her own statements, then changed clothes and hid until the performance ended before hiding in other parts of the opera house. ｜ 莉莉安则如其陈述那样，在地道中换衣服并藏身，直到魔术完全结束才躲去歌剧院的其他位置。
- *sigh* There are not many in this city that could compose couplets with me like you just did. ｜ 唉，这座城里，像你一样能接上我话的人可不太多。
- But... as much as I don't wish to be a wet blanket... ｜ 但…并不是我想泼您冷水…
- Achieve victory within 6 rounds ｜ 6回合内胜利
- I hope I can contribute too! The other Forest Watchers gave me some fishing tips a little while ago. I'm really looking forward to giving them a try! ｜ 我也会加油的，之前跟其他巡林官学了些钓鱼技巧，今天就来试一试！
- However, I've been feeling better as of late. I don't get as scared anymore knowing that I have a little neighbor living nearby. ｜ 不过最近，自从我知道附近生活着一位小邻居之后，就没有那么害怕了。
- Err... Well... Sometimes... ｜ 我就是偶尔…偶尔陪她玩玩…
- What...? ｜ 对谁…？
- Ugh... I was up too late studying... so tired... ｜ 唔唔…昨天复习得太晚…没休息好…
- And... Oh, what about our tomato-growing contest? He has to see it through! His plants are doing so well... but they need their gardener to come back safe and sound. ｜ 他…他不是还要跟我一决胜负吗？番茄长得这么好，养番茄的人可千万不能有事。
- (Not sure how many chances I'm gonna get. I need to act.) ｜ （机会宝贵，一定要抓住机会。）
- Restored Score ｜ 修复完好的曲谱
- Oh, phew! It hasn't been too long and the parts are still in good condition... Just a few more adjustments... ｜ 还好还好，没过多长时间，零件还没怎么被糟蹋…只要再修整一下…
- Jokes aside, I didn't know you would be so interested in this box. How about this, then? You can pick anything you want from it. Consider it a gift from me. ｜ 没想到你会这么喜欢，那这样吧，这里你随便挑一个东西，算我送你的礼物。
- How about this, then? I'll send you a token of support for your festival. Will that do? ｜ 这样吧，我送你们点东西，就当作是支持你们的音乐庆典了，好不好？

- Shadow foe threat detected... ｜ 检测到阴影大敌之威胁…

- Outside the dream world, there are 12 nurseries that condense Vasmrti. With them, the Vanarana nursery will be full of Viparyas. ｜ 在梦境之外，有十二座苗圃，会凝结出桓斯弥利底。有了它们，桓那兰那的苗圃就能生满毗波耶。
- Wait a second, you don't look like a staff member. What are you lecturing us for? Who are you anyway? ｜ 等等，你也不像工作人员啊？为什么你一副把握十足的样子在说教，你到底是什么人？
- O tides, I bid you hearken — hear now the final edict of the Land of Seven Flames' sovereign ruler... ｜ 以七重燃火之地至高领主之名，潮水啊，聆听我最后的敕命…
- This stone is beautifully cracked. We should still be able to fix it... ｜ 这座石头破得很好看，应该还能复原…
- Let's follow the trail and have a little look where our thief was headed, shall we? ｜ 就循着踪迹瞧瞧他的目的地在哪儿吧。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Let's roll. I didn't expect Sumeru City to be so big that it wore me out just window shopping! ｜ 那就快出发吧，没想到须弥城这么大，逛得我也有点累了。

- Hardened Glazed Vase ｜ 硬面彩陶罐

- Destroy {param2} obstacles ｜ 摧毁{param2}个障碍
- Suspicious people? Well... I didn't see anyone suspicious. ｜ 可疑的人？嗯…我也没发现什么可疑的人。
- I understand, Ms. Ann. It's a shocking fact, and it'll require you to accept yourself again. ｜ 我能理解你，安小姐。这是一个需要重新接受自己的冲击性事实。
- Hmm... Are you interested in finches? I think they sing very beautifully. ｜ 你对小团雀感兴趣吗？它们唱歌很好听哦。
- Fight alongside the turbo trusty Turbo Twirly!\nSummons Turbo Twirly. When the skill is Held and released, Kachina will summon and ride Turbo Twirly.\nAfter the Skill is used, Kachina will gain 60 Nightsoul points and enter the Nightsoul's Blessing state.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Nightsoul's Blessing: Kachina</color>\nTurbo Twirly's various actions consume Kachina's Nightsoul points.\nThe Nightsoul's Blessing state will end when these points have been depleted.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Turbo Twirly</color>\nCan exist independently or be ridden and operated by Kachina. When Turbo Twirly is present, Kachina's Elemental Skill, "Go, Go Turbo Twirly!", will change to an option to Mount/Dismount Turbo Twirly.\n·When present independent of Kachina, it will slam the ground at intervals, dealing Nightsoul-aligned <color=#FFE699FF>AoE Geo DMG</color> based on Kachina's DEF.\n·When Kachina is riding Turbo Twirly, she can control it to move and climb swiftly, and use Normal Attacks to slam the ground, dealing Nightsoul-aligned <color=#FFE699FF>AoE Geo DMG</color> based on Kachina's DEF.\n\nTurbo Twirly will disappear once Kachina's Nightsoul's Blessing state ends, and it is considered a Geo Construct. Only 1 Turbo Twirly created by Kachina herself can exist on the field at any one time.\n\n<i>Turbo Twirly only looks like a top — it is, in fact, a drill that can split even the strongest rock asunder!</i> ｜ 和超可靠的冲天转转一同战斗！\n召唤「冲天转转」；长按施放时，卡齐娜将召唤并搭乘冲天转转。\n施放后，卡齐娜将获得60点夜魂值并进入夜魂加持状态。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>夜魂加持·卡齐娜</color>\n冲天转转的各种行为将消耗夜魂值。\n夜魂值耗尽时卡齐娜的夜魂加持将会结束。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>冲天转转</color>\n能够独立存在，或是由卡齐娜搭乘操控。冲天转转存在时，卡齐娜的元素战技「出击，冲天转转！」将替换为搭乘或脱离冲天转转。\n·冲天转转独立存在时，将间歇性冲击地面，基于卡齐娜的防御力，造成具有夜魂性质的<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素范围伤害</color>；\n·卡齐娜搭乘冲天转转时，能操控冲天转转快速移动、攀爬，并在进行普通攻击时冲击地面，基于卡齐娜的防御力，造成具有夜魂性质的<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素范围伤害</color>。\n\n冲天转转将在卡齐娜的夜魂加持结束时消失，被视为岩元素创造物；同时只能存在一个卡齐娜自己的冲天转转。\n\n<i>「冲天转转」只是看着像陀螺，其实是能破开坚固岩石的钻头。</i>

- Ms. Chronie, please stay here. Some areas in the back contain Insitute secrets, and you're not allowed to have any exposure to them. ｜ 克洛妮艾小姐，请您就留在这里吧，后面的区域中有些涉及院内机密，您不能接触。
- Paimon thinks it's much too sweet too... ｜ 我也觉得，实在是太甜了…
- Based on my studies of the ancient texts, hypersensitivity is usually treated with desensitization therapy. So, I figure there's no reason it shouldn't work in reverse. ｜ 据我从古籍里学习的知识，大多数过敏的症状会使用相应的脱敏疗法，我想反过来也一样。
- Huh!? You're the illuminated bird? But you look human! How did that happen? ｜ 欸？！你是、你是那只仙鸟？你怎么变成人了？

- ...Is that so? In that case, his way of showing it is... most unexpected. Well, we couldn't understand what he was saying at the time anyway, so all we could do was chase him off. ｜ …是吗？那这条巨龙的交友方式。的确有些出乎预料啊。好吧，当时咱们没理解他的话，只是将他赶走了。

- Klee's Wooden Sign ｜ 可莉的木牌
- Hmmm, that's gotta refer to the four biggest ones in the archipelago, right? ｜ 说起金苹果群岛的四个岛，那就肯定是最大的四个了！
- Sure, I'll give it a go. ｜ 我来试试。
- This is Yaoguang Shoal. Used to be the biggest mining facility in Liyue. ｜ 这里是瑶光滩，这片地区曾经是璃月主要的矿产区。
- Okay. We'll be there. ｜ 我们一会就过去。
- ... ｜ ……
- Okay, let's go play with Yoimiya. ｜ 好，我们一起去找宵宫姐姐玩。
- I'm as surprised as you. ｜ 对于这件事，我也很惊讶。
- Anatole ｜ 阿纳托尔
- Incomplete ｜ 未满
- A well-crafted wooden dart. It will only stop once it has reached its destination. ｜ 精致的木造飞镖。抵达终点时才会停滞之物。
- No, he was always wearing a mask, like he was intentionally trying to hide his identity. I don't even know anything about his past. ｜ 他一直蒙面，似乎在刻意遮掩自己的身份，我也并不知道他的来历。
- Look, what's that over there? ｜ 你看，那边是什么东西！
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- I'll be off, then. ｜ 先走了。
- Memories: Earthshaking Dragon II ｜ 追忆：摇撼山岳之龙 II
- Guilt? Sounds pretty strange to Paimon. Usually, you only feel guilty when you've done something wrong... ｜ 愧疚？一般来说做了错事才会愧疚吧，真是奇怪的说法。

- You feel the calling of some mysterious presence after talking to Araja. ｜ 与兰拉迦交谈后，感到了某种神秘存在的呼唤与牵引。
- Help Needed:\nI don't know why, but I feel like the pigeons and ducks are coming less and less...\nDo they think that the feed I'm giving them is terrible?\nIf anyone wants to help me, could you please gather <color=#3399CC>10 spikes of Wheat</color> and bring them to me? I'd like to make them something good this time! ｜ 求助：\n不知道为什么，最近鸽子和鸭子们来得越来越少了…\n难道是它们觉得我喂的东西不好吃吗？\n如果有愿意帮忙的人，就请帮我搜集<color=#3399CC>十份小麦</color>来吧。我想做点更好吃的东西喂它们。
- "I see. This is a world where even Sweet Flowers and Mint cannot grow. Can you see it, too?" ｜ 「原来如此。这可是连甜甜花和薄荷都长不出来的世界。你也能看到吗？」
- A nearly weightless black jade, enveloped in chilling flames. According to Natlan's legends, offering it at a specific altar might just open the path to the kingdom ruled by the night. ｜ 几乎没有重量的黑玉，环绕着火舌冰凉的冷焰。根据纳塔的传说，如果在特定的祭台将之献出，说不定能开启通往夜晚所执掌的国度的道路。
- <color=#FFCC33FF>as offering</color> ｜ <color=#FFCC33FF>向仙人供奉</color>
- Increases CRIT Rate against opponents with less than 30% HP by 10%. ｜ 雷泽攻击生命值低于30%的敌人时，暴击率提高10%。
- Wow, that was terrible. ｜ 谢谢，很难听。
- So it is good that you are here... I mean, we could save quite a lot of trouble for Lady Sorush with your help. Otherwise... ｜ 不过幸好你们来了，我是说，有幸得到两位的助力，可以为斯露莎大人也省去一些麻烦，否则…
- ...Now, now, there's no need to be so stubborn about this. I'll adjust the budget here, and we'll definitely turn a profit. ｜ …好啦好啦，别那么死板嘛，这里再加一笔预算，绝对亏不了。
- However, doing research is similar to playing cards. You need to think out of the box to make a breakthrough. ｜ 不过思考卡牌和思考课题，原理都是同样的。一定要灵活巧思，才能有新的突破。
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param6:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param6:F1}点

- #{NICKNAME}, quickly! Fend them off! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，快点击退它们！
- Light...! A brief flash, yet enough to illuminate the world... ｜ 好啊，虽然只是瞬息，但那光芒也彻照了天地…
- There's still some time before the final match begins, so feel free to take a look around. ｜ 距离总决赛开始应该还有一段时间，您可以再去周围看看。
- Pudgy Pyrotechnicians ｜ 圆滚滚的易爆品
- Remember, I am the viper in the vault. I will be lurking behind every shadow... ｜ 记住，我就是宝库的毒蛇，你身后的每一处阴影都可能有我的踪迹…
- Molten Sand Stained Bottle ｜ 「熔沙妙彩瓶」
- Kitamura ｜ 北村
- Oh...! Right! Sorry, Paimon has no idea what she was talking about... ｜ 啊、啊噢——！哎呀，对啊！真奇怪，刚刚不小心说错了…

- That is our god's Spenta Heart. It appears that we can only obtain it after clearing out the defilement. ｜ 这就是神明大人的「慈心」了，不过看来在取得它之前得先清除这些污秽才行。
- Haha, me? You're a curious guest. Call me Yukom. As you can see, I'm a guard at this sentry post — one of them, anyway. ｜ 哈哈，我？真是个好奇心旺盛的客人，如您所见，我的名字叫尤考姆，是此处哨站的看守…之一。
- Right! And it's so nice to see you again, Fischl, Oz. What are you doing here, anyway? ｜ 是呀，很高兴能看见菲谢尔和奥兹，嘿嘿，你们在这里干什么呢？
- Thank you... Thank you all... ｜ 谢谢…谢谢你们…
- Forget it, out of respect for his perseverance... Tell me his offer. ｜ 算了，看在他锲而不舍的份上…你们开个价吧。
- Traveler, Paimon. This day has come earlier than I had expected. ｜ 两位，没想到这么早就要和你们对决了。
- Let's do it! ｜ 开始吧！
- Ensemble Performance ｜ 联机合奏
- We are at Yuehai Pavilion. This is where the Qixing discuss official business and rule on major issues that affect the whole of Liyue. ｜ 这里是月海亭，「七星」议事的场所，影响整个璃月的很多重大决议都是在这里做出的。
- Our contestants go through the qualifiers, group matches, and elimination matches, and only those who make it through all these can reach the finals. ｜ 参赛的选手们会经过预选赛，小组赛和淘汰赛，只有闯过所有比赛的纸蛙，才能在总决赛中竞争冠军头衔。
- Go on, move it! ｜ 动作搞快！
- That's right. The associated literature indicates that the Dragon King, the supreme spirit Apep, was alone amongst the Seven Pillars in not appearing in person. ｜ 嗯。根据文献记载，赤王七柱中唯独龙之王·至灵阿佩普未亲身列席。
- Nilou's Constellation Activation Material ｜ 妮露的命之座激活素材
- The savage jungle is just like desert. In the desert, when you leave your tribe, you're on your own. You will be an easy prey for the hungry beasts. ｜ 蛮荒的雨林也是一种沙漠。在沙漠中，离开部落的人是孤独的，孤立无援的人，最容易被饥饿的兽类袭击。
- Wise Doctor's Pinion ｜ 贤医之羽
- The pool found within the HQ is filled with Water from the Primordial Sea. The mastermind can use this to create Sinthe, and directly use it to dissolve people. ｜ 在总部深处发现的水池，其中装满了「原始胎海之水」，幕后真凶可以借此制造「乐斯」，也可以直接使用来让人溶解。
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- The cases themselves are plenty to look at, so why must they add all this romance? I'm here for a complete and clear chain of logic. I didn't sign up to read some sappy romance story... ｜ 探案已经足够好看了，为什么非得加超多情情爱爱？我是来看完整清晰的逻辑链条的，又不是来读什么爱情小说的…
- ...It would be a major blow to gastronomy— no, to all mankind! ｜ 不行不行，那绝对是美食界…不对，是全人类的一大损失！

- Once Everything is Over ｜ 当一切结束后
- Little Mao ｜ 小茂

### Part 109

- Contact Venti in a less conspicuous place ｜ 到隐蔽地点联络温迪

- It all makes sense now! ｜ 嗯，我现在完全搞懂了！$UNRELEASED

- But as I've said before, I happen to know how to operate this sort of cannon. What I also know is how to make use of Electro to bypass our projectile-related limitations... ｜ 但正如我所说的，我恰好知道这种大炮的操作方法。我还知道，利用「雷元素」的话，可以绕过炮弹的限制…

- Um, a few days ago, I heard some people saying that a big merchant from Fontaine is coming soon to buy Luminescent Spines. ｜ 我前几天，就在这附近，听到很多人在说，马上会有枫丹的大商人，来收购「发光髓」。
- In fact, I probably would have found the idea of everyone uniting together even more far-fetched than the part about the evil machine. ｜ 但对当时的我来说，比起「阻止一个超级机械怪物」，也许「联合在一起的所有人」听起来反倒会更荒谬一点吧…
- Don't worry, Nizam. I won't let your reputation be tarnished! ｜ 尼扎姆前辈，放心吧，我一定会洗刷你身上的污名！
- As such, I think it might be best to gather a bit more Seagrass as quickly as we can. ｜ 我觉得，还是要快点再去采一些海草上来才好。

- You can stop any moment now... ｜ 你差不多也该放弃了吧。

- You're now involved in the "serial disappearances of young women" case, whether you like it or not. - The Wayob saved me, even though its power is weakening, so I've been hiding from the monsters while trying to find a way to help. ｜ 结果是大灵用微弱的力量保护了我，我一边躲避魔物，一边寻找解救大灵的方法。

- Wait, what is this? ｜ 等等，这是什么？
- I want to learn to paint. ｜ 想学画画。
- Event Card ｜ 事件牌
- Just relax. She'll be okay. She is our daughter, after all! ｜ 你就放心吧，她不会有事的，那可是我们的女儿啊！
- So, about your name... ｜ 关于你的名字…
- Uh-huh, suuure. Dunno why you'd worry about this stuff. You're always so ready to pounce on and fight just about anything — why, you even dare to disrespect the almighty Dragonlord! ｜ 算了吧。就凭那股什么都敢打的气魄，还有什么能吓唬到你们？连伟大的圣龙都敢不尊重呢。
- I want to partner up with Ayaka. ｜ 我想跟绫华一起参加。
- Yelan's Elemental Skill allows her to move rapidly using her Lifeline, latching onto and marking opponents along the path. When her rapid move ends, she will deal Hydro DMG to marked targets. Hold this skill to freely control her movement direction.\nWhen the Lifeline explodes, Yelan has a fixed chance to reset her Breakthrough state, which will buff her next Charged Shot, based on the number of opponents marked.\nYelan's Elemental Burst deals AoE Hydro DMG and will create the Exquisite Throw to assist your active character in combat.\nAdditional Elemental Orbs will drop during the trial event challenge to facilitate the testing of the trial character's Elemental Burst. ｜ 夜兰的元素战技会使其牵引「络命丝」疾走，缠络标记途径的敌人，并在疾走结束时对标记的目标造成水元素伤害，长按时可自由控制疾走方向。\n「络命丝」引爆时，依据被标记的敌人数量，夜兰有一定概率重置自身的「破局」状态，可强化下一次蓄力瞄准射击。\n夜兰的元素爆发将造成水元素范围伤害，并凝聚出「玄掷玲珑」协助当前场上角色进行战斗。\n为方便体验角色的元素爆发，试用的关卡中会有额外的元素晶球掉落。
- Solemn Raven ｜ 神情严肃的夜鸦
- #Morning, {NICKNAME}! Morning, Paimon! ｜ #早安，{NICKNAME}、派蒙。
- *sigh* I wish there were Ley Lines here that I could have her study... Anyway, I know who you're talking about. I'd better come along then. ｜ 唉，这里最好有可以给她研究的地脉啦…但我知道是谁了，我还是跟你们一起去吧。
- Well, er, about that... we heard something about a party, and didn't want to miss out... ｜ 说来惭愧，我们来凑热闹…
- Simply put, they want us to talk more about the fertilizer's effects and the theory behind it with customers. We should also do more data-driven promotion, and we should offer a "free trial" service... ｜ 具体就是，多和客人谈一谈肥料的具体效果和原理，有理有据地向大家多多宣传，还有什么「试用」服务…

- Wait, does that mean that there's only ever been one key to all of Wangshan Hall this whole time!? Uh... ｜ 难道说，从古至今，全王山厅就只有一把钥匙…呜哇…

- Maybe there's a way we can get his attention? ｜ 有没有可能把他给叫出来？

- "To silently disappear at the matter's conclusion, concealing one's name and contribution," this is the chivalrous thing to do. To savor the memory is ample reward. ｜ 「事了拂衣去，深藏功与名」，此乃侠义之本，回味无穷。
- After completing the Archon Quest "A New Star Approaches," you may use the "Quick Start" function to begin the Archon Quest "Flowers Resplendent on the Sun-Scorched Sojourn" directly without affecting previous quests or the rewards obtained upon completing them.\nHowever, there will be some differences in the experience of this quest when using Quick Start to begin the quest.\nComplete the Archon Quest "Bedtime Story" first to get the best experience from this quest. ｜ 完成魔神任务「迫近的客星」后，可以直接使用「快速体验」功能进行魔神任务「荣花与炎日之途」，且此前的任务与奖励均不会受到影响。\n但通过「快速体验」进行此任务的体验将存在一定差异，完成魔神任务「睡前故事」后进行本任务的体验更佳。
- I can't give you the original copy, but... Wait a second, where did I put my Kamera... I remember placing it inside my bag... ｜ 虽然原件不能给你们，不过…等一下，我的留影机去哪了…我记得放在包里…

- When he sobers up, I will present him with the bill. ｜ 等他清醒了，我会把账单给他的。
- You should be sure to tell him you think that when he gets back! ｜ 等嘉明回来之后，你也多当面夸夸他呀！
- Complete the housekeeping challenge in 60s ｜ 在60秒内完成家政挑战
- It all happened so fast... I was so scared... ｜ 我当时太害怕了，没怎么看清楚…
- I'm comforted to know that you didn't lose your heads amidst the hype, and you're not just in this to have some fun. Unfortunately though... it appears that we're about to be interrupted. ｜ 看见你没有被热闹的气氛冲昏头脑，只顾着开心玩耍，我还挺欣慰的。不巧的是，好像有人要来打扰我们了。
- Obtained from the Imaginarium Theater ｜ 于「幻想真境剧诗」中获取
- Charged Attack DMG|{param5:F1P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param5:F1P}
- Perform this final movement, this final Requiem. ｜ 奏响这最后的乐章，最后的「安魂曲」。
- Catch 2 Glaze Medaka within the challenge time limit ｜ 在挑战时限内钓获2条琉璃花鳉
- Find the ancient temple beneath the flowing desert. ｜ 发现流沙之下的古代神殿。
- My, you're cutting it close. ｜ 别再勉强了。
- Sanka! Aha, so YOU'RE glasses guy! You tricked Huni and Toba into telling you a bunch of stories! ｜ 山下！好呀！原来你就是从胡妮和多巴那里骗故事听的坏大叔！
- Increasing your efficiency in these areas will make it much easier to run your business. ｜ 效率提升之后，你们经营起来也会更轻松哦。
- But none of my methods had any effect on it. And when I went to try and get a closer look at it and try to ascertain what I was dealing with, it disappeared into thin air. ｜ 但我所施方术，对它居然没有任何作用。正当我想要上前确认的时候，它却突然没了踪影。
- Otherwise, I don't know how long I would have been trapped in this accursed amber. It was awful in there... ｜ 不然不知这破琥珀要把我封多久…里面可是难受死了…
- Mona ｜ 莫娜
- Actually, Inayah had prepared a special present for everyone before this celebration kicked off. ｜ 其实，在开始我们的活动之前，阿娜耶准备了特别的礼物，打算送给大家。
- Fine, you win! Let's find Benben first. But... I'm leaving if we encounter the Fatui again! ｜ 好吧，算我倒霉！我们先去把奔奔找到。不过…要是再碰上什么愚人众，那我可不奉陪了！
- Crimson Witch of Embers ｜ 焚尽的炽炎魔女
- Quinn's Special ｜ 昆恩的特调酒
- The towering but broken spire tells of its tragic story silently. Its chambers and halls are filled with memories and longing, as well as howling winds. ｜ 高耸而破碎的尖塔无声地述说着哀痛的过往。盘踞其中的除了回忆与思念，还有狂啸的暴风…
- First things first, I need to remove the restrictions that The Doctor put on me in the Akasha... ｜ 必须先解除掉「博士」在虚空中对我的封锁措施…
- Forest Sanctuary ｜ 森林的瑞佑
- Reward for reaching Friendship 10 with Nilou ｜ 妮露的好感等级达到10级时获取。
- Zhiqiong ｜ 志琼
- Zhiqiong? She's been pretty tightly-wound. I suspect that she's been around that black mud too much. She should learn to rest and stop being so neurotic all the time. ｜ 她呀…一直很神经质的样子。可能是矿下的「黑泥」接触太多了吧，她该学会多休息，总是紧绷绷的怎么行。
- Hmm... Let me see... Actually, based on the number of chests and Moonchase Charms you've obtained... ｜ 嗯…我看看，根据你找到宝箱和逐月符的数量计算…
- I don't think they taste that bad though... ｜ 我觉得也不至于那么难吃吧…
- Regarding the problems that the citizenry encounter in their lives, searching for capable folk to solve these issues is another one of the Akademiya's duties. As such, the Akademiya will offer various rewards to people who render particularly exceptional assistance.\nAccepting Requests from Effendi and completing them will increase your Reputation.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Request: Limits and Resetting</color>\nYou can only take a certain number of Requests every week.\nYou can check the number of Requests you've taken this week in the Reputation Menu.\nThis limit is shared between all cities.\nNew Requests will become available every week. \n\nOnce your Reputation has hit the maximum level, you can no longer accept new Requests. ｜ 关注居民们在生活中遇到的困难，为他们寻找解决问题的能人志士，也是教令院联络员的职责所在。为此，教令院会向表现突出的热心人士发放各种奖励。\n及时在阿芬迪处领取「居民请求」并完成这些任务，可以提高声望。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【居民请求：接取限制与刷新】</color>\n每周能接取的居民请求的数量是有限的。\n本周已接取的数量可以在声望界面查看。\n所有城市共享数量限制。\n每周一都会出现新的居民请求。\n\n声望等级达到上限后，无法继续接取新的居民请求。
- Zyanya ｜ 扎安娅
- Anything you want to do? ｜ 有什么想做的吗？
- I think I understand how it feels to play with someone in The Cat's Tail... This information is quite valuable indeed! ｜ 我好像明白了，在猫尾酒馆和人对局是这种感觉…这消息也算值钱！
- Lift As Hard as You Can!!! ｜ 用力抬！！！
- Ah... Perhaps the difficulty is set too high? ｜ 啊…是不是难度设置得过高了…
- Meow? ｜ 喵？
- Huh? How did you know? ｜ 欸？你怎么知道？
- Help Goth ｜ 帮助歌德
- Don't worry, there's no special meaning to it. I just thought that obsidian really suits you. ｜ 别紧张，没什么特殊的含义，只是觉得你很适合黑曜石。
- Of course. There are few things better than using my knowledge to help other people change their fates. ｜ 那当然，用我的知识帮一些人改变命运，没有比这更好的事情了吧。
- ...That bastard. ...Sorry. We were talking about something else just now. ｜ …混账…不好意思，刚才我们在说别的事。
- Complete Puffy Snowmen simultaneously ｜ 同时完成「噗噗雪人」
- You really are super busy, Monsieur Neuvillette! Paimon thought you only came here to pay your respects today because you had the day off. ｜ 果然是个大忙人呢，那维莱特，还以为你今天放假，所以才来这里扫墓的。
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Profuse Smokeleaf ｜ 丛生栌青
- I definitely agree! It's a wonderful thing, isn't it? Traveling on the elevated aquabus lane, taking in the sights here in Fontaine, growing old with the aquabus... ｜ 我也非常认同！在高高的水道线路上，看着枫丹的风景，与巡轨船一起慢慢老去，我觉得是一件幸福的事情！
- Follow Kamisato Ayaka ｜ 跟随神里绫华
- (There is no response from the door, and nothing unusual about it.) ｜ （门没有任何反应，也没有特殊的地方。）
- Oh? But I've decided to become a great artist. Wait, I can become an actress who plays an artist. That doesn't sound right, though... ｜ 欸——但是我已经决定要当大画家了。对了，也可以当演员，然后扮演画家？唔，好像不太对。
- Fish! ｜ 鱼儿！
- Well, in my free time, I like to clear my mind and listen to the lyre or the ukulele. ｜ 平日闲暇时，我喜欢放下杂念，听听「诗琴」或者「悠可琴」演奏的音乐。
- Farewell, Traveler. ｜ 再见。
- I cannot thank you enough. Your mere presence shall surely mean we are spared the futile pursuit known as small talk. ｜ 太感谢了。有你们在，会面时一定能略去很多无意义的寒暄。
- Noelle ｜ 诺艾尔
- Oh, thanks for your concern. But, I replaced the charcoal earlier today, so it should be— ｜ 哦，谢谢客人关心。不过这是我今天刚换的一批炭料，绝对不会…
- I don't know... ｜ 我不知道…
- Masquerade of the Guilty ｜ 罪人舞步旋
- #Huh? Help? Oh... I don't plan on asking for your help, not really. But since you've seen the Sponsian, {NICKNAME}... ｜ #欸？帮忙？唔…艾伊丝也没有要你们帮忙啦，不算帮忙。但既然{NICKNAME}也目睹过「斯彭西安号」…
- One... Two... Should be a few more... ｜ 一份…两份，还差几份…
- Hey, Sigewinne! ｜ 你好啊，希格雯。
- Rongo climbs up to a makeshift wooden platform set up nearby and grabs a shell... ｜ 朗戈爬上一旁临时搭建的木台，取下了一枚贝壳…
- Wait a minute... Xiao, are you hurt? ｜ 等一下，你受伤了？
- Hmm. Perhaps for stability, tail fins might... Oh, hello there, Honorary Knight! 7th Company's Weapons Officer, Ematol, reporting for duty! What orders do you bring? ｜ 嗯嗯嗯，如果装上尾翼的话，稳定性说不定就能…哦哦，你好你好，荣誉骑士大人！第七小队武器官艾玛托报到！有什么指示吗？
- The forest... ｜ 森林…

- This looks the same, but there aren't enough! ｜ 好像又是一样的东西，可是，数量好像对不上？
- When characters attack Burning opponents, their <color=#F39000FF>CRIT Rate is increased by 15% and their CRIT DMG is increased by 30%</color>. ｜ 角色攻击处于燃烧状态下的敌人时，<color=#F39000FF>暴击率提升15%，暴击伤害提升30%</color>。

- Palumbus ｜ 林鸽座

- Lazy, impatient, and feckless, but loves to talk big. Men are all the same... ｜ 怕累怕麻烦，三分钟热度又好吹大牛…你们男人啊…
- Hence, Amu{RUBY#[S]Biology}rta has classified them as "unidentified lifeforms." ｜ 所以，生论派对这种生物的归类是「未确认生物」。
- Everyone looks well-rested. If you're ready, we can start making our way to the jungle north of here. ｜ 各位看起来都休息完毕了，那我们出发前往北边的森林吧。
- ... ｜ ……
- He's even instructed others in the discipline of surveying before. So in my view, he's highly unlikely to lose his way and would be very good at helping others find theirs. ｜ 他还教过周围人测距法，我想，他应该不太迷路，也能为他人指明方向。
- Rana loves Starshrooms! If only I could get some from the forest... ｜ 拉娜姐姐可喜欢吃星蕈了！要是能去森林里弄一些就好了…
- Superlative Superstrength ｜ 乱神之怪力
- I wanna grow taller... ｜ 想要长高…
- So, about your daughter... ｜ 关于你的女儿…
- Many did. ｜ 有好多人相信呢。
- Traveler ｜ 玩家
- Food ｜ 食物
- A whole city that's... floating in the air... upside down!? ｜ 在空中的，倒立的，一整座城市？
- "Go, touch the flame-engraved light... Win permission to reach the Sacred Mountain's heart..." ｜ 「去触碰那火鳞镌刻之光吧…去获取，通往圣山之心的许可…」
- Hmm... Looks like she's having some trouble. Why don't we go and introduce ourselves? ｜ 唔…她是不是遇到了什么麻烦？我们去和她打个招呼吧。
- Well, I've missed my chance to discuss the issue of our funds. Guess I've got no choice but to deal with Boss directly now. ｜ 事到如今，经费的问题已经说不出口了，只能直接解决老大。

- Arataki Itto ｜ 荒泷一斗
- Tsk, you make up stuff faster than a politician. It's a wonder nobody's asked you to be an adviser yet. ｜ 啧啧，你就是传说中的虚空政治家吗？怎么没人请你去当幕僚。
- Decreases swimming Stamina consumption for your own party members by 20%.\nNot stackable with Passive Talents that provide the exact same effects. ｜ 队伍中自己的角色游泳消耗的体力降低20%。\n无法与效果完全相同的固有天赋叠加。
- Oh no... We've lost her. ｜ 哎呀…跟丢了。

- Oh, Barbara-sama! You're so hard-working... If I put in as much effort as you, who knows where my apprenticeship would take me! ｜ 芭芭拉小姐真努力啊…要是我也能像她这么努力的话，那我锻造的技术…
- Adeptal Mirror Reward ｜ 洞天宝鉴奖励
- Akademiya Researcher ｜ 教令院学者
- After a nearby party member triggers a Nightsoul Burst, Kinich will gain 1 stack of Hunter's Experience that lasts 15s. Max 2 stacks. When Kinich uses <color=#FFD780FF>Canopy Hunter: Riding High</color>'s Scalespiker Cannon, all stacks of Hunter's Experience will be consumed, with each stack consumed increasing the DMG dealt by this Cannon shot by 320% of Kinich's ATK. ｜ 队伍中的附近的角色触发「夜魂迸发」后，将为基尼奇赋予一层「猎人心得」，持续15秒，至多叠加2层。基尼奇在施放<color=#FFD780FF>悬猎·游骋高狩</color>的迴猎贯鳞炮时，将消耗所有的「猎人心得」，并依据消耗的层数，每层使本次迴猎贯鳞炮造成的伤害基于基尼奇攻击力的320%提高。
- Obtain {param2} points ｜ 积分达到{param2}
- What, not used to me giving you information first? ｜ 怎么？我这么主动地给你们信息，你有些不习惯吗？
- A dish of meat and vegetables. Each dully colored tomato seems to be almost trembling, as though it wants to open its mouth and sob at what it has become. Even worse, the ground meat inside tastes like wood chips. There's four of these cup-like tomato abominations, just how should they be dealt with? ｜ 荤素搭配的菜肴。歪歪斜斜的番茄颜色黯淡，仿佛是在张嘴嚎哭。更糟糕的是，里面的肉末吃起来像是木渣一般。这样的番茄盅有四个，该怎么解决才好呢？
- A mission that we would have needed weeks, even months to accomplish, was but child's play to you... If turned to evil, such abilities could produce outsize damage at a very small price. ｜ 我们需要几个星期或者几个月才能完成的任务，对你们来说可能是轻而易举的事…而如果把元素力用来作恶的话，也会以很小的代价，造成恐怖的破坏。
- Those sages really have some nerve. Five hundred years ago, Lesser Lord Kusanali used all her power for the people of Sumeru, and what did they do in return? ｜ 那群贤者可真是胆大妄为，要知道五百年前小吉祥草王就是为了须弥子民才耗尽力量的，可他们呢？
- A true blue Fontinalia Festival snack. Its crystalline coloration would not be ashamed if compared to the light scattering off the rippling waves. Its featherweight elegance is like that of falling petals, its airy texture like a snowflake melting in your throat. To eat such a delicacy must surely be the loveliest thing that could happen during the Festival! ｜ 蓝盈盈的千灵节甜点。色泽晶莹，好比是水面泛出的波光；外形淡雅，如同刚从枝头撷下的花卉；口感轻盈，仿佛雪花融于喉头。能吃到这样一份美味，应该是千灵节里最幸福的事情了吧！
- But... all the food got eaten by my guide, Paimon. ｜ 饭都被向导派蒙吃了。
- Stairs ｜ 楼梯
- I don't think that's the problem... ｜ 大概不是这个问题…
- *ahem* So, you know about the Bloomflower Trials, right? I— I mean we, were wondering... Have you decided which tribe you'll join? If not, how about the People of the Springs? ｜ 咳，荣花演武不是要开始了吗？你有没有想好加入哪个部族？没有的话，要不要来我们流泉之众？
- I merely need to accelerate consumption, and... ｜ 只要加速消耗…就可以…
- So as for my book... *sigh* Even I don't know how much longer it'll take at this point. ｜ 至于那本书…唉，说实话，就连我自己都不知道会编多久了…
- Well, Venti and Nahida both said... ｜ 温迪和纳西妲都说过…
- When we help each other out, we give the other components as tokens of gratitude. And Xana likes them more than most, so she often exchanges a lot of nice things for them. Oh, but she doesn't seem to be in the village... ｜ 我们互相帮忙的时候，会送零件做谢礼。还有泽娜，特别喜欢零件，所以会用各种好东西来交换零件。啊，但她好像不在村里…
- "The energy system used by Fontaine is threatening to murder our future!" ｜ 「枫丹现行的能源机制，正在谋害所有人的未来！」
- Light novels are one way for people to pursue happiness in their free time. So are hot springs, and so is therapy. ｜ 轻小说，温泉和心理诊疗服务，其实都是在闲暇时间寻找快乐的方式。
- "Wine Market"? ｜ 「美酒集市」？

- So... ｜ 所以说…

- Fortune Stick: Inundation ｜ 灵签·自照
- Tend to those wounds! ｜ 赶快疗伤！
- One can certainly rest well in a room like this. ｜ 在这样的房间里，一定能安稳地休息吧。
- I... well... I mean, Snezhnaya is, after all, an ally of Mondstadt's... ｜ 我，这…对了，至冬国不管怎么说也是蒙德的盟友啊…
- Let's blow bubbles. ｜ 吹泡泡。
- About the Khvarena Monument. ｜ 关于灵光碑。

- This is indeed music. In fact, this whole island is a giant musical instrument. Since you are a musician, you should be able to understand the meaning behind its original creation. ｜ 是音乐啊。说起来，这座岛本就是一件庞大的乐器。既然你是音乐人，应该能理解其中的深意。
- Hmph... ｜ 哼…
- Prayers to Springtime ｜ 祭冰之人

- Composed ｜ 气定神闲
- Ways to use your wind glider? ｜ 风之翼的飞行方法…

- You must preheat to attack! ｜ 要攻击的话得先预热才行！
- Paimon knew Yoimiya would like this kind of thing. ｜ 我就知道宵宫会喜欢这个。
- ...And yet, you've never told anyone about these engravings in the Blazegem Inscriptions that can be activated at any time. ｜ …而这些包含在「燃晶名刻」内部，随时都可以启用的「燃素刻录」，你没有告诉过任何人。
- So, Master Dugu. Have you heard of one by the name of Zhiyi? ｜ 那，不知道独孤大侠听说过知易吗？
- Cloud Retainer ｜ 留云借风真君
- Then, what should we do now? ｜ 那我们现在该怎么办？
- I will continue to investigate "Black Shadow." The matter of the small animals is yours to resolve. ｜ 小动物就拜托你了。我继续调查那个「黑影」的事情。
- Did someone drop it? ｜ 难道是谁遗落在这里的吗？
- A huge black dragon, a tree, and some strange person? ｜ 一只大黑龙，树，和什么奇怪的人？

- Could you tell Mamere... Hmm, what to say... ｜ 帮我跟玛梅赫说…该说什么好呢？

- Yoimiya is always up for a chat. It is only when the fireworks are ascending into the skies that she quiets down and just watches the lovely scenery.\nPeople often say that fireworks come and go in a fleeting heartbeat, but if they are memorable enough, they will remain in bloom forever in people's hearts.\nThose who accompanied you and the loveliness of the moment itself, will burrow deep into your mind as a beautiful memory.\nAnd as you look upon the same fireworks, many years later, that same memory and the feelings that came with it will surely rise again to the forefront of your heart.\nIs this not also "Eternity"?\nThe special firework formula slips that belong solely to the Naganohara family exist for precisely this purpose.\nBy incorporating goodwill and wishes into the gorgeous fireworks, ephemeral things are etched into eternity. This is the meaning of Yoimiya's line of work.\nOn one summer night following her taking over Naganohara Fireworks, Yoimiya could not sleep, and thus she continued in her research till daylight came.\nSuddenly, she heard a tinkling sound, and a burning-red object fell into an unused launching tube.\nAt first, Yoimiya used her Vision as a sort of lighter. Fortunately, her father discovered it and explained a Vision's significance to her.\nSo, this tiny gem could grant a person astonishing and mysterious powers. And yet what else could it do other than protect the children or chase some mischievous monsters away?\n"Even if it could have other uses," Yoimiya thought, "it may not ever need to do these things in my hands. I'm just someone who pursues happiness, a fireworks-maker who enjoys living life."\nTime has flown since then, and Yoimiya has grown ever more skilled in the manipulation of "fire," with her skill at making fireworks having likewise increased.\nSometimes, she stops to ask herself this: "How did someone as ordinary as me receive the acknowledgment of the gods? Do the gods... enjoy fireworks, by any chance?" ｜ 宵宫随时都能侃侃而谈，唯独烟花升空时，她会罕见地沉默下来，仰头观看空中美景。\n人们常说烟花转瞬即逝，是须臾之物。但只要它足够美丽，就能在人的心中永恒盛开。\n相伴赏烟花的人，与那时的美好，将会随那份感动深深印入脑海，成为一生的美好回忆。\n时隔多年再度仰望相同的烟花，那份感动想必也会如潮水一般涌上心头。\n这样的事，不也是「永恒」吗？\n「长野原」家独有的烟花配方纸条，正是为此而存在。\n将情意与愿望融入绚烂烟花，令短暂的事物变得隽永。宵宫从事这一行的意义，也在于此。\n接任「长野原烟花店」后的一个夏夜，她迟迟未睡。直到天边露出灰白色，也还在埋头钻研。\n忽然传来轻响。一件炽红的事物悄然落入了待发的烟花筒。\n起初，宵宫一直将这枚「神之眼」当成点火工具来用。幸好父亲及时发现，向她解释了这件物品的重要意义。\n小小的「神之眼」，竟能带来如此惊人又不可思议的力量。可除了守护孩子们、赶跑捣乱的魔物，它还有什么用呢？\n宵宫想，就算有，或许对我而言也不过如此。因为，我只是一个追赶快乐、欢喜度日的烟花匠人而已。\n自那以后，时间过得飞快，宵宫对「火焰」的掌控愈发娴熟，制作烟花也愈发得心应手了。\n偶尔，她会问自己：就算是我这样普普通通的人，也能得到神明的认可。为什么呢？难道说…神明也喜欢烟花吗？

- A silent stone statue of a serene and solemn sword-bearing soldier, as though upholding a set of supreme convictions from which it cannot be swayed and which may not be profaned. A replica of the stone statues that can be found around Petrichor.\nThough it completely lacks the combat capabilities of golems, the stone statue's majestic appearance alone is enough to repel bandits with wavering hearts. Naturally, even if it should fail to scare them off, you needn't worry, for The Realm Within doesn't seem to have much of a bandit problem anyway... ｜ 手持利剑的甲士石像，其神情庄严肃穆，仿佛在秉持着至高的信念不容亵渎，是佩特莉可镇周边石像的仿制品。\n虽然完全不具备魔像的战斗功能，但这尊石像仅凭威武至极的外表，也足以喝退那些心志不坚的盗匪。当然，即使无法喝退也不必担心，毕竟壶中洞天似乎本就不用担心盗匪的问题…

- In the past, the ancients would climb the peak now known as Mt. Yougou and bend wood that had been charred by lightning into a hook to offer as an effigy unto the thundering force that lit up the skies and shook the earth. This shape would eventually become the "Electro Mitsudomoe" symbol, symbolizing the favor, wisdom, and might of Electro, and also the people who represent these values. ｜ 在过去，先民会攀登如今被称为影向山的高峰，将雷电灼烧过的树木雕琢成曲勾形，为照亮高天的闪电、震撼大地的鸣雷赋予造型。这个形象在漫长岁月的积累中，最终演化成了「雷之三重巴」的纹样，象征着雷的眷顾、智慧与威能，以及代行此等眷顾、智慧与威能的人们。
- Kaedehara Kazuha ｜ 枫原万叶
- Who else? Do you see anyone else around here? ...Well, you probably wouldn't see them if there was. ｜ 不然还有谁？你看看周围，难道有什么奇怪的人吗？就算有，你也看不见嘛。
- Not a trace. ｜ 没有他的踪影。
- In Inazuman folklore, the yumekui-baku have always been celebrated for their benevolent and carefree nature, depicted as beings without wants of their own, yet ever ready to help others in need.\nMizuki is a shining example of this in the flesh. Despite her extensive experience in helping others ward off nightmares, she has never capitalized on her reputation by increasing her fees, instead maintaining a remarkably lenient pricing policy.\nWhen treating the common folk, she calculates her labor fee by adhering to a strict formula — half of the patient's hourly wage multiplied by the duration of the session. Even when it amounts to no more than the price of a bowl of ramen, she accepts her meager earnings without a word of discontent.\nIn Mizuki's eyes, these patients suffer enough as-is, so the least she can do is avoid adding financial burdens to their woes.\nFor wealthier patients, she asks them to set their own price, saying, "Given your means, what would you consider fair payment for this treatment?"\nWhether out of respect for Mizuki or simply to uphold their own sense of pride, such patients invariably end up proposing handsome prices indeed...\nThis approach has earned her services widespread acclaim, leading to a steady stream of appointments that keeps her so busy that she often goes for weeks without a single day off.\nAfter consuming a patient's nightmares, it always feels as if she has eaten a large bowl of rice. So long as the toxins are not too potent, both her youkai power and physical strength will be replenished.\nBy all accounts, Mizuki seldom indulges in personal spending. Aside from a few simple outfits and the occasional inexpensive dessert, she rarely treats herself to anything, keeping her living expenses to a bare minimum.\nA youkai with practically no time off, almost no inclination to spend, nearly zero expenditure, and a relentless work ethic... Given several centuries, just how much could such an individual save up? Without any precedents to compare her against, it's a tough question to answer.\nNo matter how you arrive at your estimate, one thing is for certain — that her savings must be substantial, to say the very least. And they were, in fact, the foundation that underpinned Mizuki's own investments.\nFor a time, the turmoil caused by the Sakoku Decree prevented her from returning to Inazuma, leaving her unable to inspect the progress that had been made on the Aisa Bathhouse. Several of her other ventures, too, remained stuck at the planning stage, with no hope of headway in sight...\nYet during this period, Mizuki was far from idle. She worked tirelessly to keep abreast of all the latest trends in Teyvat, ensuring that her future businesses could cater to all age groups and alleviate the troubles of patients young and old.\nInspired by modern theories, she strove to make the process less daunting for her patients by stripping it of its overtly "clinical" characteristics. She referred to her patients as "guests" and rebranded the serious business of therapy as a form of leisure, meticulously refining every detail to foster an atmosphere of complete relaxation.\nUpon returning to Inazuma, Mizuki applied the research findings she had acquired in Fontaine, personally starring in a series of innovative new "promotional programs" designed to catapult her reputation to new heights.\nDespite having plenty of awkward moments in front of the Kamera, and how she sometimes got so nervous that she could hardly catch her breath, she knew that if she could just convince people to try out her new approach to therapy — so they could put their worries behind them, once and for all — then it would all be worth it.\nBut aside from her own publicity efforts, Mizuki just so happened to also know a fellow professional with great potential for collaboration.\nAnd that was none other than her old friend, Yae Miko — editor-in-chief of the cultural and artistic hub that was the Yae Publishing House. ｜ 在稻妻居民的美谈之中，食梦貘一族始终有着「自身无欲无求，对他人有求必应」的随和形象。\n而瑞希更是其中的典例，她帮助人们抵御噩梦侵扰的资历颇为深厚，却没有依靠资深的招牌提价，收取费用的标准反而相当宽松——\n面对平民百姓，瑞希会以患者时薪的一半为基数，乘上诊疗所用的时间，严格计算自己的苦劳费，哪怕只能买下一份拉面，也没有怨言。\n按照瑞希的观点，这些患者本就饱受折磨，更不能在经济开销上为他们增加压力。\n若是患者财力可观，瑞希则会请对方自行定价，开出「以阁下的财力，这次诊疗应得的报酬」。\n无论出于对瑞希的尊重，还是为了维持自身的尊严，富裕的患者都会开出漂亮的价钱…\n这样的做法使得瑞希的诊疗服务有口皆碑，有求于她的预约源源不断，以至于她常常整周无休。\n而瑞希将病患的噩梦吞食后，就如吃下了一大碗稻米，只要杂质的毒性不强，妖力和体力都会得到补充。\n可以说，瑞希很少为自己花钱，至多为自己准备几套平民的衣物，偶尔尝尝价格宜人的甜品，生活开销相当之低。\n一位没有假期，没有消费欲望，支出近乎为零，工作尤其勤快的妖怪，究竟能在几百年里存下多少钱…这个问题很难找到参考案例。\n不管怎样估算，这笔存款都不容小觑，它正是瑞希进行投资的基础。\n虽说锁国的风波使瑞希无法及时返回稻妻，验收「秋沙钱汤」的成果，其他几个产业项目也还停留在图纸上，短时间内没有眉目…\n但这段时间，瑞希也没闲着，而是在不断跟进提瓦特前沿的风尚，以确保自己将来的集团老少皆宜，能为各种年龄段的患者排解烦忧。\n得到了新时代理论的启发后，瑞希为了减轻病人的心理负担，在努力地去除心理诊疗的医学表现，转而称病患为「客人」，用休闲活动的形式装点诊疗这一严肃行为，力求顾及每个细节，予病人以最佳的松弛感。\n返回稻妻后，瑞希更是应用了她在枫丹习得的研究成果，开始亲自录制「宣传节目」的新式映影，力求声名鹊起。\n为了能让人们尝试新的诊疗体系，尽早告别忧虑，就算自己在镜头前多次碰壁，甚至有时紧张得过度呼吸，也无比值得…\n不过，瑞希的面前还有一位极具合作潜质的同行。\n那就是好友神子执掌的艺术机构「八重堂」。

- Thoma's specialty. The intricate appearance of this dish belies the simple ingredients used. But take a sip, and Thoma's sunshine smile comes straight to mind. Perhaps this is his special ability: warming the hearts of others using the simplest of ingredients. ｜ 托马的特色料理。精致的造型令人不敢相信用料的简单，喝上一口，托马阳光般热忱的笑脸便浮上心头。将最朴素的食材，制作成温暖人身心的美味，这就是他的本领吗？
- You've come to the right person. My family was in the mining business in the past. As a result, I have the ability to discern the quality of ore with a single glance, which earned me the moniker "Pan Guan'er." ｜ 你算是问对人了，我家以前是做矿石生意的，因此我一眼就能分辨出矿石的好坏，所以得了个「判官儿」的外号。

- Whenever I drank it, the spiciness would always push me to work harder... ｜ 每次喝的时候，这种辣辣的感觉也是在提醒我，我还需要更加努力，更加努力才行。
- Phew, we made it! Great work, Kachina! ｜ 上来了！做得好卡齐娜！
- Yeesh, if Jean was listening to this... ｜ 唉，要是这段话被琴团长听见了…
- A type of crystal formed from the combination of concentrated life force with an energy unique to Dragonspine. Makes for an ideal nutrient for growing Frostbearing Trees. ｜ 某种浓郁的生命力与龙脊雪山的特殊能量结合产生的结晶。对于渴求生长的忍冬之树，是绝好的「养分」。

- Seamus Pegg... Cardinal of Daybreak and the Seneschal of the Church of Favonius. ｜ …「拂晓的枢机卿」，西风教会主教，西蒙·佩奇。
- Interesting Things ｜ 感兴趣的见闻…
- Many unexpected things have happened on this mountain. A mysterious hidden camp, suddenly-appearing thieves, uninvited enemies... This sword seems to have brought you into the thick of all this weirdness. So long as it remains in your hands, trouble will always follow in its wake — with such troubles including those who have come to take the sword, and new monsters heretofore unseen. ｜ 雪山上有太多意料之外的事：神秘隐蔽的营地、突然出现的小偷、不请自来的敌人。这把剑似乎将你们带入了怪圈，只要它还在你手中，麻烦就会源源不断地到来。你的麻烦，甚至包括蛮横夺剑之人与闻所未闻的新怪物。

- If things can get dangerous, you'd better leave them to me. ｜ 有点危险，还是我来吧。

- A dynamic and energetic "Good Shelf," this origami decoration features sturdy and reliable trays and shrub-shaped displays ideal for showing off figurines related to the fairytale Forest of Blessings.\nIt is said that the most important task for a "Good Shelf" is to honestly protect all things. Thus, whether the joyous jumping contest of Rainsong Pond, the raucous banquets of the Calligraphy Tavern, or the stunning scenery of the Kingdom of Breezes and Bells, all can be recreated without reservation by this Good Shelf. ｜ 活力四射的「好架子」，安装有坚实可靠的展示用托盘与树丛形状的折纸装饰，用来陈列赐福森林相关的童话巧像最为合适不过。\n据说，「好架子」最重要的任务就是诚实地保管所有东西。因此，无论是雨歌塘内欢脱的跳跃比赛，墨色酒馆里热闹的宴会还是铃风王国绮丽的景色，它都能毫无保留地完美重现。

- We've met lots of interesting and nice people along the way, too. You'll hit it off with them in no time! ｜ 而且，我们在旅行的时候，认识了好多好多有趣又善良的人。他们一定也能成为阿瑠的朋友的！
- Masrur at Port Ormos is currently worrying himself sick over a letter with an unclear address... ｜ 奥摩斯港的马斯鲁尔先生正在为一封收信地址模糊的信而犯愁…
- This text records the geography and hydrology of Byakuyakoku. With the sealing of the depths and the emigration of the people of Watatsumi, as well as the passing of long years, this book is now useless. ｜ 记载了白夜国地理和水文的工具类图书。随着海渊的封门以及海祇民的集体移居，再加上漫长时光的变动，这本书已经没用了。

- Correct. Although it possessed Shingo, it didn't have any ill intentions. As a matter of fact, it actually seemed like it was trying to train Shingo to become bolder. ｜ 对，就是这样。它虽然附在信悟身上，却并没什么恶意，而且好像还在训练信悟的胆魄呢。
- I'm the best at running! I'm so fast, that sometimes not even Mama can catch me! ｜ 跑步我最擅长了。我跑得可快了，有时候妈妈都追不上我呢。
