- A fern taken from the oasis within Apep's body.\nAt the dawn of time, the world belonged to the dragons. There, the ferns were the first to sprout in the lush verdant world of Apep's court.\nIn the ages after, these ferns would become trees, vines, roots, and leaves, blanketing the world with their touch. But Apep still remembers the first frond as it stretched freely toward the sky, making a sound so delicate as to go unheard. ｜ 从阿佩普体内的绿洲中取来的一支蕨草。\n在时间开始之前，世界曾经由龙管辖。而在阿佩普的宫阙灵囿里、草木生长之天地中，首先抽芽的便是蕨草。\n在随后的漫长年月当中，蕨草将变为树木、藤蔓、根茎与草叶，遍布大地。但阿佩普还记得最初的一支蕨草由蜷曲的姿态，向无拘无束的天空伸展开时，发出的细不可闻的声响。

- "...Even so, your stories and mine will leave their traces in the depths of the desert, like the footprints of the Forest Kind."\n"So shall past friendships peacefully sleep, like an Aranara transformed into a seed." ｜ 「…即使如此，在沙漠的深处，如同森林王留下足印，你我留下故事。」\n「过去友情的痕迹，听说如同化为子种的兰那罗，仍在静静沉睡着。」

- I... I... ｜ 我…我…
- A booth that can be seen at the Magnificent Irodori Festival. It consists of a Yumemiru Wood table and crates, and doesn't take up much space, but is extremely popular because the main exhibits at this booth are various kinds of fan fiction. The items are often sold out within a few hours, which is a testament to their popularity. Such a spacious open booth is more suitable for many layouts in a limited space, and it is also convenient for personnel and goods to enter and exit, to facilitate the timely replenishment of goods.\nIn the words of Guuji Yae, light novels are the very heart of the Irodori Festival, and many customers come from far and wide to buy these exclusive fan fiction. Some loyal readers also believe that by waiting by such booths, it is possible to meet the authors themselves by chance. Of course, such behavior may cause on-site congestion and increase security risks, so it will be politely discouraged by the staff of the festival... ｜ 可见于「光华容彩祭」的展位，由「梦见木」桌柜和货箱组成，占地面积不大，看似毫不起眼，却有着极高的人气，因为这种摊位的主要的展品是各式各样的同人作品。展位上的商品常常在几个小时内售罄，火爆程度可见一斑。这样宽敞的开放式展位更适合大量布置在有限的空间内，也便于人员和货物出入，及时补货。\n用八重宫司的话来说，轻小说正是容彩祭的核心，不少客人为了买到限定的同人作品不远万里而来，部分忠实读者还相信，只要在这种展位旁等候，就有可能偶遇作者本尊。当然，这种行为可能造成现场拥堵，增加安全隐患，因此会被容彩祭的工作人员礼貌地劝阻…
- Ryuuji, we'll head back to the police station first. We'll pay you a visit when we're done with this guy. ｜ 龙二，那我们就先回奉行所了。等处理好了这家伙，我们会再登门拜谢的。
- It's definitely better to have an expert teach us than figure everything out on our own, right? What do you think, should we take her up on her offer? ｜ 有个懂行的人来指导，总归是比我们自己摸索要强的吧？不如先答应她？
- So, which snack should we prepare? How about we choose one for her? ｜ 所以说，要准备哪一道点心呢？不如我们替她挑选一下。

- Uhhh... ｜ 呃…

- You're back. Nervous An and Jiangzhou just sent me a message. ｜ 你回来了，刚才小安和江舟送了口信过来。

- Wow! So much ore! I can make lots and lots of paints with these. Thank you so much! ｜ 哇！这么多矿石，可以做好多好多颜料。谢谢你们！
- I had some nerves at first, but my bed was great — I fell asleep the minute my head hit the pillow. ｜ 一开始有些紧张，不过这里的床好舒服，躺在床上很快就睡过去了。
- And so you decided to get mixed up with the likes of Concini? ｜ 所以，你就和那个叫做孔锡尼的人搅在一起了？
- An arbor with an aura. It emanates quiet beauty, its crystal-clear flowers hang from branches where the glimmering twilight gathers, and its twirling branches have a sense of flow and rhythm, like the rhythm of life itself, with each inch of their arcs being filled with vitality.\nThough such trees are far from the most ancient entities within Vanarana, they have still witnessed centuries of Nara-Aranara interaction, becoming scribes to the poetry of that relationship. Such trees delight in melodious songs and answer the singers with beautiful dreams. In such dreams, the singer shall find themselves embraced by the memories of the woods, and with the pomegranates they shall sing, and they shall hear the apples clap... ｜ 氤氲着灵气的乔木，恬静伫立的形姿优美，晶莹的花朵垂悬枝头，点点微光荟萃，盘旋的枝杈则有生息流转般的律动感，每寸弧线中都凝聚着蓬勃生机。\n虽说这株树木远非桓那兰那中最为古久的生灵，却也见证着兰那罗与那菈几百年来的邂逅，宛如一首长诗的记述者。悠扬的歌声使它欢欣，它对歌者答以美梦。梦中歌者被森林温暖的记忆轻拥，与石榴齐唱，聆听苹果轻快的掌声…
- I know you just returned from the Fortress of Meropide. Relax, I have no intention of trying to get anything out of you. Lyney, Lynette and Freminet are still there, and I trust their judgment and abilities. ｜ 我知道你刚从梅洛彼得堡回来，不必紧张，不打算套你的话。林尼、琳妮特与菲米尼也在那里，我相信他们的能力和判断。

- After a Tepetlisaurus drills into the ground, it can <color=#FFE14BFF>consume Phlogiston</color> to move in all directions, even digging up cliffs.\n<color=#FFE14BFF>Jumping</color> while in this underground drilling state will trigger a short <color=#FFE14BFF>high-speed leap forward</color>. ｜ 嵴锋龙钻入地面以后，可以<color=#FFE14BFF>消耗燃素</color>进行全方位的移动，甚至可以在崖壁掘地上行。\n在钻入地面的状态下进行<color=#FFE14BFF>跳跃</color>，可以进行短暂的<color=#FFE14BFF>高速跃进</color>。

- Ema ｜ 绘真
- A muscular hilichurl that uses solid ice as a shield, wielding it in battle.\nReason normally dictates that large creatures that see a lot of action should burn through a great number of calories to sustain themselves. As such, the present-day El Musk has proposed the "Mitachurl Index." This index correlates the percentage of mitachurls within the hilichurl population to the stability and success of hilichurl foraging activity. ｜ 以严冰为盾的丘丘人大块头，会利用坚冰的巨盾战斗。\n普遍而言，体积庞大、活动频繁的生物需要消耗大量的热量来维持生存。由此，当代的艾尔·马斯克提出了「暴徒指数」，根据某地区中活动的丘丘暴徒数量在丘丘人总人口中占的比例，计算这些丘丘人食物获取的丰富、稳定性。
- But the three places mentioned in the notes sound so familiar... Haven't we been to all of them? ｜ 不过…笔记里提到的这三处地方，都好熟悉…我们是不是都去过了。

- A ragtag group of bandits whose traces can be found all across the lands, even in the deepest depths of uncharted domains.\nAlthough their main purpose is hunting treasure, they are also known to get rough with unfortunate bystanders who happen to be nearby.\nIt's said that the group's founder, Reed Miller, defined the Treasure Hoarders as "an organization of mutual cooperation." ｜ 足迹遍布大陆各处，甚至深入未知秘境的松散盗贼组织。\n虽然主要的活动是收集宝藏，但也会出手撵走倒霉的目击者。\n据说创始人雷德·米勒将盗宝团定义为「互助协调组织」…？
- <color=#FF5E41>Rash outlander, why do you still linger here? This place is fraught with dangers uncounted, venture no deeper.</color> ｜ <color=#FF5E41>异邦的冒失者，为何还不离去，此处危险重重，勿要再向内深入了。</color>
- Take a picture of "Stage Tepetl" ｜ 为「特佩利舞台」留影
- Few city dwellers have ever seen Sethos running at full tilt. Had they, they would know that this was a young man who could run like no other; any who wished to keep up with him would have to run as fast as the wind.\nSethos himself is very proud of this, and often remarks: "You're gonna need some special skills if you want to survive in the desert, right? Mine's running, and running fast."\nThanks to his fleetness of foot, those around him often entrust him with important errands — though strictly speaking, these aren't actual jobs, not even of the part-time variety. Things like delivering letters for bedridden elderly folks, or fetching homework for forgetful students who left it at home.\nHe is repaid in all sorts of different ways. Some students give Mora and others buy him coffee, while others still have offered up their treasured Genius Invokation TCG cards as a token of their heartfelt appreciation.\nAs for the older folks, their gifts have always been... more unique, shall we say. Aside from money, some even treat Sethos to a home-cooked meal, or dig up some old ornament to present to him as a gift.\nBut the easy-going Sethos always accepts everything he is given. He adds it all to his collection, which he sorts by value: Mora, ornaments, useless odds and ends, Genius Invokation TCG cards, and everything else.\nA woman on Treasures Street once asked him, "You never say no to any task! Don't tell me you actually enjoy running errands?"\nSethos loved eating the fried fish rolls she made. Apparently, aside from her own family and neighbors, the helpful Sethos, who lent a hand to her shop, was the only one on the entire street who had ever had the pleasure of tasting that delectable delicacy.\nHolding the meal box she'd just given him, Sethos stood there for quite some time, thinking the question through.\n"Huh, you're right," he finally said, as if something had just dawned upon him. "Come to think of it, I really do enjoy running errands."\n"You don't want a better line of work? You seem to know a lot, and you're pretty capable, too... If you'd like, I could help you find a job?" The woman sounded very concerned for him.\nSethos simply waved his hand and pointed at a figure that was flying past in the distance. "What do you think that person's doing?"\nThe woman looked up and saw a large, round object sailing by, with what appeared to be a person beneath it. In a tone of surprise, she replied, "Isn't that another errand-runner?"\n"That's Hat Guy, a student from Vahumana who's known for his speed," said Sethos, raising his fork. "But I've heard that sometimes, he also gets called on to deliver letters for the Akademiya."\n"Do you mean that... that's just what he likes to do?"\n"No, no, I don't think he likes it, but I'm not like him. I'm a people person, and I enjoy running errands and taking on the easy tasks. And look, you even treated me to a meal! Besides, I've got a proper job too, so don't worry about me."\nOver the next few days, Sethos was busy with his own affairs. One day, as he passed by the side gate of the Akademiya to handle something, he suddenly heard a voice jeering at him from the treetops: "The errand-boy's come running all the way to the Akademiya. Quite the busy little bee, aren't you?"\nPerched up there on the branch was none other than Hat Guy himself. Smiling back, Sethos raised the lunchbox in his hand and smiled at him, saying, "I'm just here for lunch — someone gave me this. Want some?"\n"I'd say you're no errand boy at all. You've got a more important role."\n"I'd say that you're no student either. You've got a more important role."\nSometimes, a few words are all it takes. Without another word, Hat Guy tugged the brim of his hat and vanished in an instant. As for who Sethos really was, or what this "important role" of his was... Well, there was no one around to hear their little exchange anyway, let alone care.\nSethos took his time finding a spot with a good view where he could sit down and enjoy this free lunch of his, which he'd received for a multitude of reasons. Having the chance to meet all these different people, and receive all these gifts in return... He was quite satisfied that this was all thanks to his running ability. ｜ 城里人很少见到赛索斯全力奔跑。事实上这个年轻小伙跑起来速度一流，谁要是想追上他，可能得有风的速度。\n赛索斯本人对此也很自豪，常说：生活在沙漠总要有点本事吧？我的本事就是跑得快，而且能跑。\n他因此接到不少事，严格来说连份兼职都算不上，只是因步子太快，就被邻居委以重任，有时帮病重在家的老人送个信，有时给忘了拿书的蠢学生送本作业。\n人们给他的报酬各不相同。有些学生给摩拉，有些请他喝咖啡，还有些送了珍藏的七圣召唤卡牌给他以示重谢。\n而老人们，拥有的东西更为复杂，除了钱，他们甚至会下厨招待赛索斯，或找出很有年头的小摆件当做礼物送给他。\n赛索斯好说话得很，从不嫌弃。他将那些东西按价值分类收藏：钱、摆件、没用的杂物、七圣召唤卡牌，及其他。\n「你好像什么工作都接呀，不会是喜欢当跑腿的吧？」宝商街的妇人问。\n赛索斯喜欢吃她做的煎鱼卷，据说这条街上除了她家人和邻居，就只有给她店里帮过忙的赛索斯有幸吃到这道美味佳肴。\n他捧着妇人带去的饭盒，认真想了半天。\n「真的呢，」赛索斯惊奇地说，「我也是今天才意识到，自己居然这么喜欢当跑腿的。」\n「不找个更好的差事吗？看你懂的东西还挺多，又能干，要不然…我帮你找个地方打工吧？」妇人忧心忡忡地说。\n赛索斯只是摆手，指着远处飞过的一个人影。「阿姨，你觉得那人是干什么的？」\n妇人抬头，只见一个宽宽的圆圆的物件飞了过去，底下好像还有个人。她惊奇地说：「那不也是个跑腿的吗？」\n「那个人是伐护末那学院的学生，叫阿帽，他就是动作快。」赛索斯举起叉子，「不过听说偶尔也会被叫去给院里帮忙送送信。」\n「意思是他就喜欢干这个？」\n「不不，我看他不太喜欢。但我就不一样了，我乐意跟人打交道，也喜欢跑跑腿做点举手之劳的事，你看，你还会请我吃饭呢。而且我有正经工作，别担心。」\n那之后好几天，赛索斯忙着做自己的事。某天他出门办事经过教令院侧门，树上忽然传来讥讽的声音：「跑腿跑到教令院来了，业务很广啊。」\n坐在树杈上的不是别人，正是阿帽。赛索斯冲他笑笑，举起手里的饭盒：「我来吃午饭。别人送我的，你要吗？」\n「我猜你的工作不是跑腿。你另有要职。」。\n「我猜你的工作也不是学生。你另有要职。」\n有些话说到这里就可以了。阿帽并未再说什么，一拉帽檐，很快便消失不见。至于赛索斯究竟是谁，另有什么要职，反正附近没人听见，也无人关心。\n赛索斯悠闲地找了一处观景位，坐下来享用基于各种原因得到的免费午餐。对于跑得快就能结交各种人得到各种谢礼，他很是满意。

- A small pastry-and-coffee combo. The two pointy pieces of bread conceal fluffy softness within crispy crusts, and the aromatic butter dances in perfect harmony with the intense coffee aroma, a match made in heaven. Whether by early morning light or brief break hour, to partake of this lovely combo is to salve even the most exhausted soul. ｜ 小面包与咖啡的套餐。两头尖尖的面包有着松软的内里与酥脆的外皮，香甜的黄油气息四溢在空气之中，与咖啡浓烈的味道盘互交错，宛若天作之合。无论是在清晨时分还是小憩时刻，要是能吃上这么一份完美套餐，恐怕再疲惫的人也会雀跃不已。

- A cupboard that may commonly be found in Inazuma. It is made from Aralia Wood that has been painted using deep colors, and is most often found in streetside food kiosks.\nCompared with similar storage furnishings used in stores, the wood these cupboards are made from has been specially dried and their paint coatings are somewhat thinner, protecting them better against dust and oil smoke. It is said that these cupboards can see a decade of use without being visibly stained. ｜ 常见于稻妻的橱柜，由深色漆面的「孔雀木」制成，常见于临街的料理亭。\n相较于商店所用的货柜，这种橱柜的木材表面采用了特殊的干燥工艺，漆面较薄，对浮尘和油烟的防护效果更好。据说这种橱柜使用十年都不会沾染明显的污垢。

- And when I grew a little older, my father hit me over the head with his shovel by mistake as he fought to save my cousin, who had almost choked to death on mushrooms... ｜ 等我长大了一点，有一天表叔被蘑菇呛了个半死，我爸爸在抢救他的时候用铲子打中了我的头…

### Part 110

- The only door we kept unlocked was the one connecting our rooms. That way, if we heard any commotion coming from the other room, we could help each other... ｜ 万一一个人的房里有什么动静，另一个人就随时从中间的门跑去支援…

- You have used the Dissonance "Thunderous Chorus" ｜ 已使用离调「轰雷的合奏」
- In that case, I assume that there's something we can do to help? Just say the word, and we'll take care of it. ｜ 有什么我们能帮上忙的？不要客气。
- If you have anything to share, be it brooding or joyous, distressing or hilarious, write them down on our Message Board! Cat's Tail is all cat ears! ｜ 如果有烦恼的事，有趣的事，高兴的事，不开心的事，都写上来吧！猫尾酒馆会好好倾听大家的心声的！
- Actually, that does sound like an interesting read. ｜ 这新闻标题不错。
- The perfidious Tenacious Blubberball will hide amongst the Ichthyfish, and will not take any damage. Defeat the Ichthyfish swiftly and there shall be nowhere for it to run! ｜ 卑鄙的坚韧膨膨球会在鱼鱼们的掩护下隐身且不会承受伤害。快速击破鱼鱼们，让坚韧膨膨球无处可藏吧！
- Sorush, Sorush... Sorush who took humans for companions. Sorush who lost her way. ｜ 斯露莎，斯露莎…与人类为伴的斯露莎，迷途的斯露莎。
- So, you made a note anyway, huh? Each to their own... Who knows, maybe Chang the Ninth is really into this kind of thing... ｜ 咦，你怎么还是记下来了，好吧…就拿回去给常九爷看看吧，说不定，他会觉得这种情节很有价值…
- The Grapes of Warmth ｜ 温暖的葡萄
- A soft and comfortable Sumeru bed with an elegantly decorated Adhigama Wood bed frame, a mattress made from layers of high-quality fabric, clean sheets, and pillows made from dried flower petals. It is rumored that sleeping in this bed for the time a candle takes to burn would provide a whole night's worth of rest. This bed also prevents the usual back pains researchers get from constantly poring over books, and is the best choice for comfort and leisure. ｜ 松软舒适的须弥床榻，有着雅致花纹的「证悟木」框架，上等布匹层层叠压而成的床垫，整洁的床单和烘干后的花瓣制成的枕头。据说在这种床榻上小睡一根蜡烛燃尽的时间，休息的效果就与整夜的睡眠相当，还能预防学者们长期伏案带来的腰痛和背痛，可谓安逸恬适的极致之选。

- A beverage with simple colors. The smoothie made out of fruit-flavored yogurt has been arranged to resemble the blue sky and white clouds. At the bottom is a thick layer of jelly and finely-cut fruit. The revitalizing flavor makes this beverage the best choice in the summer. ｜ 色彩素净的饮品。融合了果味的酸奶制成冰沙，铺成蓝天白云的模样，底部垫着的是厚厚的一层果丁与晶冻。清爽的味道，正是消暑的好选择。
- Now we're talkin'! If you can get my permit straightened out, I'll write you a killer tune as a token of my heartfelt gratitude. ｜ 太好了！办好「通行凭证」后，我就给你写一首热情澎湃的曲子，当做谢礼！
- Except for some mandatory Akademiya assignments, I delegate tasks to Mr. Effendi. ｜ 除了教令院的任务需要之外，也会分一部分给阿芬迪先生。
- Julie of the Gourmet Supremos seems to be troubled by something... ｜ 全能美食队的朱莉似乎正因为某事而烦恼…
- ! ｜ ！
- This paper is titled "Theory and Practice: Enhancing the Safety of the Chaos Core in Unstable Conditions Using the Khaenri'ah Ruin Golem of Devantaka Mountain as an Example." The body of the paper is riddled with jargon. If you are not a senior Kshahrewar researcher, chances are that the paper's argument will be no less than unfathomable. ｜ 标题为《关于混沌炉心在非稳定态下的安全性提升的理论与实践——以降诸魔山之古国坎瑞亚遗迹巨像为例》的论文。正文充斥着大量术语，若非妙论派的资深学者，恐怕很难理解论文中的论证过程。
- Show the evidence from Mingxing Jewelry. ｜ 从「明星斋」获得的证据。
- A golden crown decorated with turquoise and emerald feathers, it has never been used in a coronation, living alone atop a velvet cushion. ｜ 由松石与翠羽装饰的黄金宝冠，但空居绒垫之上，从未出现在冕礼之中。
- "Actually now I think about it... Maybe I really did get attacked by hilichurls on my way down the mountain last night? I can't remember for sure... My head sure does hurt though. Better get myself to a doctor in Liyue Harbor before thinking any more about these ruins." ｜ 「仔细想想，昨晚下山的时候好像真的被丘丘人袭击了？记不清了。头疼。总之先去璃月港求医，回头再考虑遗迹的事。」
- It's all thanks to you that I managed to bring back the crystal. ｜ 多亏了你帮忙，这枚晶石才没被那群人抢走。
- "And of the Hakushin bloodline." ｜ 「白辰血脉」。

- The hilichurls are preparing to meet their end... ｜ 准备迎接终结的丘丘人…
- Are you sure? You know, this event is very well-funded. And now that the Sakoku Decree has been repealed, I heard that your granddaughter Kazumi wants to take the chance to travel. ｜ 真不去啊？上面批下来的经费很可观哦，我听说您家孙女一美，想趁着锁国令放开了，出去旅旅游呢。
- "Am I up for a game? Ha, such a proposal is too enticing to turn down."\nHint: Kamisato Ayato's deck revolves around Sword and Normal Attacks, enabling successive attacks to be unleashed with the aid of Weapon Cards. ｜ 「想要来上一局牌？呵，我确实拒绝不了这样的请求。」\n【提示】神里绫人的牌组以「单手剑」和「普通攻击」为主题，擅长在装备武器牌后发起巧妙的连击以克敌。
- Busy Kitchen ｜ 忙碌的厨房
- I have a lot of respect for them, but what they do is not for the faint of heart... and definitely not for outlanders. ｜ 我很佩服，但不建议一般人尝试，尤其是外国人哦。
- "Cassiodor" ｜ 「卡西奥多」
- I began to realize that... they were cautious of me from the very beginning. ｜ 我逐渐意识到…他们从一开始就在提防我。
- Hello there, Traveler! Sorry for the scant welcome, but I need to check on our weapon readiness, as always... ｜ 哎，旅行者你好啊！抱歉，我等下还要查看武器的整备情况…
- Contribution Reward ｜ 贡献奖励

- A furnishing device created by an unknown adeptus, who sent a sample of it and the requisite blueprint in a package to Tubby on an auspicious date. The device's exterior very much resembles the tea bowl lid-wearing Chubby, and its puffy, fluffy form is very cute indeed. The tea bowl is uniquely constructed, and you've heard that it contains all manner of adeptal materials that give it a mysterious tenacity, such that you can reach rather high heights when jumping atop it. In that regard, this item is quite similar to certain curious objects that one may find in Teyvat, which likely played a role in Tubby applying the "Leisure Device" appellation to it.\nUnlike the wandering, much-traveled Chubby, Tubby claims to "not be very accustomed to exercise," and is not often seen away from The Realm Within, and can be instead found within it at all times, taking a nap. Only when there is little going on within the Serenitea Pot does she venture out at times to chat and have tea with old friends. As such... one might say that Tubby will likely not use this device. ｜ 不知哪位仙人设计的摆设机关。那位仙人将样品和图纸一同打包，选了个良辰吉日赠予阿圆。机关的外形就像顶着茶碗盖的大脑袋阿嘟，气鼓鼓的模样甚是可爱。茶碗盖的构造特殊，据说内部装有某种仙家材料，具有神奇的韧性，在上方跳跃时，即可顺着机关的弹力上升至高处，单论功能，与提瓦特某些地方的奇妙物体有着相似之处，正好帮阿圆补上了壶中洞天「闲趣机关」的一块拼图。\n话说回来，和四处游历，跋山涉水的阿嘟不同，阿圆声称自己「不擅长运动」，平常很少见她离开洞天宅邸，一天到晚都在打瞌睡。只有在壶中洞天平静无事期间，阿圆偶尔会出门和老友品茶聊天。所以…阿圆大概用不到这种机关？
- Please bring the snacks gentleman, I'm counting on you! ｜ 拜托了，请把点心公子带来吧，拜托了！
- Deploying Xilonen's <color=#FFCC33>insect net</color> within its effective range can <color=#FFCC33>greatly damage a Ward</color> and trap Aphids. Characters' attacks can damage their Wards, and <color=#FFCC33>Nightsoul-aligned attacks</color> can do so more effectively. ｜ 在有效距离内施放希诺宁的<color=#FFCC33>捕虫网</color>可以<color=#FFCC33>大幅破除护罩</color>并禁锢蜜虫。角色的攻击都能在一定程度上破除护罩，具有<color=#FFCC33>夜魂性质的攻击</color>可以更高效地破除护罩。

- Dispels the disguises of all Rebels and briefly marks their location on the minimap while showing the position of nearby Rebels on the scene with a pillar of light.\nThis effect lasts for 20s, and during this time, the Rebels will be unable to disguise themselves.\nThe Rebels will be warned of this action. ｜ 解除所有「游侠」的伪装，在小地图上短暂标示所有游侠的位置，并以光柱标明附近的游侠在场景中所处的位置。\n技能效果持续20秒，效果持续期间内，游侠将无法再次进行伪装。\n施放时，游侠阵营将得到警告。

- This paper frog, whose name was Cibrelus, once won the championship seven times in a row. No frog was his equal. ｜ 这位纸蛙叫做西布雷吕，曾经连续七次夺下冠军，具有无蛙能敌的统治力。
- Hmph, save your flattery. We didn't just "happen" to be here... Surely you won't pretend to have forgotten the reason for which we came? ｜ 哼，何必借机奉承？而且，我们可不是「碰巧」在此——我们的来意，你转眼就想装作忘记了么？
- Thundering Fury ｜ 如雷的盛怒
- Ah, it's you. Nothing's wrong... except I might need to start looking for a new job soon. ｜ 是你啊。没什么，就是我快要被掌柜的扫地出门了。
- Elemental Energy Full ｜ 元素满盈
- Understood, Archon! Although, I'd like to continue helping out with the treatment. I can't let everything I've learned go to waste. ｜ 收到，火神大人！不过我还会继续参与治疗的，积累下来的经验不能白费。
- Lady Megistus, it's fine! This is Alice's creation, it's totally safe! Spare yourself the trouble, just come with us. ｜ 梅姬斯图斯卿，这可是那位艾莉丝大人的造物！请不要这样牺牲自己，跟我们一起走罢。
- You have an appointment with Tighnari tomorrow morning. Best to go tell Katheryne about the contaminated area first. ｜ 与提纳里约好了第二天上午再见，先去把污染区的事情告诉凯瑟琳吧。
- But didn't you meet them when we were fighting to defend Liyue Harbor together? ｜ 上次跟仙人们并肩作战的时候，他们不都见过你了吗？
- Let's go check out the shrine at Komore Teahouse first. ｜ 先去木漏茶室的神龛吧。
- I'm gonna show you what for today! ｜ 大爷我今天就跟你撕破脸啦！

- Uh, H—Happy Birthday! Here's the cake I made for you, and here are the candles, so yeah... Amber said in her letter that this would do the job... Oh! And, and here's the gift I got for you!\n...I'm sorry, I don't have much experience arranging birthday parties. I have no idea if you'll like it... Aah, I'm getting all flustered now. If anything's not how you like it, please say, and I'll make absolutely sure to plan a nicer birthday celebration for you next year! ｜ 生、生日快乐！这个是我准备的蛋糕，这个是备用的蜡烛…安柏在信里说这样就行…啊，还有、还有这个是送给你的礼物！\n…不好意思，我没什么办生日会的经验，也不知道合不合你的心意…弄得手忙脚乱的。有什么不足一定要跟我说，明年，我一定会准备得更好！
- Ahh, don't mind me, just leave me alone to sulk a little longer... I'll return to my normal self in no time! ｜ 你们别管我啦，我再难过一小下，就…就会打起精神来的！

- Thank you very much. It has been richly rewarding to learn from you so far, and I believe my skills with the blade can go even further still. ｜ 非常感谢。与你切磋使我受益良多，相信在剑术上也能更进一步。
- I don't know what scheme Northland Bank has in the works, and I don't know what they're paying you. ｜ 我不知道北国银行在打什么算盘，也不知道他们给了你多少酬劳。

- Correct, anyone. Unlike the Akasha, which heavily regulates who can access what information, Knowledge Capsules confer their contents without any requisites. ｜ 对，无论是谁。不像虚空有复杂的规则，会严格审核某种知识谁可以获得，它会无条件地把里面的东西交给你。

- A monster created by the sedimentation of Pyro dispersed throughout nature.\nThough its intelligence has not increased with its size, it is very hot. During dry seasons, it can cause wildfires. It will spit forth blazing fireballs when angered, and will turn dark when it is feeling down. A most expressive slime, indeed. ｜ 逸散在自然之中的火元素沉积形成的魔物。\n虽然智能水平并没有随着体型的成长而提高，但真的很热。在干燥的季节，可能会引发野火。愤怒的时候会喷吐炽热的火球，情绪低落的时候会变暗，是表达能力很强的史莱姆。

- I've always dealt with things in terms of costs, so it came as no surprise to me when the Wayob granted me the Ancient Name of "Malipo," or Turnfire.\nValue comes from surviving, so I don't look forward to the day my life will come to an end. But I'm also the bearer of the Turnfire legacy, and I'm prepared to face the flames when that day comes.\nLet the Turnfire judge how I have spent my life. I know I won't have anything to regret. ｜ 迄今我都在和「代价」打交道，从大灵处获得古名「回火」——也就是「马力卜」，我并不意外。\n生存才能创造价值，我不会期待一切走向终结的那一天。但作为「回火」的持有者，我早有接受它灼烧的准备。\n它大可审视我的一生，而我不会留下遗憾。

- An apex predator deep in the desert that can use the power of Anemo to a certain extent, which allows it to leave the ground when in combat and enter a floating state. While floating, it can fire Windbite Bullets. If these bullets are not destroyed in time, they will be converted into a high-density curtain of such bullets. <color=#f39001>Attacks from elements that may react with Anemo</color> can destroy Windbite Bullets, which will temporarily decrease the corresponding Elemental RES of the Setekh Wenut. After 2 Windbite Bullets are destroyed in succession, the Setekh Wenut will be brought down from its floating state. ｜ 沙漠深处的顶级掠食者，在一定程度上能操使风元素的力量，并能据此在面对强敌时离开地面，进入浮游状态。在浮游时，将排出多个「风蚀弹」。未能及时破坏的话，风蚀弹将转化为密集的风蚀弹幕。<color=#f39001>能与风元素反应的元素类型的攻击</color>可以破坏风蚀弹，并在一段时间内降低风蚀沙虫对应的元素抗性。连续破坏两枚风蚀弹后，将击落浮游中的风蚀沙虫。

- A stand exquisitely handcrafted by the craftsmen at Acara Crafts based on the depiction of the Aranara's homeland in fairy tales, with enough space to accommodate 6 "Aranara Carvings."\nAt first, only one such stand was crafted as a showcase. However, on account of the popularity of the woodcarvings and the eager requests of children, it soon went into mass production as well.\nIt is said that its selling price is lower than the production cost. Yet this is no pricing mistake, but rather a sales strategy. ｜ 阿折罗造像的工匠们以童话中对于兰那罗家园的描写为参考，精心制作的展台，可以放置6个「兰那罗木刻」。\n最初工匠们只制作了一座展台，但是因为木刻的热卖与小朋友们的热切要求，也开始了量产化。\n据说售卖价格低于制作成本，不过这并非定价失误，而是一种销售策略。

- Sometimes, I receive letters from showgoers who say that my dancing has cheered them up. I always share this kind of happy news with everyone at Zubayr Theater. Even though I'm the one the audience sees on the stage, it's because of everyone's collective efforts that I can stand up there in the first place. ｜ 有时候我会收到观众们的来信，说他们因为我的舞蹈打起了精神。我会和祖拜尔剧场的大家共同分享这份快乐。虽然在观众眼里，我是在台前的那一个，但在我心中，这永远是靠所有人的努力才能取得的成果。

- The Lord of Eroded Primal Fire's blazing horn, cut off in the heat of battle.\nLegend has it that the first Pyro Dragons clashed with their horns, passing on their wisdom like a flaming torch to ancient dragonkind. This was a blessing bestowed by the primordial master of elements through fire and blood. Though the bloodline of the Dragonheirs is now so thin as to be all but lost, this ancient blessing is still passed on to this day.\nAnd though the base of the flaming horn has been corroded, the light that once illuminated the world remains without blemish. ｜ 在与蚀灭的源焰之主战斗后，斩下的魔龙的焰角。\n传说最初的火龙以角相抵，将智慧如炬般传递给了古老的龙众，那是原初的元素执掌者赐予的火与血中的祝福，即使龙嗣的血脉已然淡薄到近乎断绝，这份来自远古的祝福仍然传递到了今日。\n在焰角底座已受腐蚀的情况下，一度点亮世界的光辉也并未染上丝毫的污浊。
- Alright, let us move on. A safe place, this is not. ｜ 好啦，不要留在这里了，我们先离开再说吧。
- The first two Fungi you met are still waiting for their family to return outside Sumeru City... ｜ 须弥城外，最初前来求助的两只蕈兽，仍在等待「家人」的回归…
- #Absolutely! I have no doubt of that. Well then, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, here are the scripts for the next two scenes. ｜ #绝对的，这一点我深信不疑。那么演员{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}，接下来两场戏的剧本都在这里了。

- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 6 consecutive spear strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina to lunge forward, causing stone spears to fall along his path.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多六段的连续枪击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，向前方疾行，在行动路径上和终点投下如雨的岩枪。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。

- We can't have you underestimating me. ｜ 不能被你小瞧了啊…

- Watatsumi Island is the furthest from Narukami Island in the Inazuman island chain, and its name means "the god of the oceans" in the island's ancient tongue. Legend has it that when the great serpent first arose within the abyssal nation of ever-night, its fluorescent body was covered in myriad-colored coral. ｜ 稻妻列岛中距离鸣神岛最遥远的「海祇」，在海祇岛的古语中的意思是「统管诸海的大神」。传说大蛇在常夜的渊下国土中初次现身时，身上覆满了四色的珊瑚枝，散发着煌煌的荧光。

- Since we're here in Liyue, let's find a place where we can take a commemorative photo for Kichiboushi! ｜ 既然到了璃月，也找个地方给吉法师拍照做个纪念吧！

- An odd Ruin Grader that can be found lumbering amidst the thick fog that hangs over Tsurumi Island. It is significantly stronger than your average Ruin Grader.\nFor reasons unknown, it has appeared on this deserted island, along with the equally enigmatic ancient techniques that power it.\nHosseini has a strong academic interest in this Ruin Grader and would like you to defeat it, all the better for his research to continue. ｜ 在鹤观迷蒙的雾气中来回徘徊的奇特遗迹重机，比起普通的遗迹重机，似乎拥有更加强大的力量。\n不知出于何种机缘，它出现在了这个人迹罕至的岛屿，和它的来历同样神秘的还有制造它的古代技术。\n出于学术目的，胡塞尼对它有着强烈的兴趣，希望你能击败它从而方便胡塞尼进行研究。

- A two-legged Saurian doll made from Peach Palm Wood, decorated with blue and red graffiti. They can often be found accompanying Saurian whelps or young children all over Natlan. The creator intentionally designed these puppets to wobble, resembling young Saurians still learning to walk. It is said that this design aims to give less agile Saurian whelps or children more confidence, encouraging them to bravely continue their unsteady travail toward mastery over walking. ｜ 用「桃椰子木」制成的木刻两足龙玩偶，点缀有蓝红相间的涂鸦，常被用于陪伴幼龙或孩童，能在纳塔各处见到。制作者故意让这些木偶呈现出摇摇晃晃的样式，仿佛是仍在蹒跚学步的幼龙。据说，这样设计是为了给那些不够灵活的幼龙或孩童更多的自信，鼓励他们继续勇敢地、摇摇晃晃地学习行走。

- Due to his hailing from Mondstadt, Thoma is often regarded as an "outsider" by the local residents of Inazuma.\nDespite the strange looks and gossip directed towards him, Thoma never showed any dissatisfaction, and always smiled at all doubts.\nThoma is recognized as the most amiable person in the Yashiro Commission, but to outsiders, it is another story.\n"Don't offend Thoma! Otherwise, things will be difficult to handle."\nNo one is sure when it started, but this saying has gone around so much that many people are convinced of this when they hear it.\nAs for those who have had unpleasant run-ins with Thoma, the mention of him still instills fear:\n"Don't be fooled by that guy! He's always smiling kindly, but all I did was cheat the Yashiro Commission out of a small sum of money, and he..."\nThat's right, if anyone dares to harm the interests of the Yashiro Commission or disrespect the Kamisato siblings, Thoma will make them pay.\nHe sees this as his duty and does his best, but does not like to boast about his achievements. Even if he is criticized for this, he will not defend himself too much.\n"Gee, who cares about such trivialities? And it doesn't matter what kind of person I am, as long as those who should know know it." ｜ 由于身上流淌着异国血脉，托马常常被稻妻本地居民视作「外人」。\n面前是异样眼光，背后是流言蜚语，即使如此，托马也从未表现出任何不满，总是对所有质疑一笑置之。\n托马是社奉行府内公认脾气最好的人，可在外人眼里，他又是另一副模样。\n「千万别得罪托马！否则，事情就不好办了。」\n不知从何时起，市井中流传着这样的说法，许多人听在耳中，对此深信不疑。\n至于那些在托马手下吃过亏的人，提起他时更是心有余悸：\n「别被那小子骗了！平日里笑得和蔼可亲，可我不过是从社奉行骗了一笔小钱，他竟然…」\n没错，若有人胆敢损害社奉行的利益，或是对神里兄妹不敬的话，托马定会让对方付出相应的代价。\n他将此视为职责，尽心而为，却不爱夸耀功劳。即使因此遭到非议，也不会为自己辩解太多。\n「哎呀，谁会在乎这种小事呢？再说我是个什么样的人也不重要，只要那些该知道的人知道就行。」

I needn't make a move when someone is a prisoner of their own soul. ｜ 我见过太多人临阵投降。连拔出武器的勇气都没有，所谓的冤屈和名誉受损，想必也只是自私的一家之言罢了。\n他们早已被自己击败，无需我动手，就自愿变成了心灵的囚徒。

- The bad news, of course, is that I am absolutely useless when it comes to cutting gems and making jewelry! ｜ 坏消息，我切割宝石和打首饰的手艺真是一塌糊涂啊！
- Let's listen to the sounds inside those conches again. Let's hope that they can give us some clues about the code... ｜ 再好好听一下那些海螺里的声音吧，希望那些声音里真的有「密码」的线索…

- And if you can't remember the name, just go with "hey," "you," or "newbie," or whatever. Pleased to be at your service! ｜ 记不住名字也没有关系，用「喂」、「你」或者「那个新人」任意一种都可以代替，随时乐意为你效劳！
- A Biting-Cold Wayob Manifestation that once appeared in a special trial.\nWill manifest during combat as a "Protection Spirit" and a "Hostile Spirit." Of the two types, the Protection Spirit will create a spirit connection with the character, and when <color=#F39001>each member of the party receives healing, HP will be recovered for the Protection Spirit</color>. When the Protection Spirit's HP is fully restored, it will use the coordinated attack "Pierce: Binding of Dawn and Dusk's Breaking" to attack the Hostile Spirit. At this time, the more HP is restored to the Protection Spirit, the greater the damage that will be dealt, until finally Pierce: Binding of Dawn and Dusk's Breaking can be transformed into the more powerful Decisive: Binding of Dawn and Dusk's Breaking. ｜ 曾在特殊试炼中出现的凛冽·大灵显化身。\n在战斗中，将显化为「佑灵身」和「敌灵身」，其中，「佑灵身」会与角色建立魂之链接，<color=#F39001>队伍中每一个角色受到治疗的时候，都将为「佑灵身」恢复生命值</color>。当「佑灵身」的生命值完全恢复时，将会释放「贯通·晨昏破晓之束」协助攻击「敌灵身」，此时，为「佑灵身」恢复的生命值越多，「佑灵身」造成的伤害也将越高，最后甚至会转化为威力最强大的「决胜·晨昏破晓之束」。
- I've already tasted the sweetness of justice. I don't need anything else... ｜ 我已经收获了「正义」，除此之外，我也不需要什么了。
- Th—The inn... could she have let slip about our mission from the Qixing? What? No, I didn't say anything... ｜ 您、您问客栈…难道说姐姐一不小心把七星交代的任务说漏嘴了？啊不，没什么…
